Ron DeSantis

Governor of Florida

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a41ac37d9d366b8e027dfe2c72a15dc4615f1138922404152e8cbef67d9e04b2b25da752cbe8258606f1f1299c28c2bf7db6a5df590b3a037b403c9fe41bf202

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a656715e149898fb1e34198f98958a0b05553422f01212321aede0bc915ad20d9b03dc9507fdfa0dc957fdd9bc797a2346bded9f06509c58d569b7e6f7fcf6b0
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a656715e149898fb9506d27a01c65d3f29682d666f24a5d53c34678f8c30e47887dcc721fbcc65fddb4f88c33a8f3cffc4ebf0bcc8a430b8ffaf203ef10cf08b
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a41ac37d9d366b8e33614692e43ccfe4f52106d8d9c0bd177777794fa74b10a5ec4c79ce28daa0a1bfc530b08309c25753883a6a678f85de6974c7aeb6db4bbf

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a41ac37d9d366b8e33614692e43ccfe4f52106d8d9c0bd177777794fa74b10a5ec4c79ce28daa0a1bfc530b08309c25753883a6a678f85de6974c7aeb6db4bbf

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, I am campaigning across all 99 counties of Iowa because it matters to me that I meet as many Americans as I can and you hear directly from me. I do not feel entitled to this nomination, and I do not feel entitled to YOUR vote. I have to earn it, and that's exactly what I plan to do. But I'm not just sending you an email today, friend. This matters too much to me to risk getting lost in your inbox. So I recorded a quick message so that you could hear what I have to say: Hear my message I hope you'll hear me out, and I hope you'll rise to the occasion. We have no time to waste. Sincerely, Ron DeSantis Governor of Florida 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. name: George Logan
subject: I play in a Jimi Hendrix tribute band
body:
I’m the frontman for a Jimi Hendrix tribute band that plays in some of Connecticut’s most rockin’ venues... but that’s not all!

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr1kfgdoorkf9925rk6chl43d47dksa1ueiecka8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c3ge9or6c3h2bs)
---

Friend - Have you heard the news?

**[I'm running for Congress in the most important battleground race in the entire country.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvl3m57bsnvcgnjb87thr0flnt1mb8ke1p8p2sv8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c3ge9or6c3h2bs "I’m running for Congress in the most important battleground race in the entire country.")**

**My name is George Logan.** I'm a proud family man, engineer, community leader, small business owner, and frontman for Electric Lady Band, a Jimi Hendrix tribute band that plays in some of Connecticut's most rockin' venues.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ve638gs3cktvf0r66jpq0p9ko6rt62uc238kb8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c3ge9or6c3h2bs)
---
Although, it's more likely you know me from my 2022 campaign for Congress, where **we narrowly missed flipping Connecticut's 5th Congressional District red by fewer than 2,000 votes.**

When handed a tough defeat, you have two choices - you can give up, or you can regroup and come back stronger than before.

But if we are going to be successful in this rematch, then I'm going to need your help right now! **Last time, we were outraised by over $1,000,000,** **[so I need your help to make sure our campaign starts strong and closes the gap!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn8uc22r9lbiqquss7sts9smg2obj1cbj1q97li0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c3ge9or6c3h2bs "so I need your help to make sure our campaign starts strong and closes the gap!")**
| | [HELP GEORGE FLIP THIS SEAT
CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT »](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrmm9f7jp53mi5ia0ohkoalcsra9jjtuq6jnp400_rp22sh2s8i66p77c3ge9or6c3h2bs)
---

Look, I'm the son of immigrants. My grandparents left Jamaica for Guatemala during the Great Depression, and like so many other American families, my parents left Guatemala and came to America to grow a family and build a better life. **I 've seen that it takes hard work to overcome challenges.**
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl203el7vsd2ai5om2h8gkkkh3p5dcf2bq6pfue8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c3ge9or6c3h2bs)
---
This is a photo of my mom and dad. They instilled the values I live by today: to **put your family first, give back to your community, value your education, and always work hard.**

They worked day and night at factory jobs and office administrative work to ensure I was getting the education to land a better job **so that I could pursue my American dream. **
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zedstoi2i6bom381151gtc8mnvvi7mokcm9efojo_rp22sh2s8i66p77c3ge9or6c3h2bs)
---
I am a first-generation college graduate, and I even earned my master's degree. I had to take out a good amount of student loans, but as my parents taught me, my hard work would pay off.

I soon met my wife, Lisa, and we fell in love. She has always been my rock. She spent her career working as a nurse, helping those struggling with their mental health and addiction.**Together we did what every family strives to do, make sure the American Dream lives on for our children.**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk2259v65ifqpedevc3rbckhpd6nkljsdeuuvms8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c3ge9or6c3h2bs)
---
Lisa and I could not be prouder of our kids. But my goal is to continue making them proud of me; **my job as their role model is not done yet.**

I am living proof that the American dream is alive and well, but that dream cannot end with me. I want my children and future generations to have the opportunity to reach their full potential in life.

I have seen the mess that Joe Biden and the Democrats' policies have brought upon our nation, and I have seen firsthand the struggles it has placed on my community. **I can 't stand the fact that this is the environment our children have to start their lives in**.

Our country has lost sight of our founding principles due to poor leadership and a culture that looks down on patriotism, and **[I'm ready to do something about it.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4qlrh6b8ap2k6rjp4dq754am4cqmm5lumhjbvn0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c3ge9or6c3h2bs "I’m ready to do something about it.")**

Looking at these photos brought back some great memories, and I hope to keep making more in a country that we all can be proud of.

I know times are hard in Biden's economy, but if you are in the position to give, **[please consider chipping in just $5, $10, or even $25 to help our campaign start strong!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmoiv94vhjbglqkdk216qlmi5st7nmmimkke4ma8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c3ge9or6c3h2bs "please consider chipping in just $5, $10, or even $25 to help our campaign start strong!")**

---
| | | [HELP GEORGE FLIP THIS SEAT
CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT »](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc7gpca275li9okrfbp8d4gm2nduistj3e0o1rtg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c3ge9or6c3h2bs)
---
**The early days of this race will be critical in our fight to retake this seat for Republicans**. My incumbent Democrat opponent is a rubber stamp for every one of President Biden's bad ideas, and she has chosen to stand with The Squad rather than stand up for us. **[I'm going to need your continued support to win.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztfafr8tsi3t4vel50nblvkul5uqeff11rv11qh8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c3ge9or6c3h2bs "I’m going to need your continued support to win. ")**

Sincerely,
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztnp693esgk5s77tpvhih7nkosqp0gps4ckr8pio_rp22sh2s8i66p77c3ge9or6c3h2bs)
---
George Logan

---
|
---
| | Paid for George Logan For Congress
---

26 Catoonah Street Box 72
Ridgefield, CT, 06877

[Privacy Policy](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z97k7n1kjhutr37jkm1j9e8lqdbfip017j66k8r8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c3ge9or6c3h2bs)

American Action News

body:
The Biden Administration has overseen what could be the largest international child trafficking and smuggling regime in human history

Fellow Patriot, The Biden Administration has overseen what could be the largest international child trafficking and smuggling regime in human history, and they have done absolutely nothing to stop it. Instead, they’re doling out _BILLIONS_ of your tax dollars to political allies who encourage and advance illegal immigration. **It’s almost too shocking to believe ... ** But documents obtained through our lawsuit against Biden’s DHS prove that the federal government awarded a whopping $2 billion to a former Biden administration staffer who used the money to support illegal aliens...even spending money on “music therapy” for illegal aliens! This is **CORRUPTION** , full stop. And it’s exactly why America First Legal was founded - to expose the truth and fight for the rule of law in America! _Will you**please pitch in** a generous donation to help us keep up the fight?_

subject: In 7 Hours! We will make history as I announce my candidacy for...
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Laurel Imer and is not approved by any candidate or candidates committee
body:
In 7 Hours our path to victory begins. Join me as we make history in Colorado. See you soon!
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00178dbO7PZxp0UrsYyjXJkdZRuBrIyzcx7jXDAotbltUkmOAZvXimtrHkHBhOX60Fgl0YWesTUKPdl7cSBx_ECp3rOLBPhsKVFIFWEkYMe_4rV_XbwXsd-NnOBhi96R1gm7fIa7DFSCMLdCieOTrZdj9nS7jkuR6jf&c=qg9ypf4M57xyopOn9PR3njvF9fx6IYPz-HMJl4IIk28gZqkcjgLAJQ==&ch=WCtnSesVdwVvBoTBtCgywrySfzZ-E0ZT8y1Z_sg9JNi5GTQtckFvWQ==)

| Dear Supporter,
In less than 7 hours I will be making the biggest announcement of my political career.
We are starting a state-wide campaign to retake the RNC for the grassroots of Colorado. Ensuring representation the way we want it across our state.
When we win in 2024, the establishment swamp will no longer control the RNC and it is my hope that you will join me as we kick off this campaign to Save the Republican Party and Return the RNC to Patriotism.
Our kickoff event will be TODAY! Saturday, October 21st at 2:00 PM at the Colorado Automobile Dealers Association, and I would appreciate your attendance and support.
By attending, we can show the establishment that the grassroots will not be silenced any longer and that we want a say in how the Republican Party operates.
If you have not already, you can RSVP by clicking below. ⬇️

| Enjoy live music from Lee & Co, featuring special guest performances on the CADA patio from Princess Wallace, and Weston Imer & The 45's.
Enjoy light refreshments, a cash bar, and visit with other special guests like; Glant Havenar, Ramey Johnson, James "Jimi Mack" McFarland, Helbis Varangot, Members of our host committee, and surprise guests who will be making appearances throughout the event.
This kickoff event will not be a stuffy boring political event but a fun patriotic celebration of our state and country.
Come hear from leaders around the state and stand with us as we pick up the torch of liberty one last time and march into this political arena.
I am in this race to fight for each and every one of you, and I look forward to seeing you there.
Let us celebrate A Return To Patriotism!

clean_body: In 7 Hours our path to victory begins. Join me as we make history in Colorado. See you soon! | | | | == | Dear Supporter, In less than 7 hours I will be making the biggest announcement of my political career. We are starting a state-wide campaign to retake the RNC for the grassroots of Colorado. Ensuring representation the way we want it across our state. When we win in 2024, the establishment swamp will no longer control the RNC and it is my hope that you will join me as we kick off this campaign to Save the Republican Party and Return the RNC to Patriotism. Our kickoff event will be TODAY! Saturday, October 21st at 2:00 PM at the Colorado Automobile Dealers Association, and I would appreciate your attendance and support. By attending, we can show the establishment that the grassroots will not be silenced any longer and that we want a say in how the Republican Party operates. If you have not already, you can RSVP by clicking below. ⬇️ | == | | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | | == | Enjoy live music from Lee & Co, featuring special guest performances on the CADA patio from Princess Wallace, and Weston Imer & The 45's. Enjoy light refreshments, a cash bar, and visit with other special guests like; Glant Havenar, Ramey Johnson, James "Jimi Mack" McFarland, Helbis Varangot, Members of our host committee, and surprise guests who will be making appearances throughout the event. This kickoff event will not be a stuffy boring political event but a fun patriotic celebration of our state and country. Come hear from leaders around the state and stand with us as we pick up the torch of liberty one last time and march into this political arena. I am in this race to fight for each and every one of you, and I look forward to seeing you there. Let us celebrate A Return To Patriotism! | == | Laurel Imer Candidate Republican National Committeewoman of Colorado == | | == | == == == | == | This email was Paid for By Laurel Imer and is not approved by any candidate or candidates committee. www.ImerForColorado.com This email was sent by Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC with authorization and approval by Laurel Imer | | | | | | | Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC | 16606 W 9th Ave, Golden, CO 80401 | (202) 849-7530 | prodigyconsultinggroupllc.org | | Sent by mailto:contact@imerforcolorado.com powered by

body:
---
| | | | | | [Donate Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XMgjCm3TmCW9-CBnQdzXA8p75f5NW3L5paDt6R6x7wX8TigAHGy0lYCsFH_emmAPcpIxZgl5XBres8aRWAjLqXTza695CwBliKmRVPp5--UV3kPzBNIoY8-g02AKXozOM0W9sWRPf2Rp_zrrJCITzDC1mdhews5ZA1zJN9QYLVUqTru56IkecLx-YVOIyVRdC5JHSwmSnww=&c=xfRQr-1zthFX25Uy9MQUDLHyvqKlF8TGDfdGGDNXSwEO-oaDp9-zOA==&ch=tmXKrHUGLcjxaR6EltDtFFKdmIM2swYm46z1U4TpdLqoR-Of2PnKVw==)
---
| "It really is amazing what we can achieve when we work as a team!" -John McGuire
---
| 17 Days To Go!
---
|
---
| Friends,
We have just 17 days to go. The Democrats want to tax and spend and us out of existence. Together, we can vote them out. Everything we care about such as the sanctity of life, our 2nd Amendment, law and order, our economy, right to work, education, and more are at stake on your last day to vote, November 7.
Specifically, if you know anyone who lives in Henrico County, please ask them to vote to re-elect Senator Siobhan Dunnavant, David Owens for Delegate, and Riley Shaia for Delegate.
All across Virginia, please remind family members, neighbors, and friends to vote Republican!
Volunteers Wanted Election Day: We need volunteers to help on election day. If you can help, please email us your name, phone #, and county to john@mcguireforvirginia.com
[Vote early locations in SD 10](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XMgjCm3TmCW9-CBnQdzXA8p75f5NW3L5paDt6R6x7wX8TigAHGy0lR5kzTk0WS5osUmI8eY53-3TSiNlvIQhSZlVTMOm3cnGGPjGMys-SPFs_scGIXJojqlS7kPLvLRwCy_nHiWxTo7LNRSQ6PGmimWmN5fS3nnx-4XO61AzFzeLiyznGW--bCVbxVDYh7RvovOGTa6jDEqWdk2m7jI0zNKkwYiqMsi8G5-Z2qSI25rlbw6tSpkPcXwkwLRwmu74Al8aXzJ8sNw=&c=xfRQr-1zthFX25Uy9MQUDLHyvqKlF8TGDfdGGDNXSwEO-oaDp9-zOA==&ch=tmXKrHUGLcjxaR6EltDtFFKdmIM2swYm46z1U4TpdLqoR-Of2PnKVw==).
Go to [www.vpap.org](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XMgjCm3TmCW9-CBnQdzXA8p75f5NW3L5paDt6R6x7wX8TigAHGy0ld5eIetxp414qq0cFB3VK0X4Gy3_2PFGqDJCAMxsfF0hGcVYv980jPCYZ8WJG-hir7O0kYv64GdYoepbqBGz4Jg=&c=xfRQr-1zthFX25Uy9MQUDLHyvqKlF8TGDfdGGDNXSwEO-oaDp9-zOA==&ch=tmXKrHUGLcjxaR6EltDtFFKdmIM2swYm46z1U4TpdLqoR-Of2PnKVw==) and enter your address to find out who's on your ballot, where to vote, and more.
While campaigning all over the place, I am keeping my ears open and listening to your ideas on how we can improve Virginia. The following is some of what is on my mind and what we have been up to:
---
| Retired Israeli General Rescues Family/ Others
---
|
---
| A Real Hero: A grandfather and retired IDF general rescued his granddaughters from their kibbutz as Hamas attacked in Israel. [Click here for the story.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XMgjCm3TmCW9-CBnQdzXA8p75f5NW3L5paDt6R6x7wX8TigAHGy0lWIHh4k68C_taNNHRd8cCYFK2dJJULlpzgAOSNDrF98xgeuDZkuY86wFB-MpDW51sdWXSap1HWC4fZCKvMhIBkxxuNWp6w1ciTiF9R9GM6OCay1sT57oOJkwAnVXhg2yYQ9WRUsJhcoUlS5MkLt9QxkZ7oqG0hzm-p0WAL4daICz&c=xfRQr-1zthFX25Uy9MQUDLHyvqKlF8TGDfdGGDNXSwEO-oaDp9-zOA==&ch=tmXKrHUGLcjxaR6EltDtFFKdmIM2swYm46z1U4TpdLqoR-Of2PnKVw==)
---
| Two McGuire Brothers on the Ballot
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| It is an honor to be on the ballot this year with my younger brother, Louisa County Commonwealth Attorney and National Guard Colonel, Rusty McGuire. Louisa County is one of ten counties in Senate District Ten. Thank you Rusty and other law enforcement folks along with other first responders for all you do to keep Louisa County safe!
---
| A Powerful Message, We Need Each Other
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XMgjCm3TmCW9-CBnQdzXA8p75f5NW3L5paDt6R6x7wX8TigAHGy0lWIHh4k68C_tF6lEm8OSSf6h02W6eEj6nYsX6a3HZc2MztnWVHqQTNr_ugLfGqzEJWIaMcsBpBu6ZimGnNk1gGbYIELKy33rXMzaF6e0cI_AR0wk4fp-ZDsN-U8ZwmhMgEvlXehc4xVlPB0OmGUhIPFuuGX2dsfDyzY5zR0x7Py7zSef6I357zyA0lLxAQJRhdUiokzFu2qfIMoy_N9LqGm-QWJ4AGXcLxlAy5NpPdHWLBV27dFcmw1AV9VRXWs4QY-Sh26mIxqr&c=xfRQr-1zthFX25Uy9MQUDLHyvqKlF8TGDfdGGDNXSwEO-oaDp9-zOA==&ch=tmXKrHUGLcjxaR6EltDtFFKdmIM2swYm46z1U4TpdLqoR-Of2PnKVw==)

| Governor Youngkin Speaks at Jewish Temple
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| [Governor Glenn Youngkin ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XMgjCm3TmCW9-CBnQdzXA8p75f5NW3L5paDt6R6x7wX8TigAHGy0lWIHh4k68C_tagnj99rudjXt0yLzme3ADYc3AX6OHCxwKaPbMu2aO98xlXLVf65L8F0RbJM57gv5TWhA3PFDVqta0sbRW6RTwJdZWjaqto8-&c=xfRQr-1zthFX25Uy9MQUDLHyvqKlF8TGDfdGGDNXSwEO-oaDp9-zOA==&ch=tmXKrHUGLcjxaR6EltDtFFKdmIM2swYm46z1U4TpdLqoR-Of2PnKVw==)delivered remarks at the Kenseth Beth Israel Temple. Thank you Governor and team for your efforts to fight antisemitism. It is good to see so many friends showing support for Israel during this difficult time to include [Holocaust Survivor and family friend Jay Ipson](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XMgjCm3TmCW9-CBnQdzXA8p75f5NW3L5paDt6R6x7wX8TigAHGy0lWIHh4k68C_tN-pBXJZ7TdsR9yQauxlgnnq4T28DEbOSAvTI3qCF968Z9s9Jo9nZgx0Y5g6_W2Z7VevHxAAkvY1KWZGXlzDI3BYTPxAoW_q5S0x8E-5RS3E=&c=xfRQr-1zthFX25Uy9MQUDLHyvqKlF8TGDfdGGDNXSwEO-oaDp9-zOA==&ch=tmXKrHUGLcjxaR6EltDtFFKdmIM2swYm46z1U4TpdLqoR-Of2PnKVw==) and his family, [Senator Siobhon Dunnavant](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XMgjCm3TmCW9-CBnQdzXA8p75f5NW3L5paDt6R6x7wX8TigAHGy0lXo8f-4RzDQ8ZzAIJbqoQp6C12fn7xKV9BKRKHaFQFe608BzWK7ztT_fgZF_5HklM0OrY6OjawLtQvvx3K2U-9wgw2JWON9S4gcuxcX0Hln7&c=xfRQr-1zthFX25Uy9MQUDLHyvqKlF8TGDfdGGDNXSwEO-oaDp9-zOA==&ch=tmXKrHUGLcjxaR6EltDtFFKdmIM2swYm46z1U4TpdLqoR-Of2PnKVw==), [Riley Shaia for Delegate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XMgjCm3TmCW9-CBnQdzXA8p75f5NW3L5paDt6R6x7wX8TigAHGy0lWIHh4k68C_tpEuYj94DXs4z_bfme7S3O9DgucrGKcBE5PaKXKYssT46yy79LmHp553BaWT9WWR18FA1Jrk5m1q7MK_VK9RQwg==&c=xfRQr-1zthFX25Uy9MQUDLHyvqKlF8TGDfdGGDNXSwEO-oaDp9-zOA==&ch=tmXKrHUGLcjxaR6EltDtFFKdmIM2swYm46z1U4TpdLqoR-Of2PnKVw==), [Don Blake of the Virginia Christian Alliance](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XMgjCm3TmCW9-CBnQdzXA8p75f5NW3L5paDt6R6x7wX8TigAHGy0lWIHh4k68C_ts6yWLdOwuEPypykLfqQXeKL69t-eCSOT_aa0-zYyfcIMEkMpXNalchIUWhSr7OMMJrbSCOzboiRpKLYpBW_hakTDDOarEXkthv5LHOtZPKU=&c=xfRQr-1zthFX25Uy9MQUDLHyvqKlF8TGDfdGGDNXSwEO-oaDp9-zOA==&ch=tmXKrHUGLcjxaR6EltDtFFKdmIM2swYm46z1U4TpdLqoR-Of2PnKVw==), [Reverend Craig](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XMgjCm3TmCW9-CBnQdzXA8p75f5NW3L5paDt6R6x7wX8TigAHGy0lWIHh4k68C_tbcUBLRaqVqnT6Hn9WaI34YtgvA-k4XPVzP273jN6aRlyhuSiUw-iMX01GqpQnzXWrUXsmWFFI9Kc2WR3U5Y8PA==&c=xfRQr-1zthFX25Uy9MQUDLHyvqKlF8TGDfdGGDNXSwEO-oaDp9-zOA==&ch=tmXKrHUGLcjxaR6EltDtFFKdmIM2swYm46z1U4TpdLqoR-Of2PnKVw==), and more.

Buckingham GOP Chair and fellow Trump supporter Ramona Christian.

| My brother and Louisa Commonwealth Attorney Rusty McGuire, fellow Delegate Buddy Fowler and I had a wonderful time at the Fleshman Farm Bonfire in Louisa County. Thank you Marcie, Roger, and Harvey for an incredible evening. It was good to see Supervisor Rachel Jones and her family. We met some wonderful people and the home made chili was amazing!
---
| Happy Birthday US Navy!
---
|
---
| Since October 13, 1775, Happy Birthday to the worlds finest Navy, the United States Navy!
---

|

| An American World War 2 Sniper Vintage Portable Field Cook Stove on display at [Monte Mays in Appomattox County.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XMgjCm3TmCW9-CBnQdzXA8p75f5NW3L5paDt6R6x7wX8TigAHGy0lWIHh4k68C_tl6y3RxZOO7Dn-FAGeE9__6sFrQHb3ikse6Hn5p0v6VA-xgu_OM8712JycjqxTfVExf_yn8_R34o1Gg5QLsW6QvzWQPridM8lJ9cJTj0FB56KjcXnVuD28P3ujxX22yOmQ_WtDTJbVcOM8Qgvv00j3bFTn3_Q3ARQuF9V_UFdAbU=&c=xfRQr-1zthFX25Uy9MQUDLHyvqKlF8TGDfdGGDNXSwEO-oaDp9-zOA==&ch=tmXKrHUGLcjxaR6EltDtFFKdmIM2swYm46z1U4TpdLqoR-Of2PnKVw==) How cool is that?
---
|
---
|
---
| We had a wonderful time celebrating with you in Appomattox County. The Historic Appomattox Railroad Festival was established in 1972. It is a family-friendly festival to celebrate the heritage and history of Appomattox County and its citizens.
---
| Granny Bees Restaurant Appomattox County
---
|
---
|
---
| We ran into some wonderful people at one our favorite spots in Appomattox County, Granny Bees Restaurant. Thank you Batina for always making us feel welcome!
---
| Buckingham County
---
|
---
| We ran into Supervisor Don Mathews running for re-election in Buckingham County. Every vote counts, so please spread the word!
---
| Speaker Todd Gilbert Event VA Beach
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Delegate Todd Gilbert along with many others are working hard to ensure we keep the majority in the House and flip the Senate. It was good to see many folks who love Virginia like Governor Bob McDonnell, Susan Allen, Delegates AC Cordoza and Karen Greenhalgh, Christie New Craig for Senate, other candidates, and supporters there as well. Thank you and happy birthday Mr. Speaker!
---
| Goochland Gun Works Grand Opening
---
|
---
|
---
| We attended the Goochland Gun Works grand opening in Goochland County. Goochland Gun Works is a full-service retail gun shop located in Beautiful Goochland County Virginia. Considering Democrat efforts at the local, state, and federal level to infringe on our right to defend ourselves, I suggest you stock up on ammo and buy a gun.
---
| Bone Frog Open
---
|
---
A few of my brother Frogmen, Long Live the Brotherhood!
---
|
---
Tracy and I made a new friend; Tim Watson is a singer and fiddle player based in Nashville who's played shows with stars ranging from Tammy Wynette to Kid Rock. Thank you Tim for supporting our military. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XMgjCm3TmCW9-CBnQdzXA8p75f5NW3L5paDt6R6x7wX8TigAHGy0lWIHh4k68C_tU78dDtLbdH6wf40sSRK7U-7SCaAUzogbV5R0DVQCX2fc2mrOJBrd7b1a5udk2cUuxpiEGvKjh4bXFQEMT_H4rg==&c=xfRQr-1zthFX25Uy9MQUDLHyvqKlF8TGDfdGGDNXSwEO-oaDp9-zOA==&ch=tmXKrHUGLcjxaR6EltDtFFKdmIM2swYm46z1U4TpdLqoR-Of2PnKVw==)

|

|

|

| My best friend Tracy McGuire
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XMgjCm3TmCW9-CBnQdzXA8p75f5NW3L5paDt6R6x7wX8TigAHGy0lWIHh4k68C_ttM0xhKyEQfobnf8gPaIFHxNTo7_C7m0FsPgfouz_30XHiiOxFyFdREUzU9AsEoQXXpGQBO68FfidPojR0uk-35RH-8w-0gRH_for8-arXLsMyA4R3rG5jcApbzssz2NV-VzIX7Hzfcbr9wJVN2qGcPW5VS-fJvLiTJomHpcpItA=&c=xfRQr-1zthFX25Uy9MQUDLHyvqKlF8TGDfdGGDNXSwEO-oaDp9-zOA==&ch=tmXKrHUGLcjxaR6EltDtFFKdmIM2swYm46z1U4TpdLqoR-Of2PnKVw==)
---
Some gave their all for us. This is my friend and fellow Navy SEAL brother, killed in Afghanistan, [Brian Ouellette.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XMgjCm3TmCW9-CBnQdzXA8p75f5NW3L5paDt6R6x7wX8TigAHGy0lWIHh4k68C_ttM0xhKyEQfobnf8gPaIFHxNTo7_C7m0FsPgfouz_30XHiiOxFyFdREUzU9AsEoQXXpGQBO68FfidPojR0uk-35RH-8w-0gRH_for8-arXLsMyA4R3rG5jcApbzssz2NV-VzIX7Hzfcbr9wJVN2qGcPW5VS-fJvLiTJomHpcpItA=&c=xfRQr-1zthFX25Uy9MQUDLHyvqKlF8TGDfdGGDNXSwEO-oaDp9-zOA==&ch=tmXKrHUGLcjxaR6EltDtFFKdmIM2swYm46z1U4TpdLqoR-Of2PnKVw==)

|
---
Thank you Goochland Fire/ Rescue!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| It was an honor to be invited to join my brother SEALs at the 2023 Bone Frog Open. The Bone Frog Open was established in 2019. This golf weekend is about awareness, remembrance, patriotism, camaraderie, and fun. The goal is to celebrate legacies and raise money to support military, first responders, and their families as a way of doing our part to thank these men and women for being the ones to run toward danger, not away from it. [Learn more here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XMgjCm3TmCW9-CBnQdzXA8p75f5NW3L5paDt6R6x7wX8TigAHGy0lQY2IxnL1QwYpMDqa-vVNkHcXTZm5UFonVTm9KFgfDKi8f801iFq9H0hNayNR-chPQV-xCg0VcFy16J7W0WzYS_yDv-nkwWlMIgx3leOS7Kb&c=xfRQr-1zthFX25Uy9MQUDLHyvqKlF8TGDfdGGDNXSwEO-oaDp9-zOA==&ch=tmXKrHUGLcjxaR6EltDtFFKdmIM2swYm46z1U4TpdLqoR-Of2PnKVw==)

clean_body: | | | | | | == | "It really is amazing what we can achieve when we work as a team!" -John McGuire | 17 Days To Go! | | Friends, We have just 17 days to go. The Democrats want to tax and spend and us out of existence. Together, we can vote them out. Everything we care about such as the sanctity of life, our 2nd Amendment, law and order, our economy, right to work, education, and more are at stake on your last day to vote, November 7. Specifically, if you know anyone who lives in Henrico County, please ask them to vote to re-elect Senator Siobhan Dunnavant, David Owens for Delegate, and Riley Shaia for Delegate. All across Virginia, please remind family members, neighbors, and friends to vote Republican! Volunteers Wanted Election Day: We need volunteers to help on election day. If you can help, please email us your name, phone #, and county to john@mcguireforvirginia.com ==. Go to == and enter your address to find out who's on your ballot, where to vote, and more. While campaigning all over the place, I am keeping my ears open and listening to your ideas on how we can improve Virginia. The following is some of what is on my mind and what we have been up to: | Retired Israeli General Rescues Family/ Others | | A Real Hero: A grandfather and retired IDF general rescued his granddaughters from their kibbutz as Hamas attacked in Israel. == | Two McGuire Brothers on the Ballot | | | | It is an honor to be on the ballot this year with my younger brother, Louisa County Commonwealth Attorney and National Guard Colonel, Rusty McGuire. Louisa County is one of ten counties in Senate District Ten. Thank you Rusty and other law enforcement folks along with other first responders for all you do to keep Louisa County safe! | A Powerful Message, We Need Each Other | == | A powerful message we could all use== | Governor Youngkin Speaks at Jewish Temple | | | | remarks at the Kenseth Beth Israel Temple. Thank you Governor and team for your efforts to fight antisemitism. It is good to see so many friends showing support for Israel during this difficult time to include == and his family, ==, ==, ==, ==, and more. | Song of the Day, Carrie Underwood The Champion ft Ludacris | == | For a little inspiration, click this video link and watch the Song of the Day, == | Marcie Clifton Bonfire Louisa County | | | | | | | Thank you James Thornton, Louisa Tea Party, for keeping us informed on FB! | Buckingham GOP Chair and fellow Trump supporter Ramona Christian. | | | | My brother and Louisa Commonwealth Attorney Rusty McGuire, fellow Delegate Buddy Fowler and I had a wonderful time at the Fleshman Farm Bonfire in Louisa County. Thank you Marcie, Roger, and Harvey for an incredible evening. It was good to see Supervisor Rachel Jones and her family. We met some wonderful people and the home made chili was amazing! | Happy Birthday US Navy! | | Since October 13, 1775, Happy Birthday to the worlds finest Navy, the United States Navy! | Railroad Festival Appomattox County | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | My friend Monte Mays. | | An American World War 2 Sniper Vintage Portable Field Cook Stove on display at == How cool is that? | | | We had a wonderful time celebrating with you in Appomattox County. The Historic Appomattox Railroad Festival was established in 1972. It is a family-friendly festival to celebrate the heritage and history of Appomattox County and its citizens. | Granny Bees Restaurant Appomattox County | | | We ran into some wonderful people at one our favorite spots in Appomattox County, Granny Bees Restaurant. Thank you Batina for always making us feel welcome! | Buckingham County | | We ran into Supervisor Don Mathews running for re-election in Buckingham County. Every vote counts, so please spread the word! | Speaker Todd Gilbert Event VA Beach | | | | | Delegate Todd Gilbert along with many others are working hard to ensure we keep the majority in the House and flip the Senate. It was good to see many folks who love Virginia like Governor Bob McDonnell, Susan Allen, Delegates AC Cordoza and Karen Greenhalgh, Christie New Craig for Senate, other candidates, and supporters there as well. Thank you and happy birthday Mr. Speaker! | Goochland Gun Works Grand Opening | | | We attended the Goochland Gun Works grand opening in Goochland County. Goochland Gun Works is a full-service retail gun shop located in Beautiful Goochland County Virginia. Considering Democrat efforts at the local, state, and federal level to infringe on our right to defend ourselves, I suggest you stock up on ammo and buy a gun. | Bone Frog Open | A few of my brother Frogmen, Long Live the Brotherhood! | Tracy and I made a new friend; Tim Watson is a singer and fiddle player based in Nashville who's played shows with stars ranging from Tammy Wynette to Kid Rock. Thank you Tim for supporting our military. == | | | | | My best friend Tracy McGuire == Some gave their all for us. This is my friend and fellow Navy SEAL brother, killed in Afghanistan, == | Thank you Goochland Fire/ Rescue! | | | | | | | It was an honor to be invited to join my brother SEALs at the 2023 Bone Frog Open. The Bone Frog Open was established in 2019. This golf weekend is about awareness, remembrance, patriotism, camaraderie, and fun. The goal is to celebrate legacies and raise money to support military, first responders, and their families as a way of doing our part to thank these men and women for being the ones to run toward danger, not away from it. == | Supervisor Sue Dibble Hanover | | | | | | | | | Delegate Buddy Fowler and I enjoyed talking with folks at Supervisor Sue Dibbles event in Hanover County. I appreciate the kind words from my friend and colleague Delegate Lee Ware. Jim Jordan is out as the GOP nominee for Speaker of the House. After twenty five Republicans voted against Jordan on the House floor Friday, the GOP conference decided by secret ballot to remove Jordan's nomination.

# Saturday, October 21, 2023
---|---
**Welcome to the weekend! **On this day in 1879, Thomas Edison was in his laboratory in New Jersey, working on a "short project" to [create an incandescent light bulb](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFutDAQhJ_GdEb2Yuxz4eJv6O5vUyIDC97I4BNeEd3bR6SM0n3STDHzfTzHZ6RMx_Y_7hh4LWOcmS4ctZKgJXSjaZawIgJ2DQZtvXv4ToFtUjAOQDsHywTOwWpR6XUx3nau7-NqbUMBFHRagVa-t0a3k-8nNVv7mCaPaKwwChficrafhQ5OuOZ3ufBs57I3OSTmVxXdPwGDgCGec6IL2-PNtGO9OwKGjPE86NjaKZet_gpBaS1g0Ormm8rM9y39cF5yKnusEheq5ZCZtsRVckKZ4_4SMDRnWF5flDNV64RR2x4p_yzjv0V9BwAA___iIGex) that burned longer and drew less power than the existing model. He hit on the working design on Oct 21st. Thanks for reading _The Flyover _this week! If you have any ideas on how we can make our newsletter better (or just want to say hello), reply to this email or [click here.](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover) If you haven't yet, come check us out on [Facebook](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GtljHgS9mYOjiLZkqdbSMOWJaHCIbBfXvq7Zr9vee9D4u02VOOd1v13ljV2OZ5qWmJ08KTqhOqCcjg4vMyFqyU2TPg9WAJFcHmj3YEBT52EfrBx1MtGrQA-lAC8rkEFArQAW2J6M6b3sPC9HgvWU2JAxwSLXs3WdJ97pyzN_lyXu3lE1mt9b6OIR-EzgKHFtrXZwX9qV8_QICx_eVx3_jyu0QOMrdhUdLOaeDzsLAbZtT_qvV13M_AQAA__9gY1BU). Want to help keep _The Flyover_ airborne? ## House GOP Removes Jordan as Nominee
Jim Jordan [is out](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuxCAQRL8GOixY7PVRUKRxd2lTWhjWZxLOWIazlb-PnCpFpOlmpNF7H_fx7mKK6-PdPcnWOY_O13jQqKQAJUCPLQ92JgLSnKxC09-MloB8sfOMGAh7Q2Sc6VTQstPkexO8w77zPFqQoJUEJU2HrWom003SI96myRC1yFpJIda8N585rnWhOX3ng_bG5ydPdql1K0y_MRgYDOd5Nn4qK53l6hkMKR4kXltwlQqDYcmvQqJs5L5oF0euJP4uxIV0BTSDge82bGdMKRbsWSsfTxfT72_9X8NPAAAA__892V6C) as the GOP nominee for Speaker of the House. After twenty-five Republicans voted against Jordan on the House floor Friday, the GOP conference decided by secret ballot to remove his nomination. It's unclear who will emerge as the new frontrunner for the Speakership--a post now empty since October 3rd--but several prominent Republicans are now [throwing their hat in the ring](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyhCAURb8GOnbwiSgFRRq7TZvSAX3I20VwlOxO_j4T63T3zinOzPm6T3dHifL66Ta0NZTJzZVeODVSQCOgnRRfbEAEbDnaRpt-MK0EzaM1QQatgu_84DoMOMx9D9ovyi3eG-M4WZDQNhIaaTqtmps3nZez1oP3BlFppiQuVMtxexTKNWJIP-WFx20uG0821rqfrP1gMDIYa8RIKf0xBmMsG2Z8n9f8PpHBqECrTnXi-mItu8ilCu_mJ-VVPGgTj3IsLotzR_fEg8HID7vsb0qJTt0zJdfN0WXg9f8YvwEAAP__v01hYQ), including Rep. Kevin Hern, Byron Donalds, and [likely Tom Emmer](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2TpCAUAH8NZljwUEYCg0vM5tILLcDn-Ob4sIAZa__91my8aXfS1f_u691SoPT4ayPObc-r9Y3euErBQXJQ69Bt844IqDqcpTa3ySgBujtmJYy2YvdqlNM4otLaOG8G5SbY5c24jmYQoKQAKcyoB9k7MzrhtZ6cM4iDZoPAjVou_TNTagfu4Su_sfQ-xy7MR2tnZeoPg4XBcl1X711NeNWPZ7BESglrbpbB8sEMlpYjxxix8CO_KvJ6ov2PhaccKdlGOfEnRf7MZbOJFzxfLpC3qfJHPhksXZm386IQqOobG8QjWgo_Oe33O98BAAD__wvAaFQ).
## Two Americans Released by Hamas
A mother and daughter [were released](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu6yAUgOGnwRsWPnYgDAxXurLUIV07Wgc42LQYIkCJ8vZVO3f-l1_fx227YUwx7-94kumhbOh6fNA2CQ4Th3lbBm8CEdA8kJmkVlc9C5DDYZQSwvkgJdjL1VkbFEkfrHLKSW1VGKIBAfMkYBL6IpdptPpihZPyaq0mWiRbBPnYSx0_S8z9oJBe5UF1dOUckjl6vzc2_2OwMljRukzPNu7lJzNY33KnmrHHkjExWIHjSTU6zPworeNOjR-UPD_wxMaxd3RfPLaKlHilRNjIM1hbL_XF5jV6Nv-fxCKkVkIN1fj7M6YUm1RsEfuJMf2O9b-dvgMAAP__0aNqjg) by Hamas terrorists yesterday after being held hostage since October 7th. Judith and Natalie Raanan are from Illinois and were in Israel visiting family during the attack. Both appear [in good health](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAURp_G3ojg8mN7YOiSLV07WhdziW-FTQQoUd--SueOn74zHJ2v23pDznzeP_Eg31NZcev8pFVJAUqAXs0YfSIC0iN55ZZpXrQEN-6eAqhZxqS3WYZ5cuSUNWhxitrMS0wje5CglQQlF-uMuoTFBrk5N4ewEBk3GEmRe6mX78Jn3ynln_KketnKMWa_9_5og_4Y4DrAFR8nvdr7eo_aecs0wHUvreOdmqiUCRtFwa0iZbHjgU28sArOmc_CTUBCjQRaS22UswrQWTDBTGAtuGkbq4-P1xtvbhqMvB_I-U-m_9_mNwAA__-p_mP1), but little is known about what they experienced while being held captive. They are in Tel Aviv reuniting with family and are expected back in the US next week. Hamas, which killed 1,400 people during its surprise attack in southern Israel, said [it released the prisoners](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAUhH8N3rAAYxIGhi7e0rWj9YCX5LUYIqCx0l9fuXPXO-n03fdxWS9AifLtHTZ0_VpWCJ2euErBleRqWvUQ3RVR4TSgk8aeznYSygx3B0YZbUQ4zSHOKEHIgFKGyUsbvZB6IKeEmqRQUtjZaDl6O3sRjDl7bxG1YVpgpF7q-Fko9zte06s8sY6hbENy994fjU1vTC1MLfu-jxW_O9Z29EdSaopMLZ4iZt4Qv7inlKjkxjdK1KG-OFDk1Cpg4pSf0KhkfoMf4BmhNn4Q8uOsYGoZqouP_Zho5sS0uG1A6Q-m_-_mNwAA__8ka2XU) "..._for humanitarian reasons, and to prove to the American people and the world that the claims made by Biden and his fascist administration are false and baseless."_
## Tech Titan Outed as FBI Informant
Tech investor Peter Thiel became a "[confidential human source](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAUheGnsbdrAbZxGBi6ZEvXjhbgS7gRhghwrL591XTtdJYzfPq_buvNUKR0_zQ76ubzalyjF66cgeAgxnXqN-0RBY49ai7VclEjE7IPWk1sdPNFSr4sSvnFzdw6pxzznqtNLD1pwcTImeBMzXLig1WzZU7Ki7UKcZLdxHCjlsvwyJRaQB-_8wvL4PLeRx1ae9Zu_OjEtRPX8zwHe1RKWCulStvfrxPXJzYs0AJhBG8JKPlcdpMauGBKxAqPHFLN6b2mBZPAHrsBFyrcMdFR4VcKnPVFb8-TYqQql25i991QfHPa_3V-AgAA__9nxmg0)" for the FBI in 2021, according to a source. Thiel is known for being a co-founder of _Paypal, _a successful venture capitalist, and a major GOP donor--and now he's been identified as an FBI informant. His value to the FBI excludes his political contacts, according to the source, and is focused rather on [illicit foreign business influence](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFutDAQhJ_GdEbrNZhz4eJv6O5vUyIwa9jIYORzDuXtI6dOMxp9Go1G8_GcnjNHPrf_80GuhDTNvvCbJgUSlUQ9dc3qAhGSbsgpY4eH1YCm2R3MvluD700IA_SIWnkM5gHDYkIfBmjYIaBWgApsbzrVLrZfwBvzWBZL1BnRAa1cUm4_E59lpxC_05ty69PRRLeXcr2E_idwFDje992Wnd6UN6oBgWOtFzgqqGIr0Bb10Fd7UaEsy84UZVhY8hlSPuazyJAy8XZWEr_o9CQzXSmXJrv1ujlGfplBdLAdM8ffKeXvZ34CAAD___UpY1Q) in the American technology world. The report suggests that Charles Johnson, a long-time associate of Thiel and the person who allegedly connected him with the FBI, was upset with Theil for not investing in Johnson's startups and outed him as an informant in retaliation.

| Flying together with: [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQRL9m6UDrXWMfhYtIiO5SRUqJbFgfjrgDgXNR_j5ylDLNjEYzxdO8X8erT2t63F79XVyO2-innJ4yKqxJ1cSjrmYXRUi4EqdMZy8dI5lqceIpom7Zh8iTiWrGyFqsJavFePFVcoTECklh1xqtmtC1ASdjLiF0ItqARplT3o7mY0uPvEhcv7enHM203avVLTnvJ_AL0AA0xNA8fGHbfV7KAmg45iLNvuzAw5lm4F6hskBm_wzAPWlsLQOZSZX0R1O_DTEdZ65ti6Uj4L44A_fV4eb9K61rOo0Fjbe7T-svT_7_np8AAAD__wV_X6o) Constant aching and discomfort in your feet even when you've tried everything: normal exercise, drink enough water, and wear supportive shoes... And could result in serious clots or devastating cardiac events. Fortunately, [Swiss doctors found](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQRL9m6UDrXWMfhYtIiO5SRUqJbFgfjrgDgXNR_j5ylDLNjEYzxdO8X8erT2t63F79XVyO2-innJ4yKqxJ1cSjrmYXRUi4EqdMZy8dI5lqceIpom7Zh8iTiWrGyFqsJavFePFVcoTECklh1xqtmtC1ASdjLiF0ItqARplT3o7mY0uPvEhcv7enHM203avVLTnvJ_AL0AA0xNA8fGHbfV7KAmg45iLNvuzAw5lm4F6hskBm_wzAPWlsLQOZSZX0R1O_DTEdZ65ti6Uj4L44A_fV4eb9K61rOo0Fjbe7T-svT_7_np8AAAD__wV_X6o) that seniors with high levels of a ["hidden" antarctic nutrient](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQRL9m6UDrXWMfhYtIiO5SRUqJbFgfjrgDgXNR_j5ylDLNjEYzxdO8X8erT2t63F79XVyO2-innJ4yKqxJ1cSjrmYXRUi4EqdMZy8dI5lqceIpom7Zh8iTiWrGyFqsJavFePFVcoTECklh1xqtmtC1ASdjLiF0ItqARplT3o7mY0uPvEhcv7enHM203avVLTnvJ_AL0AA0xNA8fGHbfV7KAmg45iLNvuzAw5lm4F6hskBm_wzAPWlsLQOZSZX0R1O_DTEdZ65ti6Uj4L44A_fV4eb9K61rOo0Fjbe7T-svT_7_np8AAAD__wV_X6o) had significantly lowered blood-flow risks. This nutrient has been [scientifically proven](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQRL9m6UDrXWMfhYtIiO5SRUqJbFgfjrgDgXNR_j5ylDLNjEYzxdO8X8erT2t63F79XVyO2-innJ4yKqxJ1cSjrmYXRUi4EqdMZy8dI5lqceIpom7Zh8iTiWrGyFqsJavFePFVcoTECklh1xqtmtC1ASdjLiF0ItqARplT3o7mY0uPvEhcv7enHM203avVLTnvJ_AL0AA0xNA8fGHbfV7KAmg45iLNvuzAw5lm4F6hskBm_wzAPWlsLQOZSZX0R1O_DTEdZ65ti6Uj4L44A_fV4eb9K61rOo0Fjbe7T-svT_7_np8AAAD__wV_X6o) to:
* Reduce your risk of developing dangerous blood clots by over 60%
* Clear "high-risk" plaque from your arteries
* Effectively lower triglycerides & cholesterol (High levels of triglycerides have been linked with fatty build-up in the artery walls.)

After twenty five Republicans voted against Jordan on the House floor Friday, the GOP conference decided by secret ballot to remove Jordan's nomination. | | | | | | Saturday, October 21, 2023 ---|--- Welcome to the weekend! On this day in 1879, Thomas Edison was in his laboratory in New Jersey, working on a "short project" to that burned longer and drew less power than the existing model. He hit on the working design on Oct 21st. Thanks for reading The Flyover this week! If you have any ideas on how we can make our newsletter better (or just want to say hello), reply to this email or mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover If you haven't yet, come check us out on . Want to help keep The Flyover airborne? Check out our sponsor, . | House GOP Removes Jordan as Nominee Jim Jordan as the GOP nominee for Speaker of the House. After twenty-five Republicans voted against Jordan on the House floor Friday, the GOP conference decided by secret ballot to remove his nomination. It's unclear who will emerge as the new frontrunner for the Speakership--a post now empty since October 3rd--but several prominent Republicans are now , including Rep. Kevin Hern, Byron Donalds, and . Two Americans Released by Hamas A mother and daughter by Hamas terrorists yesterday after being held hostage since October 7th. Judith and Natalie Raanan are from Illinois and were in Israel visiting family during the attack. Both appear , but little is known about what they experienced while being held captive. They are in Tel Aviv reuniting with family and are expected back in the US next week. Hamas, which killed 1,400 people during its surprise attack in southern Israel, said "...for humanitarian reasons, and to prove to the American people and the world that the claims made by Biden and his fascist administration are false and baseless." Tech Titan Outed as FBI Informant Tech investor Peter Thiel became a "" for the FBI in 2021, according to a source. Thiel is known for being a co-founder of Paypal, a successful venture capitalist, and a major GOP donor--and now he's been identified as an FBI informant. His value to the FBI excludes his political contacts, according to the source, and is focused rather on in the American technology world. The report suggests that Charles Johnson, a long-time associate of Thiel and the person who allegedly connected him with the FBI, was upset with Theil for not investing in Johnson's startups and outed him as an informant in retaliation. His latest attempt was a bit obvious, so instead of calling the hospital, the restaurant staff called the police. The latest report brings the total incident count up to 801, though a former F-18 pilot says the events are "grossly underreported." name: Bob Carlstrom
subject: The Cabal Destroying America
body:
Remember when there was peace in the Middle East and Europe

| |
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675a495b8c5c4353a7d5762b5198903e&_e=AsyqoHXWRl3qfGif-WcdzRAersrRUOrx5Jz2QlmRpOgyHT9jPUCCQbMk6X2fSvp3lBtDCjisekqQkOb7Z38t9vpD7ouS1uAlBiPW-__Ja2ymiZ5ovbYTuRD5Y4XVuL9bdGhloOzz9ZSdMwq6rD-lTL2j9q97UYm905FjSJgWjttktz3PNTrLjI5uQxP6f2sABePQMXlYt3XobYtoWoP0cNvqlXuFDOjgSdMfnS5Wwl3eODKlc5d0oHW2C5vX6LJKXpeiEFWe2SHfm48z5TbXFAGH36CKm7yHR_PaTpODBB88eIrK57CFfLuyrMgl3HHVnBvX0WDLXvz796Srlw8nnA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American, Remember when gas prices were under $1.50 per gallon? Remember when there was peace in the Middle East and Europe and our allies and adversaries alike respected the United States? Remember when our southern border was secure, and law and order prevailed in our communities? _Now gas prices are at a 40-year high, the Ukraine has been turned into a warzone, and the crisis at our southern border is the worst it 's ever been. _ But don't be fooled... these things did not happen by accident. They're a direct result of the Obama-Biden plot to destroy the Constitutional underpinnings of our country, to squash the States, and take over every aspect of our lives. And I'm afraid that if folks like you and me don't immediately take action and stand up to them, America will be permanently weakened. **[That's why I'm urgently asking you to join me and AMAC Action to save our country from being destroyed by today's far-Left Democrats.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675a495b8c5c4353a7d5762b5198903e&_e=AsyqoHXWRl3qfGif-WcdzRAersrRUOrx5Jz2QlmRpOgyHT9jPUCCQbMk6X2fSvp3lBtDCjisekqQkOb7Z38t9vpD7ouS1uAlBiPW-__Ja2ymiZ5ovbYTuRD5Y4XVuL9bdGhloOzz9ZSdMwq6rD-lTL2j9q97UYm905FjSJgWjttktz3PNTrLjI5uQxP6f2sAEzcaP7-vYgKXc3nE24RZ6_bXfvn5ViukYBnVQw60MLXRJueztW1PCWnqA6XHPl8wvmoHo0GPfBsHyYNic2qmU75a62hqAttZOnd3v-9iy0lwCGrppAreUBpPrAzHUrr0rEBxaSsCXbREsLTjuWhEwg%3D%3D)** Fellow American, as you know we are not afraid of challenging Obama's leftists plans for our country. _We stood up to President Obama when he tried to socialize our healthcare system with "Obamacare" and "Medicare for All"..._ _We stood up to the Congressional Democrats ' repeated attempts to destroy Social Security and make it insolvent for our generation..._ _And now - with the slew of socialist policies flooding out of Washington D.C. - we're standing up to the Obama-Biden led Democrat Party for trying to shred our Constitution._ Right now, our 75 AMAC Action chapters and 328 delegates are working hard to influence key members of Congress to vote on the issues that will make life easier for our 2.1+ million senior members and to protect our American values. And more than that, we're in the trenches of state and local legislatures throughout the country to impact legislation that will prevent the radically liberal policies coming out of Washington D.C. from devastating our middle class. But that work is easier said than done. Because as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our traditional, conservative values is with the help of generous Americans like yourself. **[Will you help us fight for our America-first values in Congress with a one-time gift of $25, $50, $75, $100 or more to AMAC Action today?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675a495b8c5c4353a7d5762b5198903e&_e=AsyqoHXWRl3qfGif-WcdzRAersrRUOrx5Jz2QlmRpOgyHT9jPUCCQbMk6X2fSvp3lBtDCjisekqQkOb7Z38t9vpD7ouS1uAlBiPW-__Ja2ymiZ5ovbYTuRD5Y4XVuL9bdGhloOzz9ZSdMwq6rD-lTL2j9q97UYm905FjSJgWjttktz3PNTrLjI5uQxP6f2sAOPNIi-hSf6NnFwNV2MDM4G5lkcVRgkhf9FcTpfn7oenXtQGHDu9n6NPzTjilIHERkcOSUIlXtRS-AQTznyIPqA4x8o1dCNuRKF8BuXs48onnerMoDd_XM8ogHu763UC6oLiWWt6FC2CyUchscRTe2w%3D%3D)** Surely, America has seen her fair share of ups and downs, ebbs and flows. _I saw it 40 years ago when I helped President Ronald Reagan bring our country back from Carter's failed leadership - and I saw it a few years ago when I stood next to President Trump as he fought to bring our country back from Obama's failed leadership._ Obama and Joe Biden's disastrous policies and actions have been causing:
---
| | • Record-high unemployment • Increased violent crime • Accelerating inflation • Runaway government spending to be supported by a monstrous and debilitating tax proposal • Fostering illegal immigration; drug smuggling; and human trafficking...
---
| | But that's not all. Behind the scenes, the Democrats are trying to fundamentally transform our Constitutional Republic into a socialist utopia by giving the federal government complete control over our state and local elections, weaking American strength at home and abroad, and helping Big Tech corporations censor anyone who does not share their far-Left world view. And if God-fearing, freedom-loving patriots like you and me do not take immediate action to fight for our beliefs, the country our grandchildren inherit will be radically different from that which we were so blessed to grow up in. **[So, can I count on you to help AMAC Action influence legislators to stop the Leftist Democrats' unconstitutional power-grab with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100 or more today?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675a495b8c5c4353a7d5762b5198903e&_e=AsyqoHXWRl3qfGif-WcdzRAersrRUOrx5Jz2QlmRpOgyHT9jPUCCQbMk6X2fSvp3lBtDCjisekqQkOb7Z38t9vpD7ouS1uAlBiPW-__Ja2ymiZ5ovbYTuRD5Y4XVuL9bdGhloOzz9ZSdMwq6rD-lTL2j9q97UYm905FjSJgWjttktz3PNTrLjI5uQxP6f2sAIkKMVu6R1NF7H22foPLpl0RgCXVh9y7yCt1p9x2k7XstOTiubMteWS6t9JWSlp3WHnVU8npLhLGNbRNw0J2XwwSbb8WyObpOkpDa0BEtbmoRCYvGbd0mFSvs1VB2nMY-59F07u0h5xirpGQ2QZzuUA%3D%3D)** Thank for your generous support.
---
Sincerely,
---
Bob Carlstrom, President AMAC Action
---
[**DONATE**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675a495b8c5c4353a7d5762b5198903e&_e=AsyqoHXWRl3qfGif-WcdzRAersrRUOrx5Jz2QlmRpOgyHT9jPUCCQbMk6X2fSvp3lBtDCjisekqQkOb7Z38t9vpD7ouS1uAlBiPW-__Ja2ymiZ5ovbYTuRD5Y4XVuL9bdGhloOzz9ZSdMwq6rD-lTL2j9q97UYm905FjSJgWjttktz3PNTrLjI5uQxP6f2sAcxRCruX07H4oByKtgqPAsyhnrKG5pzkC5nahFNocoCQTRYfGA8l8qjexY_2g6gzSTP_7R-OTc_JSFl4mTEISSP-eiVZjdYbVEDpsNBpXr5M3ARHFOjzhYnbCUjzjJCR69ZzPuYccvP_fiux6gHGERw%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675a495b8c5c4353a7d5762b5198903e&_e=AsyqoHXWRl3qfGif-WcdzRAersrRUOrx5Jz2QlmRpOiFNPHlICFZbnLBqG-MDq0w0NQ3TTDOn0ukK6D7m9JeJBeLo4ebJ1CflbgFHcir0VS-TI0yLDuXJWuiuzIqG8fQGdXLXtM_Adz7xWta8GFAQ7dOcqpM7sWWW5kLc4kSyX692nyvCFGcv4vnXq9iDWscnGk-Jy7X-rfFD6cDMd2v4x1Hli-mGgTquFAJiGlXJd0%3D)
---
**[Support AMAC Action](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675a495b8c5c4353a7d5762b5198903e&_e=AsyqoHXWRl3qfGif-WcdzRAersrRUOrx5Jz2QlmRpOgyHT9jPUCCQbMk6X2fSvp3lBtDCjisekqQkOb7Z38t9vpD7ouS1uAlBiPW-__Ja2ymiZ5ovbYTuRD5Y4XVuL9bdGhloOzz9ZSdMwq6rD-lTL2j9q97UYm905FjSJgWjttktz3PNTrLjI5uQxP6f2sAiCIYcjMW4aTAzwOTrpV2siFIwtjxYHY_sRFtY-fT0DxrQKkJ9RWdmZ1_E2cwWjQ4P1zc-Ci8ZFVhLKNlB1UpqFsLLMAJ0cNClyjW0kOXHpNGWD6yGOeYGzX3aoEJesJ9qtN4m8R2MvmRF11RRWTP-g%3D%3D)**
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The Dying Citizen
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen?

| | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d0b71a27eef4abc91af4f935c735010&_e=fTMeri-QNR9iAO2jAoihs9vQqpQRdEKyiPpTKek5G1eIbCINuKuw35U8gHpjB1vUwH6CjSCkDVE8JwgtyrEXg-l62-uXKNeH2UIx6ZsYr3UjqJlMwkhWWZxzRcmUxpQtTgv5hdl3B0zo8A_3HluALiDgVMQcHGG-06tqq6bXkzn_IdrKaBz7eioyrAB2c0Un-TPbbaDcJJsod0lkBaoO6JMKezmVB80ZWnv-hhOz1U1wz_HfjqfBge1weHB9WrrVK3tzXAi6Seh9ZF6l6k_VDrZPZ3uldssyxp_WNbJHRtElCuUwRxrwuF4zQ0vWd55vrBWJAqkN6JIAgREH98ORIGEyUgdAvyIz4kr1VarQWQkiuFM4YqJuw23hCR0gXkuuG_is3lhHtnTGQsmgCf2Edtfcq5f8LVMOKy3r_YUK97NTSKMGq60dw8XM95AKJu_U)
---
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you're like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can't say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can't say the same thing even today. You don't have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It's one of our nation's great achievements. But there's a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That's why today I hope you'll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d0b71a27eef4abc91af4f935c735010&_e=fTMeri-QNR9iAO2jAoihs9vQqpQRdEKyiPpTKek5G1eIbCINuKuw35U8gHpjB1vUwH6CjSCkDVE8JwgtyrEXg-l62-uXKNeH2UIx6ZsYr3UjqJlMwkhWWZxzRcmUxpQtTgv5hdl3B0zo8A_3HluALiDgVMQcHGG-06tqq6bXkzn_IdrKaBz7eioyrAB2c0Un-TPbbaDcJJsod0lkBaoO6JMKezmVB80ZWnv-hhOz1U1wz_HfjqfBge1weHB9WrrVK3tzXAi6Seh9ZF6l6k_VDrLiMSA3c3fUaREr9kgk8FfZfpcGH6UnXbWhhtw1Be57XdRVW-1XiWKOhAnDEEBVPpnt3QDNWPQBFWz8fD9SZpJw2K71TjUMa7cXF9j-0TaD5nrcB2skiT6Tn2vUwxemxWY9QFbH-sVPY0-eZwsSr1V37Oe_5_dLJpROseq24YfA)**_
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d0b71a27eef4abc91af4f935c735010&_e=fTMeri-QNR9iAO2jAoihs9vQqpQRdEKyiPpTKek5G1eIbCINuKuw35U8gHpjB1vUwH6CjSCkDVE8JwgtyrEXg-l62-uXKNeH2UIx6ZsYr3UjqJlMwkhWWZxzRcmUxpQtTgv5hdl3B0zo8A_3HluALiDgVMQcHGG-06tqq6bXkzn_IdrKaBz7eioyrAB2c0Un-TPbbaDcJJsod0lkBaoO6JMKezmVB80ZWnv-hhOz1U1wz_HfjqfBge1weHB9WrrVK3tzXAi6Seh9ZF6l6k_VDvx02lbF2j4HQ5MAXubnNx4gsyH7wMKwXDBIx3HuTWumgqwZnQEZTZdxnFrRbJgW3W_XryBOrHrJs4dckG3u4pCXft4Jsk6F1jdj1dWvjqPUZNQuK12eiwFQPO9XQ4OIGLA10Jm1dCj2TRSTQBTW9za_7ssGB4KPmqN1tcqaFNFY)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal **of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses--free of charge. We already reach millions--we must reach hundreds of thousands more.
* **The second vital goal **is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal **is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that _ your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we'll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9d0b71a27eef4abc91af4f935c735010&_e=fTMeri-QNR9iAO2jAoihs9vQqpQRdEKyiPpTKek5G1eIbCINuKuw35U8gHpjB1vUwH6CjSCkDVE8JwgtyrEXg-l62-uXKNeH2UIx6ZsYr3UjqJlMwkhWWZxzRcmUxpQtTgv5hdl3B0zo8A_3HluALiDgVMQcHGG-06tqq6bXkzn_IdrKaBz7eioyrAB2c0Un-TPbbaDcJJsod0lkBaoO6JMKezmVB80ZWnv-hhOz1U1wz_HfjqfBge1weHB9WrrVK3tzXAi6Seh9ZF6l6k_VDk190D30sBQPA4P-u-LcwUS1Ld7P4Pi0jHUlGVrAisbVRV2gRY_PXnxAzO0wXWjMgQq6UMp_WCPujC86NH9XxCsIR8WmFgveVYdAIzZD9ff3925lgkyhsoQErQ8D986iEfg7aYdyJchqeFmhJUURwu1KCeVyFFrPd8bK5bj0EIWy)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you'll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. _Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He's also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, "In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure. " ** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. clean_body: Are you proud to be an American citizen? | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you're like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can't say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can't say the same thing even today. You don't have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It's one of our nation's great achievements. But there's a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain. | | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That's why today I hope you'll support our | | | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals. The first important goal of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through Imprimis , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses--free of charge. We already reach millions--we must reach hundreds of thousands more. The second vital goal is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses. The third critical goal is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum. And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must reach and teach millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that your support is critical to our success. With your help, we'll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. You can give safely and securely at this link: And for a gift of $100 or more, you'll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson's book, The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He's also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, "In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. This book and he are a treasure. " Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach ** | | | | | | Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:
The end is near...And almost nobody is prepared for the chaos that follows.

| **Central Bank: "Final stage" beginning now** [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8149474a547b4f5089c428e7a59bc224&_e=w7-dNCG5snKyd8za4nEkXNzO76kOC1LPQc_raOC07XKzB_RLy2Mhk3JTgvV4GwDHMAwFpviZ2Xfn0NezCke2knU4Wu84gA651vjiz8kWlDdEMEHKrpkzk-t8M_3wt6gp9PAuHly2L4s_mBHp4fW2utABYhmQ0TXjWWN1TscJYzTJKRllQ4zTgPcnB0ycZV0J5mZNRpaWBfRi9WIcaoD2i_5c1FYiSjPU81nzhc5lEPvgaZh1FGakQCmEA6drB0rhyWO5TaAIHp4apmsQiJ8oIEKRcty6iyX0YKYKmIl-2a8%3D) The end is near... Our financial system is about to be transformed in a way that would've been unthinkable just a few years ago. And almost nobody is prepared for the chaos that follows. According to Bank of America, this overhaul is imminent - And Dr. Nomi Prins says the final stage begins in the months ahead, with the rollout of the FedNow system. To show you everything you need to know about the FedNow system - and to help you prepare - Dr. Prins has recorded a free presentation with all the details. It's controversial, but Nomi's interview is a must-watch for anyone with more than $2,500 in an American bank or retirement fund. **[Click here to find out what you need to do to prepare for this historic transformation.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8149474a547b4f5089c428e7a59bc224&_e=w7-dNCG5snKyd8za4nEkXNzO76kOC1LPQc_raOC07XKzB_RLy2Mhk3JTgvV4GwDHMAwFpviZ2Xfn0NezCke2knU4Wu84gA651vjiz8kWlDdEMEHKrpkzk-t8M_3wt6gp9PAuHly2L4s_mBHp4fW2ugrKAPHvj-wOkpVBDbFeYMZwkpHqJaD27Nahy6aIe8zUlAxHurRC9RKLUWYi6Gld7LvwwIk60X-e5KiUNWC8m5K_fACwfwpal0rVwRaQzX5056aocB21DBKbbEWNwI6AEPzkkCsJ_I1-Y7PN1OfUBW4%3D)**

If Texas goes blue, we'll lose everything...** And that would be an unmitigated disaster for America, with at least two more years of high inflation, open borders, and the woke indoctrination of our kids. Make no mistake. Texas is the most crucial battleground state in America in 2024 - and it's a **MUST-WIN** for Republicans. clean_body: If they flip TX blue, we're finished. Read more >> | | | Fellow Conservative I won't sugarcoat it. National Democrats will spend $100 MILLION to flip Texas blue next year. If they succeed, we're finished. It's just that simple. Don 't bother staying up late to see what happens in Georgia or Arizona. If Texas goes blue, we'll lose everything... And that would be an unmitigated disaster for America, with at least two more years of high inflation, open borders, and the woke indoctrination of our kids. Make no mistake. Texas is the most crucial battleground state in America in 2024 - and it's a MUST-WIN for Republicans. That's why I am ramping up my campaign into full gear early. The truth is, the two candidates running for the Democrat nomination to take me on in the general election, Colin Allred, and Roland Gutierrez, aren't moderate Democrats- they're radical leftists and backed by liberal big wigs from Washington, DC. They 're radical leftists who support gun control, oppose our oil and gas industry, promote abortion on demand, want to increase our taxes, and back Biden's open borders policies 100%. Democrat Colin Allred even voted against federal funding for Operation Lone Star, a Texas state program that fights illegal immigration and keeps us all safe. Losing this race isn 't an option - there's too much at stake. And I need your support more than ever. Please pitch in to help us prepare for the do-or-die battle we're facing in 2024! For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | | Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Full Mag News
subject: Citizenship requires vigilance
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen?

| | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f803d548e65b41eb9ba0ed9c98900f32&_e=gHrSIjNwQ4ltwX_JXGyamCiBiupywZ_XRXG_VRPyxJGGVP61vMRDQ2JtNRXTFuTzKZDhTeBaknU3rhtvxFOJEjDkYd2G1T_kPCo7J2BASyygutrK1u_JOI59zArubxG0TpPvwnltjiMPLX_WHgyEPxg8WH8ijwLmQ6RzxvkQmiY4OcGYBpV87lluytQE61YafmLNoZcMNyrTgd7T51s4BRNnXWvkXQDl7OKEp49miHnuZ2MEM62Rx53ICvLFMMiAd57o2K1AGXSDDiYERQ0k6-VNcvREGQP9Okk2efWrmjmu0hFMF8Lngpt-ZmJOmxIP9DuvQ2zBnd-CklfBiPdmlleEjJCq5qxjHjxRrdlKfdau6p810UKjJQv50oGeqCkthSvZvuhztuFcjeF3udcLhQCZbZJHmRpwSXBJi87QYcVbD7XiF6v6bmGc1BOQzR6i)
---
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you're like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can't say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can't say the same thing even today. You don't have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It's one of our nation's great achievements. But there's a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That's why today I hope you'll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f803d548e65b41eb9ba0ed9c98900f32&_e=gHrSIjNwQ4ltwX_JXGyamCiBiupywZ_XRXG_VRPyxJGGVP61vMRDQ2JtNRXTFuTzKZDhTeBaknU3rhtvxFOJEjDkYd2G1T_kPCo7J2BASyygutrK1u_JOI59zArubxG0TpPvwnltjiMPLX_WHgyEPxg8WH8ijwLmQ6RzxvkQmiY4OcGYBpV87lluytQE61YafmLNoZcMNyrTgd7T51s4BRNnXWvkXQDl7OKEp49miHnuZ2MEM62Rx53ICvLFMMiAd57o2K1AGXSDDiYERQ0k6wDE85al1l0oyturz6WIJOU97BBjvUMwyt0MidJ65GnLkrrOrrdhvs1rmhWzJYJx_av7k9aI3CGCHd89JDW91qqR9X_Um6Hak37tGRnASr8TC4v4X-AD2KV3AXPoa-rU3m7-GPQMyQL7g5Cd_DY83gJQFr_DiLH9zlUqh__lAkFR)**_
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f803d548e65b41eb9ba0ed9c98900f32&_e=gHrSIjNwQ4ltwX_JXGyamCiBiupywZ_XRXG_VRPyxJGGVP61vMRDQ2JtNRXTFuTzKZDhTeBaknU3rhtvxFOJEjDkYd2G1T_kPCo7J2BASyygutrK1u_JOI59zArubxG0TpPvwnltjiMPLX_WHgyEPxg8WH8ijwLmQ6RzxvkQmiY4OcGYBpV87lluytQE61YafmLNoZcMNyrTgd7T51s4BRNnXWvkXQDl7OKEp49miHnuZ2MEM62Rx53ICvLFMMiAd57o2K1AGXSDDiYERQ0k65B0nMCz95voG-jsegGUjpDKMcc1B5FFfiUQloeqKjhCLh36NkcJWT57u6_dbnZXH1GsdcqT4zqeEwm0jCMQYkkUdwrUtRkqEnqdvTO5NuEGf_c52XATceMIvivhpF_iy0azeYUwqoT11gTwJFvOztS6hZ4wTCLwuBkCPJb_DBSg)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal **of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses--free of charge. We already reach millions--we must reach hundreds of thousands more.
* **The second vital goal **is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal **is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that _ your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we'll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f803d548e65b41eb9ba0ed9c98900f32&_e=gHrSIjNwQ4ltwX_JXGyamCiBiupywZ_XRXG_VRPyxJGGVP61vMRDQ2JtNRXTFuTzKZDhTeBaknU3rhtvxFOJEjDkYd2G1T_kPCo7J2BASyygutrK1u_JOI59zArubxG0TpPvwnltjiMPLX_WHgyEPxg8WH8ijwLmQ6RzxvkQmiY4OcGYBpV87lluytQE61YafmLNoZcMNyrTgd7T51s4BRNnXWvkXQDl7OKEp49miHnuZ2MEM62Rx53ICvLFMMiAd57o2K1AGXSDDiYERQ0k61GtV0S5C8COTYFVe2SN14GlVvN1rViUdeyfOuz8f4fAZFOf2Ni_mKl3K7qCmoFnFa5tXLLLycPQN94ksZtW-yqDDakkZq1-JHhIXwACoBzL4sndV4iD6nVWApPs34O_qihXNG4gdUHaCKL97tx2ljH2k59YmyFm-c0XeEMlQzM0)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you'll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. _Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He's also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, "In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure. " ** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f803d548e65b41eb9ba0ed9c98900f32&_e=gHrSIjNwQ4ltwX_JXGyamCiBiupywZ_XRXG_VRPyxJGGVP61vMRDQ2JtNRXTFuTzKZDhTeBaknU3rhtvxFOJEjDkYd2G1T_kPCo7J2BASyygutrK1u_JOI59zArubxG0TpPvwnltjiMPLX_WHgyEPxg8WH8ijwLmQ6RzxvkQmiY4OcGYBpV87lluytQE61YafmLNoZcMNyrTgd7T51s4BRNnXWvkXQDl7OKEp49miHnuZ2MEM62Rx53ICvLFMMiAd57o2K1AGXSDDiYERQ0k6_TadRV61_BuQgUpGGssHaIJeIY4QVU8wYCscR40URXnnkkRVPnlvj33D0REjVaKNCbOaMjmsUp9V51e9nURCPRjjv10lVjzksuw2qn8cclIeuCDrMlybNzdBxKLmn79z8rOSMQHRJgB2hQs3BRCfLUoLgmFsBAa_y98Z4ZMxFf1)**

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Stop greedy companies from destroying public lands for profit
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2064827?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | ***PUBLIC COMMENT DEADLINE: November 6th*** **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Cancel Nevada public lands lease sale to corporate frackers before our precious public lands are forever changed!** **Imagine your home invaded by the foul odor of rotten eggs.** It slithers in through your windows and settles in like an unwanted guest. It’s not just the smell. There’s noise, too. A distant pounding of high-pressure water SMASHING into the Earth, over and over again. This is what it would be like to live close to fracking operations, Friend. Air and water pollution. Horrific smells. Constant battering noises. It’s no wonder some people experience splitting headaches. The Department of Interior has announced a new lease sale of **THOUSANDS of ACRES** public lands in Nevada’s Battle Mountain District. If it moves forward, the highest corporate bidder will get a pass to frack on our public lands, including near Nevada communities. [**Please, Friend, sign our petition and help STOP corporate polluters from fracking for profit on precious Nevada public lands!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2064828?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2064829?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Some of the communities near the proposed lease sales include large Tribal and low-income populations. These are the Nevadans who could be exposed to _**TOXIC POLLUTION**_ and potentially _**RADIOACTIVE WASTEWATER**_ from fracking.
The Battle Mountain District in Nevada is also home to vulnerable species, including the **threatened desert tortoise** and the **endangered Southwestern willow flycatcher** – and giant metal fracking rigs won’t do these poor creatures any favors. [**We need 5,389 more signatures by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to hit our goal and help PROTECT Nevadans and wildlife from fossil fuel destruction. Sign now!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2064830?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2064831?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Fossil fuels program manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

body:
AI stocks are crushing the market right now.

| Dear Reader, AI stocks are crushing the market right now. Nvidia jumped 246% just this year... Upstart soared 496%.. And BigBear.ai exploded 737%. But according to one of America's foremost tech experts (his firm recommended Nvidia back in 2016)... Another AI company is about to take the stock market by storm... and make early investors huge gains. As of this morning, 19 Wall Street billionaires already own shares. **[Will this stock make history as the hottest AI play of 2023?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4766d75bf71f45829d39ce1cf2470917&_e=0Ppk0junx102vJrm-oD_YYi5scyHnnT_5d5TjVM2E5kpW1GeJyrhf_Ki3nOih5W5EwHZ9xUO_dURsznFzJ_PJDqmLxqG5ew_sNtl3sjfIHmXrhcDYtVkNwiXOlgQGREDkbIEvTIsh51Ex7emwcL4_fnoBhNZWEOnrf0o6k7K7P6SGbpzJNmT2_evYzecMukKMUViF5IYR9Pb2PfMOHyJZLP1qzKJEq4XFiHBxKtWwNL8Lcb2XWXi-dFjyaVFJ1WzyQm77hcN9iblDSrU3imFaozbKdMVwzXYoXOKsSNMwL0%3D)** Chris Lowe
