clean_body: AI stocks are crushing the market right now. | Dear Reader, AI stocks are crushing the market right now. Nvidia jumped 246% just this year... Upstart soared 496%.. And BigBear.ai exploded 737%. But according to one of America's foremost tech experts (his firm recommended Nvidia back in 2016)... Another AI company is about to take the stock market by storm... and make early investors huge gains. As of this morning, 19 Wall Street billionaires already own shares. Chris Lowe Managing Editor,Brownstone Research Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

| | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PxHca7SW0V7Yz_G51berbHRRQogAdSl0341SCQxVf8DzjyGFt-ytEkEGPipbRhtirOi1AX-Xc2e_L95YA2nElwtqOFNvYGgxCf8hd4Aw76RsZAlkqBUU1bBCbn30lkpz0lB5PkzG5I8JjDl2NcprBiAwjOsEOSBG&c=I22oqvvBh2Auma38StYKOQTvQNfjfe7Je0w4GYbr3U9SrfZukYh4Hw==&ch=18KETRp_Jv4Od4mcoEpeCvYz0Krk9A0xCpjUYjTFA8Z1G5RaRMxDeg==)
---

---
|
---
| Monrovia, MD - Stephen R. McDow II Suspends Maryland US Congressional race to return to Massachusetts
It is with sadness I suspend my efforts to seek the Maryland 6th Congressional seat currently held by Representative David Trone. The needs in the district are real and unlike all the other candidates we listened to the people of the 6th. Together we developed 24 policy objectives and know we are well positioned to win. The needs in the 6th are not about left versus right. Rather, they are about widening educational access points; supporting and uplifting small businesses, stamping out human trafficking, and more!
I enjoyed engaging with small business owners, laborers, unions like Local 616, IBEW and the Frederick Teachers Association, as well as the Women's Rights Coalition, Angela Batista, Judy Carbone and the Garrett County Democrats and all the stakeholders who make democracy work in Maryland. I remain humbled by our endorsement by the Forward Party and personally speaking on a virtual panel with former Presidential candidate Andrew Yang. Also, I'm energized by the fact that Andrew was inspired to give based on my authenticity and originality. As a Democrat endorsed by Forward, I knew this new affiliation would position me as more of an Independent thinker. I didn't know it would cause such deep consternation amongst the establishment. As matter of principle, I should say that I reject the aggression and hostility experienced by my wife and I at the hands of Democrats - a party that my family helped build. I am profoundly concerned with the treatment delivered to us by Black Democrats. As a Christian, I forgive you and look forward to our return to the Massachusetts state family.
My decision to leave the race is not easy with victory feeling so close. However, I made a promise to Rebecca and my family that above all they come first. Rebecca has accepted a position with Army Command and Intelligence in Massachusetts and we will return as a family to my 5-generation family home on Martha's Vineyard. During this time, I will focus on ensuring our teen boys transition back to island life, my wife adjusts back to New England life; and I engage with the citizens of the Cape and Islands, Boston metro, and across Massachusetts.
Returning to Massachusetts and New England feels more home now than ever - Especially since both my family homes in Washington, DC are no longer occupied or owned by family. We have deep roots in Massachusetts and look forward to reconnecting and boldly moving forward together.

Best,
Stephen R. McDow II & Committee To Elect Stephen McDow
---

Justice Alito Worries Majority’s Decision To Pause Ruling Against
Biden Admin Will Give Govt ‘Green Light’ To Censor

Justice Samuel Alito said Friday that the Supreme Court majority’s
decision to pause a lower court injunction blocking the Biden
administration from coercing social media companies to censor speech
may be perceived as giving a “green light” to the government’s use of
“heavy handed tactics” to suppress speech.

SCOTUS Won’t Lift Block On Red State Law Preventing Police From
Enforcing Federal Gun Laws

The Supreme Court declined Friday to allow a Missouri law preventing
local law enforcement officials from enforcing federal gun laws to
take effect. The state asked the justices early October to block a
federal court’s ruling against its Second Amendment Preservation Act,
which exposes local police that aid in the enforcement of certain
federal gun laws to up to $50,000 [...]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Green Energy – Folly or the Future?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/greenenergy?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Former White House adviser Mark Mills was in Jackson this week, speaking at a packed event that we hosted jointly with Bigger Pie Forum.**

It was wonderful to see several members of our state legislature and Public Service Commissioners attend and ask questions.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2b3a694ca5&e=5703353baa)
---
Click on the photo above to watch Mark Mills speak
_Packed public meeting, pertinent questions_
| **The federal government is determined to reduce America’s carbon dioxide emissions, encouraging us to switch from hydrocarbons to renewable energy. **But what are the implications?

**Mark Mills, a senior fellow at the Manhattan Institute, has an encyclopedic knowledge, and he laid out the bare facts about what switching to renewables would actually mean. **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=79664cdd8d&e=5703353baa)
---
_Listen on Spotify now_
| America will need to install thousands of new giant wind turbines not every year, but each week, if we are to meet the renewable targets Washington DC wants.

At the same time, he suggested, we will need to cover a vast area in solar paneling and build dozens of new nuclear plants each year.
---
|
---
_How to ensure low cost, reliable energy for Mississippi?_
| **Transitioning to renewables might seem like a bright idea in DC. Unless the federal government knows how to change the laws of physics, they are simply not going to be able to transition the way they want. **

In order to make Americans switch to driving electric vehicles a vast number of charging stations will have to be built to replace gas stations. Each of these charging stations will eventually require the same amount of electricity as a steel mill.

**Mark Mills showed that many politicians simply have not thought through the implications of the policies they want to impose on the rest of us.**
---
|
---
_Our monthly Speaker Series events are open to everyone!_
| In recent years, Mississippi has been successful at attracting inward investment. One of the reasons manufacturers chose our state is low cost, reliable energy. We need to keep things that way.

**Mills cited the example of Germany as a warning. Politicians in Europe rushed into renewable energy, and in doing so pushed up the cost of energy.** This has effectively priced the German economy out of world markets, resulting in a loss of manufacturing capacity.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2159edb007&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| **PS. FREEDOM STUDIES AT OLE MISS!** Something remarkable is happening at Ole Miss. A new minor in Freedom Studies has started up under the brilliant Steven Skultety.

Classes in ‘Liberty & the Founding’, and ‘Liberty & Economics’ are now open to lots of students, with contributions from professors at Hillsdale.

**_Do you know any young folk at Ole Miss that would benefit from taking part in this program? Get them to take these classes! _**
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=33de1320b6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=33de1320b6).

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Citizenship requires vigilance
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen?

| | This sponsored message from Defending the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=486b1e46ec0a43c2a92d5718f5c22deb&_e=hYE71wstvGSFPKRz3ESDffl0Yxm2gPW_4sxJ_Ie8jpzx_SlDvxveCv6doF9twsrJPJCzEQgUCm_vD9rjiV1Ui0FTldO5-IIPbf7dVkx6wuNA0xf0KExAK10zRHCS3f6wtbh5jKzMcns150shSU-sDC-M5yB57p9rVGZcTR4EvfMAdcqOMg3nytpCbQKobv_Bwmic6QgtBbSoDgOgZody_ptmXO8ZblTIeDBnHZuWRMu8Z-4SLufg9oU4v2NVFms1qCmryKiIA9fHv1sy3oKAXJf7rqVQbHYK9CctuMV4WsDaLLQdEoo_5f6Ap-SO0WmBD9Obwzif2c1-dJioB55G3M52hOdKM6AUTcJLBdfd2OHTo11EWeXl3YC3hpVCNYdwFIHP_j96Kb7HmTOdcno-iW5XP4PtlVzFlRPLfucO1MzUdJwTTfgLHO6WP6t4DPOx)
---
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you're like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can't say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can't say the same thing even today. You don't have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It's one of our nation's great achievements. But there's a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That's why today I hope you'll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=486b1e46ec0a43c2a92d5718f5c22deb&_e=hYE71wstvGSFPKRz3ESDffl0Yxm2gPW_4sxJ_Ie8jpzx_SlDvxveCv6doF9twsrJPJCzEQgUCm_vD9rjiV1Ui0FTldO5-IIPbf7dVkx6wuNA0xf0KExAK10zRHCS3f6wtbh5jKzMcns150shSU-sDC-M5yB57p9rVGZcTR4EvfMAdcqOMg3nytpCbQKobv_Bwmic6QgtBbSoDgOgZody_ptmXO8ZblTIeDBnHZuWRMu8Z-4SLufg9oU4v2NVFms1qCmryKiIA9fHv1sy3oKAXCZXb3-qJpV_QN_x1UemJhjzqFLjAYlDAYDTToGGqMPFxYcKgtNH9S8fehDQuUKCtJrVZGSwBUOAVh0ruXt7Rx4MlPnLGUuJkUEjsfLOKZscYfQoQ_2SNZrIPzxrF7Dtjqs9fMXV-S22boIH6eo3jPZSX-y2YAYdra3klo_EgG2l)**_
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=486b1e46ec0a43c2a92d5718f5c22deb&_e=hYE71wstvGSFPKRz3ESDffl0Yxm2gPW_4sxJ_Ie8jpzx_SlDvxveCv6doF9twsrJPJCzEQgUCm_vD9rjiV1Ui0FTldO5-IIPbf7dVkx6wuNA0xf0KExAK10zRHCS3f6wtbh5jKzMcns150shSU-sDC-M5yB57p9rVGZcTR4EvfMAdcqOMg3nytpCbQKobv_Bwmic6QgtBbSoDgOgZody_ptmXO8ZblTIeDBnHZuWRMu8Z-4SLufg9oU4v2NVFms1qCmryKiIA9fHv1sy3oKAXMOmmEs7pyCsSLtzw7rx0jU64vibkjw6FiA9jcEEd7m6bcW0c7BjN_Wfeu12DmOmvLRlHKnmuHsPBEkO4L3nAKpPt1uzmHBOKcpn0DXOLnsFPIccOxkanYksXatzK4eDZjhwxXHDMYJ3g36wOs5dGO9C0hjWl6DK6EDVGRSWxB7v)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal **of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses--free of charge. We already reach millions--we must reach hundreds of thousands more.
* **The second vital goal **is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal **is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that _ your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we'll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=486b1e46ec0a43c2a92d5718f5c22deb&_e=hYE71wstvGSFPKRz3ESDffl0Yxm2gPW_4sxJ_Ie8jpzx_SlDvxveCv6doF9twsrJPJCzEQgUCm_vD9rjiV1Ui0FTldO5-IIPbf7dVkx6wuNA0xf0KExAK10zRHCS3f6wtbh5jKzMcns150shSU-sDC-M5yB57p9rVGZcTR4EvfMAdcqOMg3nytpCbQKobv_Bwmic6QgtBbSoDgOgZody_ptmXO8ZblTIeDBnHZuWRMu8Z-4SLufg9oU4v2NVFms1qCmryKiIA9fHv1sy3oKAXLSARz-m6vnHdPuK4DNOGUJFxYpjfu6EIWKkQfhY0VOdBYjsaIxCGJy25lct7Zpvm5a_uxR7FofcTN2HPXUjooOxydFphKFJMoBpYfvDfq6ee5B3CM0A44dy5SKTikE7RuBRqBjJXa1cYRYpcyKDTqYKM95CncqOtwX47HBlwDB3)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you'll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. _Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He's also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, "In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure. " ** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=486b1e46ec0a43c2a92d5718f5c22deb&_e=hYE71wstvGSFPKRz3ESDffl0Yxm2gPW_4sxJ_Ie8jpzx_SlDvxveCv6doF9twsrJPJCzEQgUCm_vD9rjiV1Ui0FTldO5-IIPbf7dVkx6wuNA0xf0KExAK10zRHCS3f6wtbh5jKzMcns150shSU-sDC-M5yB57p9rVGZcTR4EvfMAdcqOMg3nytpCbQKobv_Bwmic6QgtBbSoDgOgZody_ptmXO8ZblTIeDBnHZuWRMu8Z-4SLufg9oU4v2NVFms1qCmryKiIA9fHv1sy3oKAXGY2DL1hAxzuKS06wJdQyeTiSd9uMzv1IWSgx3CfZx5gD4KY4UBzi787hTCJkYjTS8YW6Q9n9uEg8XAm8XUhXaf9Wgby3ypBKeWzL5w13IHtF3uz9UBs13YN41LVMQS6Pee60HVumsV44Ckdr0Pvca1TArA12GzTAA4ejexwjRPq)**

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Free Course! Rediscover the essence of American Citizenship
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen?

| | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b1102c6c9bae4b5885597f49854ab669&_e=PYPpjqsPlhzSV_CwFtrYjBPvXf6xH6MO8NMiR13Rluwbus6_t6jozxbv9E0SnKDxnaRviPiH_GrX7o0KVLH6yOntOLbeZ1fSty3WJmgWAAvTxURkqq95NO7Q1_oukKAb1-L6EohPwGdzkgJJ2jkg0D6irlp-jgeUAN623-06tVator9a9Rt8VlSQ-rsJ_x4rHa90p0q5qrWXr8dyCYnr2FwcIkEq98prGeXWoUldBfxZmdB35TWsOqAVoh5BaYylFbM0cb17KHb3rlB8qfALavpo9_y1nQvCESPC5AVknkhyGwF0UoMlEIDxlUwz8IhhoeplhgTDZ58FTlc6pkRtq9gT3b4CRchhDOeGMd_r4EI6QaFGK1lQjEOo4vrS7jmi58KydmqR-8mL_W2PpQmBCOFq5u0X-d1B-wOExQKAv50vSOcWE4Kh8qddjtyhebip)
---
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you're like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can't say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can't say the same thing even today. You don't have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It's one of our nation's great achievements. But there's a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That's why today I hope you'll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b1102c6c9bae4b5885597f49854ab669&_e=PYPpjqsPlhzSV_CwFtrYjBPvXf6xH6MO8NMiR13Rluwbus6_t6jozxbv9E0SnKDxnaRviPiH_GrX7o0KVLH6yOntOLbeZ1fSty3WJmgWAAvTxURkqq95NO7Q1_oukKAb1-L6EohPwGdzkgJJ2jkg0D6irlp-jgeUAN623-06tVator9a9Rt8VlSQ-rsJ_x4rHa90p0q5qrWXr8dyCYnr2FwcIkEq98prGeXWoUldBfxZmdB35TWsOqAVoh5BaYylFbM0cb17KHb3rlB8qfALauYm8zxF1InWOoS4LJtmMApejTU38bkdTfngieqWxslgPhL58VZhnw37tBq-lga70Lg9HYf5s8n1PU_uZ2UXy9Ra6Ab0lxqt8m_Oj0vlGOXicVa7vKrbvs1H1ZlCqD1HukLkCcakJ6sYHp0XCazNvrBYE6WRbFiTZFIUHGr2vg1m)**_
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b1102c6c9bae4b5885597f49854ab669&_e=PYPpjqsPlhzSV_CwFtrYjBPvXf6xH6MO8NMiR13Rluwbus6_t6jozxbv9E0SnKDxnaRviPiH_GrX7o0KVLH6yOntOLbeZ1fSty3WJmgWAAvTxURkqq95NO7Q1_oukKAb1-L6EohPwGdzkgJJ2jkg0D6irlp-jgeUAN623-06tVator9a9Rt8VlSQ-rsJ_x4rHa90p0q5qrWXr8dyCYnr2FwcIkEq98prGeXWoUldBfxZmdB35TWsOqAVoh5BaYylFbM0cb17KHb3rlB8qfALarJJL8AHsP0JEKn7tVS91CVZwClgxF5zWgQmylyNnOjAjMgnhScbJDTtowcQXXMtyYb3P_7c1M5hQp6rZhUYym-w_OEc7o-9yBujOCBcALGqlIdEwYO-iLdqZmhhFcertTR6AzelyIW_y9-YbDKRH_ad5SXJq7VG7uslsBHugjK_)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal **of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses--free of charge. We already reach millions--we must reach hundreds of thousands more.
* **The second vital goal **is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal **is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that _ your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we'll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b1102c6c9bae4b5885597f49854ab669&_e=PYPpjqsPlhzSV_CwFtrYjBPvXf6xH6MO8NMiR13Rluwbus6_t6jozxbv9E0SnKDxnaRviPiH_GrX7o0KVLH6yOntOLbeZ1fSty3WJmgWAAvTxURkqq95NO7Q1_oukKAb1-L6EohPwGdzkgJJ2jkg0D6irlp-jgeUAN623-06tVator9a9Rt8VlSQ-rsJ_x4rHa90p0q5qrWXr8dyCYnr2FwcIkEq98prGeXWoUldBfxZmdB35TWsOqAVoh5BaYylFbM0cb17KHb3rlB8qfALan6hxh1dID2AKJe4q_jBRnkQ1g-s_Dtft7Ycfd4_m5g_ZqSkxuYWRjRhqzYTWYciKyQxIssu_gdKvSwwSq191Y9WfhfJSMbyD0_Bjld4c045AllBcVT63-6Xi0Q_vuCs9FUUCjjXJKUuR78nAxApmQnZ7jcX29FhCMPj5IHGv7j6)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you'll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. _Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He's also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, "In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure. name: Bob Carlstrom
subject: Destroyed from within
body:
Remember when there was peace in the Middle East and Europe

| |
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e80e7d6ea7546ef9d9c27b6f9bf963b&_e=4fF13dcQfjbLGx5Lp_JlS92N2zbppFn-yAcewxff75DroBfxu6IKfk5HemZzMofFrnQxXkeIydvX5S5zdLYXnSNtxzO03KWLSGF5DVIYX-e_V5STvnu_m9ySuXVVemfEKE1GrJj8NZDss2DnwYiS-FPXsrI1oVcxclPJbjWqPFFEjWn6oK0yywRei-0tF0ewYkkGKd1G6vOhqqF7S58483X9B7RW90Vt0sCimJ38FEv6U35hoJDZgdCZsBY9P49PNfQIcqDqQXVr5oLGqP7lWCkSFFhvCD7OVLVLw_36PDnW41jzI-U02Rabu3J5kSC3Eu_YpzumlXrAUAFy913i9g%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American, Remember when gas prices were under $1.50 per gallon? Remember when there was peace in the Middle East and Europe and our allies and adversaries alike respected the United States? Remember when our southern border was secure, and law and order prevailed in our communities? _Now gas prices are at a 40-year high, the Ukraine has been turned into a warzone, and the crisis at our southern border is the worst it 's ever been. _ But don't be fooled... these things did not happen by accident. They're a direct result of the Obama-Biden plot to destroy the Constitutional underpinnings of our country, to squash the States, and take over every aspect of our lives. And I'm afraid that if folks like you and me don't immediately take action and stand up to them, America will be permanently weakened. **[That's why I'm urgently asking you to join me and AMAC Action to save our country from being destroyed by today's far-Left Democrats.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e80e7d6ea7546ef9d9c27b6f9bf963b&_e=4fF13dcQfjbLGx5Lp_JlS92N2zbppFn-yAcewxff75DroBfxu6IKfk5HemZzMofFrnQxXkeIydvX5S5zdLYXnSNtxzO03KWLSGF5DVIYX-e_V5STvnu_m9ySuXVVemfEKE1GrJj8NZDss2DnwYiS-FPXsrI1oVcxclPJbjWqPFFEjWn6oK0yywRei-0tF0eww5_bTc91hmtaxU_Q8INJTAwuPb03cPAlHfpUUsUg9So31c-h7K94GrAh7Bgj7217OZUX9b1nBMPYlHf1UPvMm2gm6lQw2q8IXNEX31hc6vZDYDTbPvRUj7uVvX94Wi8afPYbS8s5MyA837huAjCLxQ%3D%3D)** Fellow American, as you know we are not afraid of challenging Obama's leftists plans for our country. _We stood up to President Obama when he tried to socialize our healthcare system with "Obamacare" and "Medicare for All"..._ _We stood up to the Congressional Democrats ' repeated attempts to destroy Social Security and make it insolvent for our generation..._ _And now - with the slew of socialist policies flooding out of Washington D.C. - we're standing up to the Obama-Biden led Democrat Party for trying to shred our Constitution._ Right now, our 75 AMAC Action chapters and 328 delegates are working hard to influence key members of Congress to vote on the issues that will make life easier for our 2.1+ million senior members and to protect our American values. And more than that, we're in the trenches of state and local legislatures throughout the country to impact legislation that will prevent the radically liberal policies coming out of Washington D.C. from devastating our middle class. But that work is easier said than done. Because as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our traditional, conservative values is with the help of generous Americans like yourself. **[Will you help us fight for our America-first values in Congress with a one-time gift of $25, $50, $75, $100 or more to AMAC Action today?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e80e7d6ea7546ef9d9c27b6f9bf963b&_e=4fF13dcQfjbLGx5Lp_JlS92N2zbppFn-yAcewxff75DroBfxu6IKfk5HemZzMofFrnQxXkeIydvX5S5zdLYXnSNtxzO03KWLSGF5DVIYX-e_V5STvnu_m9ySuXVVemfEKE1GrJj8NZDss2DnwYiS-FPXsrI1oVcxclPJbjWqPFFEjWn6oK0yywRei-0tF0ew6KGsJF9n-ZucgEGoc0tyBhdK0D0QXt1zNuG5ol-FLB0pbqcpDZV2MKd_J1WGPO08i66pbX34B0nYbyW0QymGaaJ5K2y376dU-Mv8AvKcTcxWzYxvCMGngKX27DuIg64Yw1e0QtWNsWpGwPQWye_kOg%3D%3D)** Surely, America has seen her fair share of ups and downs, ebbs and flows. _I saw it 40 years ago when I helped President Ronald Reagan bring our country back from Carter's failed leadership - and I saw it a few years ago when I stood next to President Trump as he fought to bring our country back from Obama's failed leadership._ Obama and Joe Biden's disastrous policies and actions have been causing:
---
| | • Record-high unemployment • Increased violent crime • Accelerating inflation • Runaway government spending to be supported by a monstrous and debilitating tax proposal • Fostering illegal immigration; drug smuggling; and human trafficking...
---
| | But that's not all. Behind the scenes, the Democrats are trying to fundamentally transform our Constitutional Republic into a socialist utopia by giving the federal government complete control over our state and local elections, weaking American strength at home and abroad, and helping Big Tech corporations censor anyone who does not share their far-Left world view. And if God-fearing, freedom-loving patriots like you and me do not take immediate action to fight for our beliefs, the country our grandchildren inherit will be radically different from that which we were so blessed to grow up in. **[So, can I count on you to help AMAC Action influence legislators to stop the Leftist Democrats' unconstitutional power-grab with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100 or more today?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e80e7d6ea7546ef9d9c27b6f9bf963b&_e=4fF13dcQfjbLGx5Lp_JlS92N2zbppFn-yAcewxff75DroBfxu6IKfk5HemZzMofFrnQxXkeIydvX5S5zdLYXnSNtxzO03KWLSGF5DVIYX-e_V5STvnu_m9ySuXVVemfEKE1GrJj8NZDss2DnwYiS-FPXsrI1oVcxclPJbjWqPFFEjWn6oK0yywRei-0tF0ewpc3S20KrmHydPzfq4C9kftOEQgixKUbtpgoYwyA3TKZhw9X2yV1KrPgpqpRyyuoPqOdjkyABeEobd9n8fCsIdQeb2zqu1JGBJPov7tFNUuptvVC2T3k07O3UUZJ5EKPt57ie9rF9Q4myLPB7IPu0Gg%3D%3D)** Thank for your generous support.
---
Sincerely,
---
Bob Carlstrom, President AMAC Action
---

clean_body: Remember when there was peace in the Middle East and Europe | | | | Fellow American, Remember when gas prices were under $1.50 per gallon? Remember when there was peace in the Middle East and Europe and our allies and adversaries alike respected the United States? Remember when our southern border was secure, and law and order prevailed in our communities? Now gas prices are at a 40-year high, the Ukraine has been turned into a warzone, and the crisis at our southern border is the worst it 's ever been. But don't be fooled... these things did not happen by accident. They're a direct result of the Obama-Biden plot to destroy the Constitutional underpinnings of our country, to squash the States, and take over every aspect of our lives. And I'm afraid that if folks like you and me don't immediately take action and stand up to them, America will be permanently weakened. Fellow American, as you know we are not afraid of challenging Obama's leftists plans for our country. We stood up to President Obama when he tried to socialize our healthcare system with "Obamacare" and "Medicare for All"... We stood up to the Congressional Democrats ' repeated attempts to destroy Social Security and make it insolvent for our generation... And now - with the slew of socialist policies flooding out of Washington D.C. - we're standing up to the Obama-Biden led Democrat Party for trying to shred our Constitution. Right now, our 75 AMAC Action chapters and 328 delegates are working hard to influence key members of Congress to vote on the issues that will make life easier for our 2.1+ million senior members and to protect our American values. And more than that, we're in the trenches of state and local legislatures throughout the country to impact legislation that will prevent the radically liberal policies coming out of Washington D.C. from devastating our middle class. But that work is easier said than done. Because as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our traditional, conservative values is with the help of generous Americans like yourself. Surely, America has seen her fair share of ups and downs, ebbs and flows. I saw it 40 years ago when I helped President Ronald Reagan bring our country back from Carter's failed leadership - and I saw it a few years ago when I stood next to President Trump as he fought to bring our country back from Obama's failed leadership. Obama and Joe Biden's disastrous policies and actions have been causing: | | • Record-high unemployment • Increased violent crime • Accelerating inflation • Runaway government spending to be supported by a monstrous and debilitating tax proposal • Fostering illegal immigration; drug smuggling; and human trafficking... | | But that's not all. Behind the scenes, the Democrats are trying to fundamentally transform our Constitutional Republic into a socialist utopia by giving the federal government complete control over our state and local elections, weaking American strength at home and abroad, and helping Big Tech corporations censor anyone who does not share their far-Left world view. And if God-fearing, freedom-loving patriots like you and me do not take immediate action to fight for our beliefs, the country our grandchildren inherit will be radically different from that which we were so blessed to grow up in. Thank for your generous support. Sincerely, Bob Carlstrom, President AMAC Action | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. 1904 Thomas Avenue, Suite 103, Leesburg, FL 34748 | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Maria Montero
subject: ICYMI! Montero Campaign Updates October 21
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MARIA MONTERO
body:
Campaign news you don't want to miss...
| | | |
---
| Maria's Community Champions
---
| |
---|---
Earning the confidence and support of community members, leaders, and business people is what distinguishes Maria Montero--she reflects the people, values, and work ethic of the 7th Congressional District.

This week, we are pleased to share the support of Hilda Vinces. Hilda is the Lehigh Valley small business owner of Carvin Foods. As a faithful leader in our community, Hilda supports strong, pro-business Conservative candidates.

Business owners like Hilda are the backbone our community. Small businesses want to thrive and in this current environment they continue to suffer. Hilda supports Maria because Maria has private sector experience in running a small business and Maria acutely understands lowering taxes and ending government bureaucracy will set the U.S. economy in the right direction. Hilda Vinces shared, "Maria works in the private sector, she understands the small business grind, and is the voice we need in Washington D.C to be our advocate. Maria reflects our values, knows the issues, and is highly relatable to many of our community's voters. She is clearly the most qualified Republican candidate in this primary race and will beat Susan Wild."
| |

name: American Update
subject: Biden’s Budget Deficit Grew Way More Than We Thought This Year
body:
And ‘The Worst Thing For Israel’: House Republicans Quickly Dismiss Biden’s Latest Aid Package For Israel And Ukraine

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671644%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kDZYqzvMH3fG1Xdhtqwkfg&sysid=1 Biden’s Budget Deficit Grew Way More Than We Thought This Year

❌ Don’t close this email.

❌ Don’t check Facebook or Twitter. This is your chance to [chip in $7 to have 3X the impact before our October 31st deadline.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xJdM4UPBsteMLVkfmLiDV3AjLdZgcbv7YvScGeKDY5xyTW3lLx__kvcz8qGA9Lyw8iCFHY_P6q1qb9KXDxGMfEy491Qk4lUVVmFEdu8vVE5ms9ZrmtEDMi3XkKO_maZjopcFdh14lYDX7kVYAOid7u8_b0MX-Ph9QEDUSfkMfKagO4-aQ1VmQWaaS0tctLVhtapGf_QF3I8zlvMH9fNkDgl3CFMqto5LMiGF5qu5C2EU5WHxKreQqL8Pk5CfDfgsQyuyLAPzhI_Dxtl2bcUwc8xoWFD1GicKGcUGNwA37qbLFX6oEdBKSZ3IZSZUgsRr9NPHh05mLqvcFa4ePhbTSoi7TWzfkItZrWINyVpdDaBwNhRkQe3-yYjt1ZYP3N8tO2hC9ConQnH3FnlPRQjh53/40m/D0AC3vWeTnqo3aYeXl2QiA/h0/jGGsiSrDZBrLhAZSBS5eBwFLfANGvNrEaAA87gSYDmw) Here’s why your support is so important:
* State Democrats have WON 26 special elections in 2023, winning a competitive election in New Hampshire, flipping a seat from red to blue in the Virginia Senate, and defending our majority in the Pennsylvania House.
* In Virginia, we have an election on deck where **every single seat is up for grabs.**
* _And_ we still need Democrats from your area to chip in by midnight on the 31st to hit our October fundraising goal.

**If we fail to meet our $300,000 end-of-month goal, we could give Republicans a cash advantage heading into November.** But you can help defeat far-right Republicans in the states by being one of the donors from your area we need to step up before our deadline. body:

https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c09823bd63382b538092922f6740296460807b7e876b2a81a1921c9ce416bc841923cbd5a1bf7ae15dca945829c55ba0eef3900532293784ab663ceacd72259c1f48b5b6988dbf537a8ba2e5eb28276a

Our supporter,

Ron DeSantis isn't waiting around for Joe Biden to step up and support our ally Israel.In less than 5 days, The DeSantis Administration shipped off 85 pallets packed full of donated supplies for the hospitals, families, and children of Israel.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4d89f10a8229cc451d6f451e7fd23589d1519abf52eabab431e84eef3fd3353c40c68ee4bfa9b2635c7deb2da648816b50998cd0470cfaf2a8125fc4d7a1cc98

This country has a leadership void left by Joe Biden, and Ron DeSantis is filling it by acting. Israel is in critical need, and Ron DeSantis led the way by sending off...

-
Bandages
-
Hospital gowns
-
IV kits
-
Needles
-
Syringes
-
Ventilators
-
Surgical gloves
-
Children's toys
-
Sleeping bags
-
Hygiene products
-
Clothing
“With the lack of leadership in Washington, we are stepping up to help our allies in Israel who are in need of supplies and our support. As we continue to bring back Americans who were stranded in Israel when the war began, we will also keep sending the necessary health care supplies for Israel to care for those who have been injured.” — Gov. Ron DeSantis

As for our home front, Ron DeSantis has been firm in his stance against the US absorbing refugees from Gaza. Tuesday night, he made it clear again on Fox News' The Ingraham Angle that our border cannot remain wide open to Palestinian Arabs fleeing Gaza:

"We have massive numbers of people flooding in; we have no idea who they are... Clearly when you talk about bringing in hundreds of thousands of people from Gaza that is not benefiting the United States of America; that would increase anti-Jewish sentiment in this country and increase anti Americanism. I don't want to be a part of that. "

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4d89f10a8229cc451d6f451e7fd23589d1519abf52eabab431e84eef3fd3353c40c68ee4bfa9b2635c7deb2da648816b50998cd0470cfaf2a8125fc4d7a1cc98

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4d89f10a8229cc451d6f451e7fd23589d1519abf52eabab431e84eef3fd3353c40c68ee4bfa9b2635c7deb2da648816b50998cd0470cfaf2a8125fc4d7a1cc98
Support Ron DeSantis for President

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4d89f10a8229cc4591e01b0491670688fffc408fd1366632d41a0dcf1f4d6d6d601f64f684f2a774703458ef2025187a0286a035b2e6a4306a1d6c53c4a344a2
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4d89f10a8229cc4549c030ebb05f3bd9f5d4556fd85b82773bc79b66287ee1b2a7c2725dcd303741f07f6cf0b4027d1acf744d43a5d7a6100a4ddb3399745a55
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4d89f10a8229cc451d6f451e7fd23589d1519abf52eabab431e84eef3fd3353c40c68ee4bfa9b2635c7deb2da648816b50998cd0470cfaf2a8125fc4d7a1cc98

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4d89f10a8229cc451d6f451e7fd23589d1519abf52eabab431e84eef3fd3353c40c68ee4bfa9b2635c7deb2da648816b50998cd0470cfaf2a8125fc4d7a1cc98

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: I stand with Ohio (no, seriously)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=741%2E135344%2Ec5-QRK)

Friend,
Last year, Michiganders had a plan: When Roe v. Wade was overturned, we had a ballot initiative ready to go that would codify Roe and protect abortion rights here in Michigan. We organized and collected nearly 800,000 signatures in just 8 weeks, fought off legal challenges that arose, and got Issue 3 on the ballot. Then, we organized and talked to voters and, ultimately, the ballot initiative passed 56-43. Michigan has led the way on this issue.
In just a few weeks, Ohio has the opportunity to do the same thing and enshrine the right to choose into their state constitution. This is a big moment for our neighbors to the south: Ohio has already passed an extreme six week abortion ban and while it’s on hold pending a ruling from their state Supreme Court, it could go into effect at any moment.
**As a Michigander, I would usually never say this, but: I’m proud to stand with Ohio.** But right on cue, Republicans in Ohio are going to do everything they can these last few weeks to undermine this ballot initiative. They’ve already skewed the language that will appear on voters’ ballots and dark-money donors are spending big money to mislead voters.
I’m writing today to ask you to join me in supporting the organization behind this effort – Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights – in the final few weeks. They are talking to voters, knocking doors, and blanketing the state with yard signs so voters know where to stand when they go to the polls. They are doing the work to win, just exactly as we did in the final weeks here in Michigan.
**But early voting in Ohio has already begun, so your support now really does make a huge difference in turning out voters, as well as talking to them before they get to the polls.[**So, I’m asking: Will you split a contribution between Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights and my campaign today?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23-ohio.-kz0D9&refcode=em231021-1-30&t=2&akid=741%2E135344%2Ec5-QRK)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution between Elissa Slotkin and Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-oct23-ohio.ir-WGe&refcode=em231021-1-30&t=21&akid=741%2E135344%2Ec5-QRK)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-oct23-ohio.UZIH6W&refcode=em231021-1-30&t=22&akid=741%2E135344%2Ec5-QRK)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-oct23-ohio.K0s_AY&refcode=em231021-1-30&t=23&akid=741%2E135344%2Ec5-QRK)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-oct23-ohio.eD1otm&refcode=em231021-1-30&t=24&akid=741%2E135344%2Ec5-QRK)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-oct23-ohio.fc-Q-H&refcode=em231021-1-30&t=25&akid=741%2E135344%2Ec5-QRK)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-oct23-ohio.XP6hQK&refcode=em231021-1-30&t=26&akid=741%2E135344%2Ec5-QRK)**
---
****
I don’t root for Ohio often (or ever, really), but at this moment, when Republicans are waging attacks on reproductive healthcare across the country, I will make an exception. Thank you in advance for joining me.
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=741%2E135344%2Ec5-QRK).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

In just a few weeks, Ohio has the opportunity to do the same thing and enshrine the right to choose into their state constitution. This is a big moment for our neighbors to the south: Ohio has already passed an extreme six week abortion ban and while it’s on hold pending a ruling from their state Supreme Court, it could go into effect at any moment. As a Michigander, I would usually never say this, but: I’m proud to stand with Ohio. But right on cue, Republicans in Ohio are going to do everything they can these last few weeks to undermine this ballot initiative. They’ve already skewed the language that will appear on voters’ ballots and dark-money donors are spending big money to mislead voters. I’m writing today to ask you to join me in supporting the organization behind this effort – Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights – in the final few weeks. They are talking to voters, knocking doors, and blanketing the state with yard signs so voters know where to stand when they go to the polls. They are doing the work to win, just exactly as we did in the final weeks here in Michigan. But early voting in Ohio has already begun, so your support now really does make a huge difference in turning out voters, as well as talking to them before they get to the polls. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution between Elissa Slotkin and Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights: | | | | | | | | | ** I don’t root for Ohio often (or ever, really), but at this moment, when Republicans are waging attacks on reproductive healthcare across the country, I will make an exception. Thank you in advance for joining me. Elissa PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

This message is just for you, Fellow Conservative, We’d like to thank you for being a subscriber to our email list and a strong supporter of Ted Cruz and the Ted Cruz for Senate campaign here in Houston, Texas. We truly appreciate that you open and read our campaign email messages and updates. This campaign is so important for the future of Texas and our entire country. And we are working as hard as we can to re-elect Senator Cruz to the United States Senate for you. **_Why_ is our mission so important?** **First,** we must ensure that Texas continues to have Senator Cruz as a strong, effective voice in Washington, DC; one that is looking out for Texans and our Texas values. As you know, Senator Cruz loves Texas and has been focused on providing conservative solutions for our state and Nation. **Secondly,** and very importantly, we must also do our part to ensure that Republicans win back the United States Senate in 2024. We all know it and we all feel it- something is very wrong in the modern Democratic Party. It isn’t even about politics anymore. It’s about our lives. A far-left Democrat Senate is a threat to our families, our livelihoods, our jobs, and our Constitutional rights. **But the GOP can’t retake the Senate if we don’t re-elect Senator Cruz...** **...and we can’t win this race until****you****make your first donation.** **[Donate $5 right now to help us Save America? >>](http://trk.tedcruz._g) **

Biden’s Budget Deficit Grew Way More Than We Thought This Year

The U.S. national budget deficit effectively doubled from 2022 to 2023
when President Joe Biden’s failed student debt forgiveness plan is
properly accounted for, according to The New York Times. The country’s
budget deficit was reported on Friday to be $1.7 trillion for fiscal
year (FY) 2023, compared to around $1.375 trillion in FY 2022,
according to a Treasury Department press release.

Numerous House Republicans have announced a run or are considering
jumping into the speaker’s race Friday following Judiciary Chairman
Jim Jordan’s failed candidacy. Jordan was booted out of the speaker’s
race after he did not receive enough support on the House floor in
three votes to secure the gavel.

‘The Worst Thing For Israel’: House Republicans Quickly Dismiss
Biden’s Latest Aid Package For Israel And Ukraine

After the Biden administration on Friday unveiled its supplemental
funding request to Congress, which would allocate $100 billion of U.S.
aid to Israel and Ukraine, House Republicans told the Daily Caller
News Foundation they opposed the plan and called for both countries’
aid to receive separate votes.

subject: To: President Joe Biden

body:
show your thanks!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55496?t=6&akid=11377%2E878179%2EPfv5EJ) We can’t believe how much Biden has done for our country, so we’re sending him a HUGE card to thank him for his hard work!

[**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55496?t=7&akid=11377%2E878179%2EPfv5EJ) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55496?t=8&akid=11377%2E878179%2EPfv5EJ)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I’m so grateful.

**Dear President Biden,

I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!

**Despite MAGA turmoil, over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs for the people.**

I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, but it is always the right thing to do.

So as the 2024 race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country!

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55496?t=9&akid=11377%2E878179%2EPfv5EJ)** | [SPACE RUNNING OUT: Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55496?t=10&akid=11377%2E878179%2EPfv5EJ)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11377%2E878179%2EPfv5EJ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11377%2E878179%2EPfv5EJ).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11377%2E878179%2EPfv5EJ) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=11377%2E878179%2EPfv5EJ). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11377%2E878179%2EPfv5EJ)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Virginia Democrats need our help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Virginia voters will soon cast their ballots in one of the most important elections in the country this year.
Virginia is the ONLY southern state that hasn’t banned abortion since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ — but that might change if Republicans secure even just a few more seats in the state legislature on November 7.

Virginia Republicans already control the governorship and the state House. The meager Democratic majority in the Senate is the only stopgap preventing a statewide abortion ban that Governor Youngkin has said he would “gleefully” sign into law.
If Republicans secure a trifecta in the upcoming election, Virginia could become the latest state to ban abortion and embolden extremists across the country as we head into the 2024 elections that will decide whether Republicans gain enough power to pass a nationwide abortion ban.
[**Virginia’s election will impact all of us — no matter where we live — so please consider splitting a donation today between Powered by People and the Democratic Party of Virginia.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231021.CIwJ5F&refcode=ema20231021-233660&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=233660%2E444211%2EouIUSx)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231021.CIwJ5F&refcode=ema20231021-233660&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=233660%2E444211%2EouIUSx)**
Together is how Democrats win.
— Beto

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: “Moderate” Kari Lake?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Yeah, right.
#

Peter, something weird is happening in Arizona.
If you’ve got a minute, I hope you’ll let me explain.
There’s this new narrative going around in the media that Kari Lake is going to turn into some plain old boring Republican, that she will moderate her platform to appeal to moderates.
Apparently she thinks the people of Arizona are going to forget all of the absolutely ridiculous and dangerous things she said and did back in 2022.
Yeah, right.
I can tell you this: We are not going to let that happen.
No matter what Kari Lake says or does, she is still the MAGA Queen. The woman who called herself, “the most dangerous politician in the world.”
But I can’t correct the record here all by myself. Never could.
I need a big team behind me so our campaign can fight back against Kari Lake and this ridiculous narrative.
So, I’ve got to ask:

clean_body: Yeah, right. Peter, something weird is happening in Arizona. If you’ve got a minute, I hope you’ll let me explain. There’s this new narrative going around in the media that Kari Lake is going to turn into some plain old boring Republican, that she will moderate her platform to appeal to moderates. Apparently she thinks the people of Arizona are going to forget all of the absolutely ridiculous and dangerous things she said and did back in 2022. Yeah, right. I can tell you this: We are not going to let that happen. No matter what Kari Lake says or does, she is still the MAGA Queen. The woman who called herself, “the most dangerous politician in the world.” But I can’t correct the record here all by myself. Never could. I need a big team behind me so our campaign can fight back against Kari Lake and this ridiculous narrative. So, I’ve got to ask: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for your support. body:
Go Blue! | Happy game day, football fans! Today, for the 116th time, the University of Michigan Wolverines and the Michigan State Spartans will battle it out on the gridiron. You already know that I'm pulling for my Wolverines. But I thought it might be fun to bring the spirit of competition into our campaign. **We want to see which school’s fans can raise the most money before the end of the day – whichever team wins, we'll give you a special shoutout in our next email!** | [Go Blue!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71946845/433767986/-569772565?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20231021_fr_football_cand_sm_90da_UM_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWUyMzRmMGYtMTY3MC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LBsQpdVXHgHwe8fjEY1z1-n250rAIKdMugiv4aGySJQ=)
---
[Go Green! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71946846/433767987/-569772565?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20231021_fr_football_cand_sm_90da_msu_btn2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWUyMzRmMGYtMTY3MC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LBsQpdVXHgHwe8fjEY1z1-n250rAIKdMugiv4aGySJQ=)
Fundraising aside, I also want to put on my teacher/mom hat and point out that **there's a lesson to be learned from this rivalry:**
For generations, Michiganders have been able to root against their rivals without letting things get too personal.
We can oppose each other on game day (and you better believe I'm gonna celebrate every Michigan touchdown) without hating each other – and once the game is over, the adult thing to do is put our rivalry aside and [get back to working together](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71946847/433767988/270847249?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWUyMzRmMGYtMTY3MC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LBsQpdVXHgHwe8fjEY1z1-n250rAIKdMugiv4aGySJQ=&emci=778d78d1-b56e-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=5e234f0f-1670-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=9697413).
I know that a lot of people treat politics like it's football – but the truth is, our nation desperately needs people who are willing to look past their team affiliation and build bridges, rather than put up walls, to people with opposing views.
So, even though I'm a Wolverine through and through, **I'm a Michigander** , and I'll be fighting to help _everyone_ , no matter which team you root for.
Tuebor, and GO BLUE!
Callie
Callie Barr
Candidate for Congress, Michigan's First District
[Go Blue!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71946848/433767990/-569772565?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20231021_fr_football_cand_sm_90da_UM_btn3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWUyMzRmMGYtMTY3MC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LBsQpdVXHgHwe8fjEY1z1-n250rAIKdMugiv4aGySJQ=)

Callie Callie Barr Candidate for Congress, Michigan's First District = = | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. Can you help send Callie to Congress by donating today? | = | Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress Callie Barr for Congress PO Box 6921 Traverse City, MI 49696 United States Callie Barr is an advocate for veterans and spouse to a former U.S. Marine. Hi, friend, it's Debbie. First, I want to thank you for supporting my grassroots campaign. I cannot express how much your belief in my campaign — and your willingness to fight for a better future for Florida — means to me.
There are some urgent updates from our campaign that I need to share with you today, so I'll get right to it:
* Election experts have been saying for months that Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators in 2024. **Our campaign is polling ONE POINT ahead of him.**

* On the heels of that poll, we did what many people said was impossible: **_Last quarter, w_** _**e outraised Rick Scott,**_ an entrenched incumbent with a multimillion-dollar fortune!

* **Rick Scott could write himself a massive check at _any moment_** to retake the fundraising advantage. We have to be ready.

Control of the Senate could all come down to what happens right here in Florida. We cannot waste this opportunity to flip Florida blue and secure our Senate majority. **[So please, friend, I'm asking you to dig deep today and help me keep this momentum going by rushing a $5 donation before midnight tonight. name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: A GOP extremist, handpicked by Mitch McConnell, just launched his campaign to flip Nevada and the Senate red
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
I had to reach out right away, friend:

Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate just launched his campaign to defeat my friend and colleague Sen. Jacky Rosen in Nevada – and according to analysts at FiveThirtyEight, this race is likely to decide Senate control.

[I’ve been in Jacky’s shoes before, so I can tell you firsthand: She needs every bit of grassroots support she can get – and she needs it right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=20?source=em231021-zm-jr-split&refcode2=469_8507_eyEZTO&akid=469%2E8507%2EeyEZTO)

Because here’s the thing: McConnell and his allies flooded Nevada with over $55 million to flip this battleground state red. I was able to win the closest Senate race in the country by 7,928 votes because of a dedicated team of grassroots supporters by my side. But the GOP is gearing up to spend even more this time around to make sure their handpicked candidate defeats Jacky.

**That’s why _The Washington Post_ is calling Jacky one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country – and now, a recent poll shows her two points down.** [The only way Jacky can overcome the GOP’s spending, win in Nevada, and keep the Senate blue is with your grassroots support, but she’s falling short of her critical $50,000 rapid-response goal.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=20?source=em231021-zm-jr-split&refcode2=469_8507_eyEZTO&akid=469%2E8507%2EeyEZTO)

[_So please, friend, I’m personally asking: Will you give $20 or more to split between Jacky’s campaign and Zak Malamed's right now to help her win reelection in Nevada and defend our Democratic Senate majority?_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=20?source=em231021-zm-jr-split&refcode2=469_8507_eyEZTO&akid=469%2E8507%2EeyEZTO)

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Split $20 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=20?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em20231021-jr-split-el&refcode2=469_8507_eyEZTO&akid=469%2E8507%2EeyEZTO) [Split $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=20?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20231021-jr-split-el&refcode2=469_8507_eyEZTO&akid=469%2E8507%2EeyEZTO) [Split $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=20?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em20231021-jr-split-el&refcode2=469_8507_eyEZTO&akid=469%2E8507%2EeyEZTO) [Other Amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=20&amount=30&refcode=em20231021-jr-split-el&refcode2=469_8507_eyEZTO&akid=469%2E8507%2EeyEZTO)
---

Thank you.

_¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues!_

Catherine

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

The momentum is in our favor and we’re just getting started. I've never run for office before. I am not a career politician who relies on the support of mega-donor funded super PACs. Peter, we have accomplished so much together, and I am not finished fighting for the America First agenda. | Just as true as New Hampshire goes first in the nation, I will continue speaking the TRUTH at every step of the way. Not just when it’s easy, but also when it’s hard. We need leaders for this country, not puppets. We need TRUTH in this country, not propaganda from a dishonest media. We need to put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic. I’m ready to take this campaign to the next level. | | In the next couple of weeks, Ohio voters have the opportunity to **enshrine reproductive freedom in the state constitution and legalize recreational marijuana for adults aged 21 and older.** **Early voting is happening now for both of these ballot initiatives** — and the Ohio Democratic Party is working hard to get out the vote. [**With less than two weeks left for Ohioans to vote, can you split a donation of $20 or any amount between us and the Ohio Democrats? Every donation goes a long way to reach more voters in these final days and set us up for more victories in the years ahead.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71950031/433778404/983390753?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231021_f_ohioelections_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzg5YmU3NC0xYTcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LioyfNBzpu4w_OK22YNSY4U_CZQO4HGKXnoylenRb4c=) This election comes right on the heels of a recent victory for democracy in Ohio. In August, Republicans tried to make it harder to protect abortion rights at the ballot box — aiming to increase the threshold for passing constitutional amendments to 60%. But Ohioans rejected that attempt to undermine the will of the people. And now both measures on the ballot right now can pass with simple majorities. If Ohioans vote to guarantee reproductive freedom, they’ll prevent an extreme ban on abortion after six weeks — before most people even know they’re pregnant — from taking effect. And they’ll prevent future attacks on abortion rights. **It’s no surprise that many extremists pushing anti-abortion legislation are the same ones attacking the freedom to vote — advancing their unpopular agenda by trying to restrict our voices. So, to keep fighting for reproductive freedom, we’ll keep working to ensure equal access to the ballot box in 2023 and beyond — and your support helps make it possible.** [**To mobilize voters and help make sure the American people can make their voices heard in our democracy, please split a donation between the Ohio Democratic Party and Fair Fight today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71950048/433778426/983390753?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231021_f_ohioelections_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzg5YmU3NC0xYTcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LioyfNBzpu4w_OK22YNSY4U_CZQO4HGKXnoylenRb4c=) Thank you, The Fair Fight Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71950064/433778439/983390753?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231021_f_ohioelections_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzg5YmU3NC0xYTcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LioyfNBzpu4w_OK22YNSY4U_CZQO4HGKXnoylenRb4c=)

subject: ALERT: 151 on FBI's Terror Watch List Have Crossed Southern Border this Year
body:
As Israeli-Hamas war intensifies, Border Protection reports that 151 on the FBI’s terror watch attempted to cross the southern border.

view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/0a360da8e611/alert-151-on-fbis-terror-watch-list-have-crossed-southern-border-this-year?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=2ba23e2934) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=2ba23e2934)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2ba23e2934-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_21_04_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ba23e2934-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
This Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2ba23e2934-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_21_04_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ba23e2934-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

151 on FBI's Terror Watch List Crossed Southern Border in 2023, an All Time High, as Chicago Faces a Rising Migrant Crisis and Israeli-Hamas War Escalates (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/10/151-on-fbis-terror-watch-list-crossed-southern-border-in-2023-an-all-time-high-as-chicago-faces-a-rising-migrant-crisis-and-israeli-hamas-war-escalates.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2ba23e2934-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_21_04_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ba23e2934-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Migrants are led from one bus to another after arriving from Texas at Union Station on Sept. 9, 2022, in Chicago. (Chris Sweda/Chicago Tribune/Tribune News Service via Getty Images)
As the Israeli-Hamas war intensifies in the Middle East and the crisis on the southern border is raising legitimate national security concerns, U.S. Customs and Border Protection are reporting (https://www.cbsnews.com/news/us-mexico-border-terrorists/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2ba23e2934-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_21_04_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ba23e2934-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that an estimated 151 individuals on the FBI’s terror watch list have been caught trying to cross into the United States illegally this year alone – representing an all time high along the southern border as Chicago politicians scramble to address the migrant crisis now plaguing the city.

Less than two weeks ago, Hamas fighters coordinated a surprise terrorist attack on Israel that has killed more than 1,300 innocent civilians.

Late last week, Hamas leader Khaled Mashal called for a
‘Day of Anger’ (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/10/hamas-leaders-call-for-a-global-day-of-anger-friday-leaving-chicagoland-area-and-major-cities-around-the-world-on-high-alert.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2ba23e2934-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_21_04_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ba23e2934-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) around the world last Friday, leaving synagogues and law enforcement officials on high alert, including in the Chicagoland area where last Thursday, a temple in Skokie (https://abc7chicago.com/day-of-rage-chicago-october-13-hamas-2023-news/13906570/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2ba23e2934-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_21_04_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ba23e2934-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , just north of Chicago, received a bomb threat and had to be evacuated. Fortunately, no explosives were found after local police searched the temple, but the threats of terrorism remain a real threat following Hamas’ call to action last week.

On
Saturday (https://abc7chicago.com/joseph-czuba-will-county-news-plainfield-murder-boy-stabbed/13921802/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2ba23e2934-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_21_04_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ba23e2934-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , a 6-year old boy was brutally murdered by his mother’s landlord in a scene that sent shockwaves across the country. The killer, who also stabbed the mother, is being charged with a hate crime. The Will County Sheriff’s Office said the crimes were committed because they were Muslim. The funeral for the little boy was held on Monday at a mosque in Bridgeview. The mother, who is still hospitalized and was unable to attend her son’s funeral – only adding to her unimaginable grief, is expected to recover from her injuries.

Since the terrorist attack in Israel on October 7th, Republican lawmakers in Washington have sounded the alarm that President Biden’s open border policy is leaving the U.S. vulnerable to another attack – this time on U.S. soil. Some lawmakers are even alleging the possibility of Hamas terrorists and other cells entering the U.S. through the wide open southern border.

This year alone, 151 people on the FBI’s terrorist watch list have crossed into the U.S. from the southern border – representing a dramatic increase since 2021, where only 15 were apprehended.

National security experts on both sides of the aisle acknowledge the safety concerns with so many crossing into the country illegally.

In response, the U.S. Department of Homeland Security issued a
statement (https://www.cbsnews.com/news/us-mexico-border-terrorists/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2ba23e2934-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_21_04_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ba23e2934-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) last week:

“While we do not have specific and credible intelligence indicating a threat to the United States at this time stemming from the Hamas terrorist attacks in Israel, DHS is closely monitoring unfolding events and will continue to engage in information sharing with our intelligence and law enforcement partners at home and abroad.”

In Chicago, streams of buses carrying illegals are dropping people off all over the city day and night, straining resources and forcing the city and state to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to address the surge.

It’s estimated that over
17,000 migrants (https://www.nbcchicago.com/news/local/chicagos-migrant-crisis-by-the-numbers-a-look-at-arrivals-in-the-past-year/3244029/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2ba23e2934-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_21_04_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ba23e2934-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) have arrived in Chicago in the last year, costing more than $400 million – with 25 buses arriving each day dropping off an average of 1,250 migrants around the city.

A few weeks ago, Gov JB Pritzker wrote a letter to President Biden asking for help, including federal aid, as the migrant crisis spirals out of control,
writing (https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/politics-news/illinois-gov-jb-pritzker-biden-address-migrant-crisis-letter-rcna118486?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2ba23e2934-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_21_04_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ba23e2934-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,

“Unfortunately, the welcome and aid Illinois has been providing to these asylum seekers has not been matched with support by the federal government...Most critically, the federal government’s lack of intervention and coordination at the border has created an untenable situation for Illinois.”

A delegation from Illinois, including representatives from the Chicago Mayor’s office are in El Paso meeting with local, state and federal officials to get a firsthand look at the crisis on the southern border and how best to coordinate efforts as the city struggles to contain both a humanitarian and national security crisis that’s impacting residents across the city and state.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2ba23e2934-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_21_04_35&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ba23e2934-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
