name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Re: Shifting gears
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
VoteVets is in a full court press right now.
#
Derek, checking in to see if you saw the email from Travis yesterday.
VoteVets is in a full court press right now.
We’re working hard with our Veterans to dispel coordinated, targeted disinformation campaigns from the right.
We’re keeping the pressure on Tommy Tuberville and his blockade of senior Military promotions in the middle of an international crisis.
We’re holding Trump accountable for the insults and degradation he’s aimed at our Active Duty, our Veterans, our wounded, and our fallen.
And through it all, we’re supporting candidates up and down the ballot towards our ultimate goal of getting Veterans and National Security experts in office.
Travis is leading that work, and he’s doing a hell of a job. But we could always be doing more — and what it comes down to is resources. If we raise more money, we can support more candidates. It’s as simple as that.
So please, check out his email below about our work in Virginia ahead of their elections in November.
**[And if you can, chip in a donation of $5. We’ll put it to good use.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231021-1-30&t=1&akid=17549%2E3013755%2EPE3itW)**
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231021-1-30&t=2&akid=17549%2E3013755%2EPE3itW)
---
Thanks!
* * *
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231021-1-30&t=3&akid=17549%2E3013755%2EPE3itW)
Hey, this is Travis with VoteVets — people call me Taz.
I served in the Marines for several years, but now I run the organizing shop with VoteVets. That means I support our members, frontliners, our first-time candidates, the folks in the field who are running the races that we need to win.
VoteVets is supporting candidates at virtually every level, in every corner of the country. And I wanted to point you to one state that’s going to be very important over the next month.
Over the last week, VoteVets has started booking media buys in Virginia to take back the General Assembly, their state legislature. We’re supporting Veterans and candidates from National Security backgrounds and we’re putting in a lot of money on TV and digital ads to help them win.
We’re off to a strong start thanks to you. But we could do a lot more with your help.
Virginia is shaping up to be a bellwether this year, with the GOP testing messages and tactics that they’ll use to try and take back the Senate and help Trump win in 2024.
We have an opportunity right now to stop them. And I’m asking you to chip in and support that effort.
**[Chip in $5 to VoteVets right now and help us win in Virginia. We’ll take whatever lessons we learn there and apply them to our strategies in 2024. If we have the resources we need, we’re going to knock the socks off of the GOP. But we can’t do it without you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231021-1-30&t=4&akid=17549%2E3013755%2EPE3itW)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.45QyP4&refcode=em231021-1-30&t=23&akid=17549%2E3013755%2EPE3itW)**
---
****
| **[Rush $25 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2935?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.WdUprk&refcode=em231021-1-30&t=24&akid=17549%2E3013755%2EPE3itW)**

****
| | **[Rush $50 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2928?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.uYdXHt&refcode=em231021-1-30&t=25&akid=17549%2E3013755%2EPE3itW)**
---
****
| **[Rush $100 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2929?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.Bb4oJd&refcode=em231021-1-30&t=26&akid=17549%2E3013755%2EPE3itW)**

Florida has TONS of great conservative leaders from Ron DeSantis, Rick Scott, and Marco Rubio. This leadership is why people from all over the country are flocking to our state. **But right now, Florida faces opposition from Democrats in DC.** Democrats have pledged to pour MILLIONS into the Sunshine State to turn us into the next failed blue experiment, and we need your help to push back.

Here’s the game plan:

🗳️ Meet voters where they are with our on-the-ground team and register them to vote.

🗳️ Target voters who haven’t been reached before and ensure they know what’s at stake.

🗳️ Continue registering youth voters on college campuses.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71953009/433789378/-708856094?refcode=EM_F_231021Countdown_N_TN_90DO_7_G_TestB_P2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmNjU1YjU0LTFlNzAtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CFUw7bNuJgPOgiNyzGjk2mbmKlCJf8hHGr87AZ0HjAE=)

When talking to voters, the organizers are telling them the truth: Voting this November will affect their day-to-day lives, from reproductive rights to voting rights, environmental decisions, funding for education, and more. Additionally, what happens on November 7 will play a pivotal role in 2024.

[**The New Pennsylvania Project was founded to consistently engage Pennsylvanians year-round to expand the electorate centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities, and the youth. We are preparing for an important Get Out The Vote program starting next week but first need your help now. Will you chip in $5 right now to help register folks to vote for the November elections, where we have the chance to defend democracy at the polls?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71953011/433789380/-708856094?refcode=EM_F_231021Countdown_N_TN_90DO_7_G_TestB_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmNjU1YjU0LTFlNzAtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CFUw7bNuJgPOgiNyzGjk2mbmKlCJf8hHGr87AZ0HjAE=)

clean_body: The last day to register to vote in Pennsylvania is approaching. = | We’re in the final countdown, fellow activist. The last day to register to vote in Pennsylvania ahead of the November election is MONDAY, October 23. = | = Here’s the game plan: 🗳️ Meet voters where they are with our on-the-ground team and register them to vote. 🗳️ Target voters who haven’t been reached before and ensure they know what’s at stake. 🗳️ Continue registering youth voters on college campuses. = When talking to voters, the organizers are telling them the truth: Voting this November will affect their day-to-day lives, from reproductive rights to voting rights, environmental decisions, funding for education, and more. Additionally, what happens on November 7 will play a pivotal role in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = Let’s go, Team NPP The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Adam Schiff
subject: The Protecting Our Democracy Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I believe it’s time for Congress to pass new protections for our democratic institutions — if you agree, will you become a citizen co-sponsor of the Protecting Our Democracy Act today?
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4260%2E5257348%2EfdXLDR)
Derek — If we fail to learn from history, we doom ourselves to repeat it.
Over the many years I’ve spent defending our democracy from MAGA charlatans like Donald Trump, that history has weighed heavily on my mind. **It’s high time that we act to prevent another president from abusing the office like he did.**
The Watergate scandal broke the public’s trust in the White House, and the American people rightly feared that future presidents might abuse their office once again just like Nixon did.
Congress took action to increase accountability and restore checks and balances in our government. Legislators passed a series of landmark reforms — the post-Watergate reforms — to prevent future presidents from abusing their office.
And Derek, after the damage inflicted by Donald Trump on our country, I’ve been leading the charge to pass our own “post-Watergate” reforms, **the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_** , to ensure that no president can get away with Trump’s abuses of office ever again.
[**I believe it’s time for Congress to pass new protections for our democratic institutions — if you agree, will you become a citizen co-sponsor of the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ today?**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202310-poda-petition.X6G8g1&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231021_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4260%2E5257348%2EfdXLDR)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202310-poda-petition.X6G8g1&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231021_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4260%2E5257348%2EfdXLDR)
---
Two impeachments, an insurrection, and rampant election denialism have severely tested our democracy over the past few years. I’ve been on the frontlines, investigating the perpetrators while serving on the January 6th Committee and doing everything in my power to hold them accountable. I didn’t shy away from those fights, I threw myself in.
**These actions have shown that we cannot take our democracy for granted.** That’s why I introduced the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ — to ensure that no future president can do the kind of damage that Donald Trump inflicted on our country.
This legislation will help us do three important things:
1. Stop the abuse of the president’s powers.
2. Restore checks and balances.
3. Protect our elections from interference, both foreign and domestic.

**This isn’t a Democratic or Republican issue. Or at least it shouldn't be. This is a nonpartisan, pro-democracy effort — designed to strengthen our democracy for future generations. And I intend to keep fighting for it in the U.S. Senate.**
[**Add your name alongside mine to become a citizen co-sponsor of the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ and help me win this election so we can pass it, once and for all.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202310-poda-petition.X6G8g1&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231021_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4260%2E5257348%2EfdXLDR)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202310-poda-petition.X6G8g1&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231021_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4260%2E5257348%2EfdXLDR)
---
Thank you for your commitment to our democracy.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2953?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231021_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=4260%2E5257348%2EfdXLDR)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1807?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231021_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=4260%2E5257348%2EfdXLDR)
---

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=4260%2E5257348%2EfdXLDR) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=4260%2E5257348%2EfdXLDR)**

Text **JOIN** to **724433**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=4260%2E5257348%2EfdXLDR)

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Update: Terrorist watchlist and our southern border
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=76d642f5f0244d9aa3c460c3cc745730&_e=y6S8JZVTbSqEHW5UWj4SQLZlPflfZWp0bS31XXZkV1i3TK0mj5Vjg3CCmQ7-OLWL4EGVnOT8gRii6w7jXKsx0atWnlT9HojzsneeDBdZowrfGR-6f1iG_-B3t3cMKOw3WlbGXdIl_MpUq2NJnJQANMGcTdtXlm4GP0-kQK_3YMqiliS7MkeNIMUwyouORnVGy4pHUEXD5YpNOQJjr5KD5WfdTY8q2eYdRrTkjGZFYzQ%3D)
---
My friend, The crisis and unrest in the Middle East have highlighted the importance of border security. Our southern border continues to remain wide open under Joe Biden's administration. U.S. Border Patrol agents stop thousands of illegal border crossings each day, but countless more are able to evade law enforcement. What's even more disturbing is the rise in people on the terrorist watchlist being stopped at our southern border. More than 160 members of the list have been caught so far in 2023, up from 100 total a year ago! _**And that's just the people we actually caught... Who knows how many people on the terrorist watch list were able to successfully cross Biden's open border?!**_
---
| | [_**Enough is Enough >> _Secure the Border NOW!_**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=76d642f5f0244d9aa3c460c3cc745730&_e=y6S8JZVTbSqEHW5UWj4SQLZlPflfZWp0bS31XXZkV1i3TK0mj5Vjg3CCmQ7-OLWL4EGVnOT8gRii6w7jXKsx0VR0SxHAByCfAQQKPfNFkD8EPpHfBBX1P0rm9_orri1S-dmoIu6VQhs709bymM_NL9n-NOCfrx669UPXMN5THJXAn2tMM7fvkmNImmOKu6FkHtolrBBaNTbjzu7m_VZ2CmiR_GkwXvX8w5XdlwvA00E%3D)
---
Joe Biden and the Democrats' open border policies are quite literally putting our country in harm's way. Make no mistake... if Joe Biden wins reelection in 2024 and Democrats take back the House, they'll double down on their failed agenda and continue to leave our border wide open for anyone — including terrorists — to walk through. **[Help me stop that from happening by chipping in $20.24 or any amount today!](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=76d642f5f0244d9aa3c460c3cc745730&_e=y6S8JZVTbSqEHW5UWj4SQLZlPflfZWp0bS31XXZkV1i3TK0mj5Vjg3CCmQ7-OLWL4EGVnOT8gRii6w7jXKsx0ekPwIRsLzjdl37IXrGx916RGzPJPocuOSQssg18U15cdRPMcwB_5BgXBRGV38tOaJDdL_j2YNboaZB72IYk-s0yPTIjGmakUCNKpvUHfo-3BwBS-l-yS3LM_h9eBwRLcbJ4F-l2wQDZu8Ata6K00kk%3D)** Thank you,
**Glenn Grothman**

clean_body: | | | My friend, The crisis and unrest in the Middle East have highlighted the importance of border security. Our southern border continues to remain wide open under Joe Biden's administration. U.S. Border Patrol agents stop thousands of illegal border crossings each day, but countless more are able to evade law enforcement. What's even more disturbing is the rise in people on the terrorist watchlist being stopped at our southern border. More than 160 members of the list have been caught so far in 2023, up from 100 total a year ago! And that's just the people we actually caught... Who knows how many people on the terrorist watch list were able to successfully cross Biden's open border?! | | Joe Biden and the Democrats' open border policies are quite literally putting our country in harm's way. Make no mistake... if Joe Biden wins reelection in 2024 and Democrats take back the House, they'll double down on their failed agenda and continue to leave our border wide open for anyone — including terrorists — to walk through. Thank you, Glenn Grothman | | | | Follow Glenn Grothman on Social Media! | | | ---|---|--- | | Glenn Grothman for Congress P.O. Box 1215 Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman.

My team and I found out this morning that my far-Left opponent, _**Susan Wild, is reporting $1.1 million cash on hand – with more at the ready from the California and New York PACs and lobbyists.**_

MEET RYAN

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan's first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It's that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: "Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin."

In Pennsylvania's state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn't just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

Friend, thank you for your support and I hope that you will continue to support me on this small victory lap. Now, I need your help to keep this momentum going and on to the next challenge. My team and I found out this morning that my far-Left opponent, Susan Wild, is reporting $1.1 million cash on hand – with more at the ready from the California and New York PACs and lobbyists. For me, falling short isn’t an option. For every conservative who wants to change Washington next year, I need you on my team now to overcome this gap. We can’t let up for a minute or else we could lose a very winnable race next year. I know the value of hard-earned dollars and I promise you that your investment is worth it. Peter, I want to make you a promise, right here, right now.

On DAY ONE of my governorship, I will roll up my sleeves and get to work for the good folks of Mississippi.

No gum-flapping. No shenanigans. No corrupt backroom deal-making with special interests. It will be nothing but results, results, and more results for everyday working people and families. I am ready to:

**🩺 Expand Medicaid to 220,000 working folks
💰 Fund our public schools and hospitals
🛒 Slash the most expensive grocery tax in the country
🚘 Cut car tag fees in half
📈 Build a booming economy
🌐 Bring high-speed internet to every Mississippi household
❌ Root out corruption in state politics**

And that will only be the beginning, Peter. The best part is we’re nearly two weeks out from making this a reality.

But I could really use your help. We need to raise $130,000 online before our make-or-break public filing deadline at the end of October to keep our GOTV efforts in full force. **We CANNOT afford to cut back our campaign plans this late into the race.

[In a race this competitive, our victory could come down to just a handful of votes. There’s no room for cutbacks, Peter. Every donation will help me defeat Tate Reeves and move Mississippi forward. No gum-flapping. No shenanigans. No corrupt backroom deal-making with special interests. It will be nothing but results, results, and more results for everyday working people and families. I am ready to: 🩺 Expand Medicaid to 220,000 working folks 💰 Fund our public schools and hospitals 🛒 Slash the most expensive grocery tax in the country 🚘 Cut car tag fees in half 📈 Build a booming economy 🌐 Bring high-speed internet to every Mississippi household ❌ Root out corruption in state politics And that will only be the beginning, Peter. body:
Let us quickly explain.
#
Hey Derek, we're sure you're busy -- so let us quickly explain why we're reaching out with this message + **[asking for your contribution to power our work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231021-1?refcode=em20231021-1-8631&refcode2=8631_434096_WjeHrc&akid=8631%2E434096%2EWjeHrc)**
Grassroots donors just like you power our campaign and were how we flipped PA blue 🔵 and sent John to the Senate. **We seriously couldn't have done it without your help.**
But the work isn't letting up, and there are big fights on the horizon. The GOP is in shambles, and the government could fail to pass essential funding or even shut down because of their chaos. They're coming for important rights, like abortion, at every level and in every state. **And right-wing commentators are *still* making personal attacks against John and his family.**
John is up for this fight, but he needs each of us in his corner. **[If you're able to, we hope you'll consider donating $5 to keep up the fight and power John's work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231021-1?refcode=em20231021-1-8631&refcode2=8631_434096_WjeHrc&akid=8631%2E434096%2EWjeHrc)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Teichert=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Teichert on the Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3237f8f04ace/icymi-john-teicherts-vision-for-marylands-senate-on-fox-6670666?e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
**Teichert on the Trail** October 21, 2023
Welcome to Teichert on the Trail, a weekly email highlighting the latest news and events from the campaign as retired Air Force Brigadier General John Teichert earns the hearts and votes of Marylanders in the race to be their next U.S. Senator.
|
---
# In The News....
This week, John appeared on multiple television and radio programs to discuss his bid for the U.S. Senate in Maryland and further offer his perspective as a retired General and national security expert in the United States Air Force, addressing the rising tensions in the Middle East and the Israel-Hamas war, as well as the subsequent tensions growing in America.
Teichert proclaimed his support and confidence in Israel, saying, “Of course, it’s heart wrenching for them, but they are ready to do what their country needs them to do to own their right of self-defense against Hamas.”
Watch his interviews below:
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=b87f469068&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
Teichert on [Newsmax](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=1e5eb5c83b&e=1b1fb1ad9f) addressing the Gaza hospital bombing.
| | | | | | | | | [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=3b68b428a5&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
Teichert on [Newsmax](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=726ea673d6&e=1b1fb1ad9f) discussing the threat to the U.S. Embassy in Lebanon
| [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=d4ef2ce828&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
John appeared on [Wilkow](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=0bbdac4f11&e=1b1fb1ad9f)! to discuss military concerns in the Israel-Hamas war.
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=c6e20d7b71&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
John also joined [NewsNation](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=c56766ca91&e=1b1fb1ad9f) again this week to discuss the latest drone attack on American interests stating in part, **“I was over as a senior defense official in Iraq for 14 months in 2020 and 2021, when Iran, or Iran proxies, started using unmanned systems to attack the American interests in the region and frankly, for the last 44 years, Iran has created an arc of instability throughout the Middle East.”**
| | | | | | | | | | [Listen Here](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=44e60f9727&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
| John also joined John Catsimatidis on his national radio program, [Cats and Cosby](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=976c95a90e&e=1b1fb1ad9f), to discuss his U.S. Senate race and the situation in the Middle East.
---
|
---
# On the Trail...
This week, John thoroughly enjoyed his time on the campaign trail, spreading his message of leadership, not politics, to voters across Maryland. Here are some posts of the places he’s been and the voters he met with!
| | | | | | | | | [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=928b21c263&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
| [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=5c20aac9be&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=e33e99177c&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
| | | | [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=76ecf8ec45&e=1b1fb1ad9f)| [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=0a1dfaf18d&e=1b1fb1ad9f)| [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=6b89c43a2a&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---|---|---
| [TEICHERTFORMARYLAND.COM](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=00f44fdcbe&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
|
---
# Thoughts...
On Tuesday, October 17th, John posted a video calling his opponents, Democratic U.S. Senate candidates Angela Alsobrooks and David Trone, to join him in condemning anti-Israel protests on college campuses and even in the halls of Congress.
**“I hope my opponents running for U.S. Senate in Maryland use their free and protected speech to express similar outrage against Hamas and support of Israel.”**
Teichert remains in unwavering support of Israel. Watch the full video[ here. ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=4d92e00ea2&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=864bc72515&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
|
---
| [DONATE](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=7663f7a47c&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
| | |
---

Our mailing address is:
Teichert for Senate PO Box 3782 1296 Cronson Blvd Crofton, MD 21114-3782 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=68233ac087&e=1b1fb1ad9f&c=81c229de75) or [unsubscribe](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=68233ac087&e=1b1fb1ad9f&c=81c229de75)
|

body:
This guy thinks the only way to be a man is to be exactly like him.
#
Peter — Josh Hawley thinks the only way to be a man is to be just like him.
**Earlier this year, he even published a whole book about it.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38652?refcode=em20231021-4027&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4027%2E614464%2EgR5Nw2)

Missouri is the Show Me State, but the only thing Josh Hawley has shown us is how to be a fraud and a coward. **I’m Lucas Kunce, the 13-year Marine veteran and Democrat running to replace him in the U.S. Senate.**
I’m building a movement, without a cent from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors, to take back power from corrupt politicians like Hawley and put everyday Missourians in charge of our country — so we can finally rebuild our forgotten communities, invest into working people, and fix our government’s broken status quo.

A recent poll showed that this race is in a dead heat, so your generous support today could be what tips the scales.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38652?refcode=em20231021-4027&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4027%2E614464%2EgR5Nw2)**

name: Team Pramila
subject: How we can fight back against the GOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This time last year, Pramila was preparing for one of the most consequential midterm elections our democracy has ever seen.
#
Peter,
This time last year, we were preparing for one of the most consequential midterm elections ever. But due to slower fundraising, we had to extend our October fundraising deadline to hit our goal.****
**We don’t want to be in that position again**, Peter**. Not when there's so much at stake for our progressive movement. That’s why we’re reaching out to our most dedicated supporters with a big ask:**
**One of the most effective ways to re-elect Pramila and prepare for attacks from right-wing groups who want her out of Congress is by making a monthly contribution.**
With less than 90 days until the 2024 primaries, now is the time to strengthen our recurring donor base. **We need to be prepared to fight back against the GOP, who will stop at nothing to silence Pramila and our movement.****
**
**[Can we count on you to begin a monthly donation of any amount to our campaign today? For the price of a cup of coffee, you can help sustain our campaign!](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46473?refcode=em20231021-3064&t=1&akid=3064%2E420207%2EKwjXi1)**
**[Make a monthly donation ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46473?refcode=em20231021-3064&t=2&akid=3064%2E420207%2EKwjXi1)**
Thank you,
Team Pramila
P.S. If you are unable to commit to a monthly contribution at this time, we completely understand. **[If you are willing to support our movement with a one-time donation, please click here to make a contribution of $6 or any amount you are able to give.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46474?refcode=em20231021-3064&t=3&akid=3064%2E420207%2EKwjXi1)**

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231021-3064-footer&t=4&refcode2=3064_420207_KwjXi1&akid=3064%2E420207%2EKwjXi1)**

But due to slower fundraising, we had to extend our October fundraising deadline to hit our goal.** We don’t want to be in that position again, Peter. Not when there's so much at stake for our progressive movement. That’s why we’re reaching out to our most dedicated supporters with a big ask: One of the most effective ways to re-elect Pramila and prepare for attacks from right-wing groups who want her out of Congress is by making a monthly contribution. With less than 90 days until the 2024 primaries, now is the time to strengthen our recurring donor base. We need to be prepared to fight back against the GOP, who will stop at nothing to silence Pramila and our movement.** Thank you, Team Pramila P.S. If you are unable to commit to a monthly contribution at this time, we completely understand. | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

# **Only 50 Copies Left**********
---
| | | Fellow Patriot,

We’ve got a **LIMITED NUMBER** of signed copies of my book, _As Goes California_ , and you can reserve yours RIGHT NOW.

[All you need to do is donate $47 or more – the next president will be America’s 47th – TODAY to receive a personalized VIP edition of my book.](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=a485d09a6c&e=0be619cbaa)

There are just 50 copies left, so you don’t want to miss out on the opportunity to secure yours.

In _As Goes California_ , you’ll discover how leftwing politicians, promising to look after the best interests of Californians, have instead turned one of the world’s most beautiful and aspirational places into a public policy nightmare. From needle-covered streets riddled with homelessness and despair to floods of illegal immigrants overwhelming our public services, Democrats have transformed my home state into somewhere totally unrecognizable to those who love it.

And if they’re not stopped, they’ll do the same to our country. Their radical policies of grievance and division are already tearing our country apart. And the American people deserve better.

You know the media won’t tell you the real story, but in _As Goes California_ , you’ll get the truth. Featuring a foreword from leading commentator Candace Owens, this critical guide to the political landscape comes out next month, but as a valued supporter of my campaign, you can reserve your personalized edition today.

[Don’t delay. Reserve your signed VIP copy of my book now! ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=fc4d83cbd5&e=0be619cbaa)

Thank you for your support,

Larry Elder
GOP Candidate for President

name: Our Revolution
subject: QUICK ACTION: sign to support anti-corruption plan for congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis —

The American public’s approval of Congress is the lowest it’s been in nearly a decade. Can we blame them? We’re still feeling the aftermath of a global pandemic, we’re on the brink of a recession with millions of Americans crippled by healthcare and education debt, and the climate crisis worsens daily.

And yet, Congress can’t govern. A lion’s share of the blame goes to House Republicans, who sabotaged themselves by removing the Speaker and are still wasting our time and taxpayer money, but that isn't the only issue. Across both parties and across the chambers — too many politicians have lost sight of why they are in Washington: to represent We the People.

Unfortunately, it seems that a great many politicians are more concerned with pleasing the donor class, making a snarky comment on social media, or perpetuating the revolving door from Congress to K Street. In other words, they are putting self-interest and special interests ahead of public interest.

Corruption has become a widespread part of politics, from the Supreme Court to local office, to the halls of Congress, and it must be addressed. Sign our petition now: We must fix our broken political system. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10670?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231020_PT_khannaswap_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_khannaswappt&t=1011&akid=4811%2E5885482%2Ez9JEKf)

We support Congressman Ro Khanna’s anti-corruption plan that will ban all PAC and lobbyist money from Congress; ban members of Congress from trading stocks; enact term limits for members of Congress and Supreme Court Justices; and ban Congress members from ever becoming lobbyists. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10670?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231020_PT_khannaswap_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_khannaswappt&t=1012&akid=4811%2E5885482%2Ez9JEKf)

It’s time to eliminate corruption, big money and dysfunction from the halls of Congress.

Sign if you agree: We must take action to eradicate corruption in Congress. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10670?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231020_PT_khannaswap_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_khannaswappt&t=1013&akid=4811%2E5885482%2Ez9JEKf)

Thanks,
Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20231020_PT_khannaswap_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_khannaswappt.-1PzvQ&t=1008&akid=4811%2E5885482%2Ez9JEKf ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the

name: Team WFP
subject: The WFP October Newsletter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Here's we’ve been up to in our fight to build a world where everyone can thrive. | | | Peter, We’re back with the WFP Newsletter — your inside look at what’s happening in our party, and how we’re organizing towards a world where our elected leaders have working people’s backs. There’s a lot to catch up on since our last roundup, so let's get to it!
* * *
**_OUR RESPONSE TO THE HUMANITARIAN CRISIS IN GAZA_** Following recent attacks in Israel and Palestine, we expressed our heartbreak at the thousands of civilian lives lost and joined courageous champions in Congress in support of a resolution calling for immediate de-escalation and ceasefire in Israel and occupied Palestine and to send humanitarian aid and assistance to Gaza. [**If you haven't yet, take a minute to send an email to your member of Congress urging them to call for a ceasefire and de-escalation in order to save as many lives as possible.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ5bxrMh6DpGopZ2QuEF3QSjxgFjnZkTlKuevgZGzwTncKET1nqgy_6Ew0y5LsY3EHxeTQztd4SPO8U6Aohnhjdp6s98epChsp8ylNiZAgyDLzWyDvSoC3xABDxHM_J0mOEaUDrSJcMZNakXwnpV2XgzcgC_rliYhiBjixzrc9rsIN_zzdrD3Ei6_xO7VtBVZqbOm1K_6hTbuY_KRe_Uu_IgTil5Gl4UutpLj3ABQsVa3uAxIoj-f5XwRwKZ2N_Ipd_1TrVlqQWHyrTU9GIguzj1DFybk8OI7uwMFUJ5GbCksA/40m/5RcbX2TQTbaAirmi6AiAgA/h0/GaH5nHNYZKTpRhSLdYS_LGxFx3Gt8Enr-DrNfvFwq_Q) Or text **CEASEFIRE** to **30403** to be connected to your member of Congress' office via phone and urge them to support a ceasefire now. [**You can also read our latest statement on the attacks here.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/eR1oNBZ1lqoGbKL8pO4doAtQzV2m9XbyXfBQTSZ7hkWsN8RjMe9fhg8EZvyOd1nq3Z1i4uDOv0IefQ6YAlRb2nu8Y-PRuB0A0CooOvLg5DiNt1I6yTc6Bz7qlK-DugH_8geSesktXtp_wCkc8-6A6zhDPfSxBiydjVGGk3MF8TI4xlMJacMBj0PtaiJAr1Ax0mYaalCJuOGnidPSjd9RJasNJZTrWBokiJ_ByJ6CkS3EC1Lz_0tIbBR4N8y0PNHUGAbjH_y1wMWFJr_IkDOUcjcxhC9WIxvojTZ-FYbnR7pWlF-23Qw8LzXznP2otfJFEDkfRYD4p3fPtG2BVJNI5Q/40m/5RcbX2TQTbaAirmi6AiAgA/h1/VVU38jbWPWmmtbBaZKU1ET6jrNOsPWjyNJzYjwAY2GA)
* * *
**_A BOATLOAD OF NEW ENDORSEMENTS_** With the 2023 General Election less than three weeks away, and the 2024 election cycle just around the corner — we’re officially in the _thick_ of election season, Peter. And we’re continuing to endorse and organize on the ground for candidates who will fight for our values. **First up, we announced over a dozen new endorsements in Virginia** , where we have a crucial opportunity to take back power from Republicans and protect abortion access this year. With newly drawn districts and every seat in the legislature up for election, Virginia is one of the biggest battlegrounds of the year. We’re gearing up for a showdown against MAGA Republicans who will ban abortion if they’re allowed to win a trifecta next month. And we’re throwing down to elect leaders who can kick the GOP out of power. [**To see our full list of endorsed candidates in Virginia click here.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMdk0Xc5F3XT7oWSkA6eoLltu-r1aK4hmboFs6qLXTqHVMHZBW27X33q6yRa0Pb7gznFVevVar_nQSKG-Qp7uBond2HRZge49GbbxM-zWDIqOlcYyeeaOk2zpPFobCzYS5BtpFNfZ6bsViv2PGimJqvHxQVCmpMPlzt6Q1PvQ2cOXKy5DZjs3f_U4GnmQ6ze5xCNYfFj9a40KJp_JvKaUm9BYtOwiC1m65uD1dtm7i-K9kWUfAJWITcJm4HdyRc089BcD3aHGj1wOwc7q8zTb-hX5qisLCtr9TwGIc8DnYom/40m/5RcbX2TQTbaAirmi6AiAgA/h2/JrcHplxHQkyivuFkOn4Y3bpJLlGYNqZY05-64i8aN7E) We’re also excited to share our endorsements for local leaders on the ballot this year who are trying to make a change in their cities in**Georgia, New Hampshire, New Mexico, North Carolina** and**Washington.** ****[**You can check out all of our endorsed candidates here.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMdk0Xc5F3XT7oWSkA6eoLltu-r1aK4hmboFs6qLXTqHCvnGvuC8sTaqs67b-9Lq9ygfXjSbWxPnIX6BSvCNhx3o3KuECbRMnPs7jSo3XhB6EaaESOjInNaY5joxsm77lXf-q5NfnaFxpD_ZZseGC3eFgCdkbMmVPAYcO-ZyMFC6AWSc61RLDxfnQNITaQu10APdTrUoVJTv4shDIHL7NdsKtH0DMr5O80YuM_ym1WBK-edZ1p9jkya4Js88tgIP6VyiuP65heD2zVtHB0L_-qQ6ecLonV6PaNyCMVAKOpOz/40m/5RcbX2TQTbaAirmi6AiAgA/h3/j7Ii8-jPvIQYX_cykJxRaDzw3ZVpnz0MuuZBJjc5pnA) **Finally, looking ahead to the 2024 election cycle, we were also proud to roll out our support for Rep. Summer Lee** — one of the most progressive members of Congress to ever serve Pennsylvania — as she runs for re-election in the U.S. House. Whether it’s co-sponsoring legislation to raise hazard pay and strengthen protections for health care workers, or advocating for a federal CROWN Act to ban discrimination against Black hairstyles at work and school, or rejecting exorbitant military spending sprees and tax breaks for the richest one percent — Summer has been an invaluable ally to our movement. And like many of our WFP champions, she’s fighting _tirelessly_ to bring us closer to the fairer world we all believe in. And that’s your update on our latest endorsements, Peter!
* * *
**_PHILADELPHIA'S KENDRA BROOKS AND NICOLAS O’ROURKE NAB MAJOR ENDORSEMENT_** In Philadelphia’s closely-watched City Council race, Democratic U.S. Senator John Fetterman announced his endorsement of WFP's Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke. [**He told Philly Mag**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDHcw9QrRtHB93Cr-9fiYEgOhaSJdAF1c-fYpJlW63vvcKoFxuj9BvmizVGo2knzgWONimDt30xSEPmY0P7J8snSag9IGKTBh1VZiIp_YGe4iSZZxxYv21RVQ73qOC1fW7P2GNEHz_XhMyaOd95cD_-Od6Pzwf0u_uq_wcDxZVjNHyCtihO4p7ppkph2Asw9T0A0Kic8AoBGF-YNJv8HDY_zBcZYxR_c712FQJvuDIW1NA8kCfw8e93GzK6CdOgDG9b5YX543UBLgRcCZcmCNG6S4J9HSlrjMtPs7G4avNt4tao5IJNS-U9rrfJGPcI424jzKfJOjVYOgzssZ36tNRxNWr5UVGmOhlMJ_OSv7__in/40m/5RcbX2TQTbaAirmi6AiAgA/h4/J6ughC6xDc-oS0Drl0v2-_OrIXJTmoTX06bmM0MG3ow), “I’m proud to support this slate and join the big coalition they are building. As Senator, I want partners in government in Philadelphia and throughout our commonwealth who are champions in putting working families over billionaires and corporate donors.” Over the next two months, we’ll keep working hard to elect Kendra and Nic on the WFP line to build a city for many — and kick Republicans off the City Council!
* * *
**_WFP’S FIRST NATIONAL CONVENTION IN PHILADELPHIA_** This month, we held our _first_ -ever national convention in Philadelphia — where more than 70 elected officials, and hundreds of attendees, including labor representatives, organizers, activists, and artists from around the country joined us to chart the next chapter for our party. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMdk0Xc5F3XT7oWSkA6eoLmcdZ23AySIW5Jf_mmbElqKWu5jmqyAfuJwdgOOxh0WQoHjvGqKZQjzdnyPbbc45s-IPmlCPf_bcOF1dPUC4U-1HEqkVYf-NG5NKHimOQ-ROYx-1NXDwMGtLobt6UCnIBO0775k6taMgfj9Lx0_DFHOch5CYtBO-CFTQYwMDfWIHB9BggBnj4GnvXW892NcZWvRIpepprYcj-rC4sPe9JDZUpUd-Q7zX6xWPVrGmje6OFuclFdnlyKJrrNyzfr-w1TzmMv2ATMQtVDFie8U1A1c/40m/5RcbX2TQTbaAirmi6AiAgA/h5/gaH5NNA0QhmiPxKZ2lDZjxx0fb5JnWug9vhxI0addJk) Notable speakers throughout the weekend-long event included Rep. Summer Lee (PA), Rep. Delia Ramirez (IL), Rep. Greg Casar (TX), Mayor Brandon Johnson (Chicago), and more. [**You can view recordings of the live-streamed sessions from the convention here.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMdk0Xc5F3XT7oWSkA6eoLmcdZ23AySIW5Jf_mmbElqKJdgEHgY3QemjE-R_TxkfNYMGczUeb22uDgqpGwskWrvHuRipERxdaYki8nNHVH6D_qduexaoF_vrKuve6Y4QBhGbFm6McyyvgqEAupx9kmx_Vao36_lSy4tASk4uJx9WUpidGte9FXy2z1eWZh0SePPZsiURwwCrxQ8bpoxjO2JEguRy1dAoyyxVg4PdCbZDwMJrx_A7psDlfhQ_7ImxpGTD_Qk9_kE5-HrGPJqs7wzabeddeJcwd93CDdNCk0k_/40m/5RcbX2TQTbaAirmi6AiAgA/h6/15Zml6OqcU2aVWzsA21wAdUchzO3hCIZAVJ4TRIXzrs)
* * *
**_INTRODUCING NEW MEMBERS OF TEAM WFP_** **This month in Georgia, New York, and Wisconsin we welcomed**** _four_****new incredible progressive leaders to Team WFP to take our movement in these states to the next level:** **Karen Rene'** joined the Georgia Working Families Party as the chapter's first state director.**** With years of municipal leadership experience as a City Councilmember and Mayor Pro Tem in East Point, Georgia, Karen is uniquely positioned to lead the Georgia WFP team in a consequential election year. **Ana María Archila** and **Jasmine Gripper** joined the New York Working Families Party team as the chapter’s new Co-Directors. Ana María and Jasmine bring years of executive and organizing experience and we couldn’t be more excited to have them lead our New York party. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ6fLXmBUyHrX3VncDucuTVGAvAOs8oGse-X0p8qJdEtJ8WLojMbRDglG3rv_gVUWtxI40XRl-hiYprNd2btlyMJbHCudqne_q5qmvRuuzgDBDqMHmRUEEjsA7XemsGKotm7mMM6uxLc2LKcoUmmPOMon_j6FSklnz7UuGN4ICc805bO9X5wmSMspnAtOHWQHD0YnMsePeCR3CjnZjQnxqGirLntqmGw0y3LcAXT4x1Wk2YFrccpX4mXqvMlWk3ZcfrrF6UG7inyXgMVN_vspP74rs85SY33e1n-Z83xCg_cmBC16D3_2J80t5hDzc2Artw78fH2gwDGjX4MhOJNHHrB/40m/5RcbX2TQTbaAirmi6AiAgA/h7/wNuEzkhLEI_uZz6My10h_1bfQSaR0lEyJgMGUneSMXc) Their experiences — one a daughter of Queens who has organized working class parents, the other a proud Colombian immigrant who has fought for workers’ rights — have made clear to them the need for a party that reflects the hopes and aspirations of New York’s multi-racial working class. [**Read more about their backgrounds and sign a card welcoming them to the party.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ6fLXmBUyHrX3VncDucuTVGAvAOs8oGse-X0p8qJdEtJ8WLojMbRDglG3rv_gVUWtxI40XRl-hiYprNd2btlyMJbHCudqne_q5qmvRuuzgDBDqMHmRUEEjsA7XemsGKotm7mMM6uxLc2LKcoUmmPOMo2uv9aZuNeqNTEmKZSdFsQJYTUtsTm7P0hXk_B-3mb7Rq1sx_B8QW5UBTC9kc5EgS5l6RLklpr4tvQi0eF1kKpqdLjD_XTqO_5-XrJe3rRQKweu_IV1BflW3edo0Le6UViW-nbzjOKldBgp9YvCKqtYRYyZ_Bfruv1bRmDpAwm8i8ia9lONTRyHNoo2ZWZGdh/40m/5RcbX2TQTbaAirmi6AiAgA/h8/ussYBPTe3coFYs7JysOyYLPBX8ErnR3HQZO5n3FJCO0) And last but not least, **Corinne Rosen** joined the Working Families Party team as the new State Director for Wisconsin. Corinne is a dedicated organizer and respected labor leader hailing from Milwaukee. With over 15 years of experience spearheading progressive campaigns at all levels of government, she brings a wealth of knowledge and passion to the role. As State Director, Corinne will focus on expanding WFP's reach across Wisconsin. She plans to build a diverse, statewide board to lead endorsement efforts and recruit more working-class, Black, brown, and progressive candidates to run for office.
* * *
**_Spotlight on WFP Member Brigith Rivera_** My first encounter with WFP was through my organizing work in support of healthcare for all immigrants in Connecticut. CT WFP has been an ally in this fight and through this advocacy work I realized the importance of electing leaders who would support basic human rights. As both a proud Hartford resident and WFP ally I was excited to learn that CT WFP was supporting three amazing candidates for Hartford City Council, Josh Mitchom, Tiana Hercules, and Alex Thomas. During this election cycle, I've enjoyed knocking doors and making calls to Hartford voters in support of the WFP slate and sharing the importance of this year's election. The party has become a space where I can advocate for my community at the legislature and at the ballot!
* * *

clean_body: Here's we’ve been up to in our fight to build a world where everyone can thrive. | | | Peter, We’re back with the WFP Newsletter — your inside look at what’s happening in our party, and how we’re organizing towards a world where our elected leaders have working people’s backs. There’s a lot to catch up on since our last roundup, so let's get to it! OUR RESPONSE TO THE HUMANITARIAN CRISIS IN GAZA Following recent attacks in Israel and Palestine, we expressed our heartbreak at the thousands of civilian lives lost and joined courageous champions in Congress in support of a resolution calling for immediate de-escalation and ceasefire in Israel and occupied Palestine and to send humanitarian aid and assistance to Gaza. Or text CEASEFIRE to 30403 to be connected to your member of Congress' office via phone and urge them to support a ceasefire now. A BOATLOAD OF NEW ENDORSEMENTS With the 2023 General Election less than three weeks away, and the 2024 election cycle just around the corner — we’re officially in the thick of election season, Peter. And we’re continuing to endorse and organize on the ground for candidates who will fight for our values. First up, we announced over a dozen new endorsements in Virginia , where we have a crucial opportunity to take back power from Republicans and protect abortion access this year. With newly drawn districts and every seat in the legislature up for election, Virginia is one of the biggest battlegrounds of the year. We’re gearing up for a showdown against MAGA Republicans who will ban abortion if they’re allowed to win a trifecta next month. And we’re throwing down to elect leaders who can kick the GOP out of power. We’re also excited to share our endorsements for local leaders on the ballot this year who are trying to make a change in their cities inGeorgia, New Hampshire, New Mexico, North Carolina andWashington. ** Finally, looking ahead to the 2024 election cycle, we were also proud to roll out our support for Rep. Summer Lee — one of the most progressive members of Congress to ever serve Pennsylvania — as she runs for re-election in the U.S. House. Whether it’s co-sponsoring legislation to raise hazard pay and strengthen protections for health care workers, or advocating for a federal CROWN Act to ban discrimination against Black hairstyles at work and school, or rejecting exorbitant military spending sprees and tax breaks for the richest one percent — Summer has been an invaluable ally to our movement. And like many of our WFP champions, she’s fighting tirelessly to bring us closer to the fairer world we all believe in. And that’s your update on our latest endorsements, Peter! PHILADELPHIA'S KENDRA BROOKS AND NICOLAS O’ROURKE NAB MAJOR ENDORSEMENT In Philadelphia’s closely-watched City Council race, Democratic U.S. Senator John Fetterman announced his endorsement of WFP's Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke. , “I’m proud to support this slate and join the big coalition they are building. As Senator, I want partners in government in Philadelphia and throughout our commonwealth who are champions in putting working families over billionaires and corporate donors.” Over the next two months, we’ll keep working hard to elect Kendra and Nic on the WFP line to build a city for many — and kick Republicans off the City Council! WFP’S FIRST NATIONAL CONVENTION IN PHILADELPHIA This month, we held our first -ever national convention in Philadelphia — where more than 70 elected officials, and hundreds of attendees, including labor representatives, organizers, activists, and artists from around the country joined us to chart the next chapter for our party. Notable speakers throughout the weekend-long event included Rep. Summer Lee (PA), Rep. Delia Ramirez (IL), Rep. Greg Casar (TX), Mayor Brandon Johnson (Chicago), and more. INTRODUCING NEW MEMBERS OF TEAM WFP This month in Georgia, New York, and Wisconsin we welcomed fournew incredible progressive leaders to Team WFP to take our movement in these states to the next level: Karen Rene' joined the Georgia Working Families Party as the chapter's first state director.** With years of municipal leadership experience as a City Councilmember and Mayor Pro Tem in East Point, Georgia, Karen is uniquely positioned to lead the Georgia WFP team in a consequential election year. Ana María Archila and Jasmine Gripper joined the New York Working Families Party team as the chapter’s new Co-Directors. Ana María and Jasmine bring years of executive and organizing experience and we couldn’t be more excited to have them lead our New York party. Their experiences — one a daughter of Queens who has organized working class parents, the other a proud Colombian immigrant who has fought for workers’ rights — have made clear to them the need for a party that reflects the hopes and aspirations of New York’s multi-racial working class. And last but not least, Corinne Rosen joined the Working Families Party team as the new State Director for Wisconsin. Corinne is a dedicated organizer and respected labor leader hailing from Milwaukee. With over 15 years of experience spearheading progressive campaigns at all levels of government, she brings a wealth of knowledge and passion to the role. As State Director, Corinne will focus on expanding WFP's reach across Wisconsin. She plans to build a diverse, statewide board to lead endorsement efforts and recruit more working-class, Black, brown, and progressive candidates to run for office. Spotlight on WFP Member Brigith Rivera My first encounter with WFP was through my organizing work in support of healthcare for all immigrants in Connecticut. CT WFP has been an ally in this fight and through this advocacy work I realized the importance of electing leaders who would support basic human rights. As both a proud Hartford resident and WFP ally I was excited to learn that CT WFP was supporting three amazing candidates for Hartford City Council, Josh Mitchom, Tiana Hercules, and Alex Thomas. During this election cycle, I've enjoyed knocking doors and making calls to Hartford voters in support of the WFP slate and sharing the importance of this year's election. The party has become a space where I can advocate for my community at the legislature and at the ballot! UPCOMING EVENTS Today, October 21st at 2 PM ET/11 AM PT, join WFP members for our monthly Welcome Gathering! Whether this is your first Welcome Gathering or you never miss a meeting, we’d love to see you as we build community and get concrete about how we’re growing the power we need to have an impact locally and nationally in this political movement. This Tuesday, October 24th at 6 PM ET/3 PM PT, our national text team will be reaching voters about priority races coming up, and the amazing candidates working to make this a country where everyone can thrive. No experience necessary! We’ll provide all the training you need to get started, and our organizers will be on deck for any questions you may have. Thanks for joining us for another busy month building this people-powered movement! To keep up the fight, we rely on people like you pitching in $10 or whatever they can to make sure that we have the resources to win these campaigns and pass the legislation that our communities need. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

Friend,
Earlier this week, a massive protest broke out in one of the Congressional office buildings in Washington, D.C. with protesters calling for a ceasefire between Israel and the terror group, Hamas.
There were no calls for a ceasefire in the days and weeks that followed 9/11 – and for good reason.
Could you imagine protesters telling the American people not to bring Osama bin Laden to justice??

Israel is at war because they were attacked, and now they’re defending themselves.
Hamas alone is responsible for putting Palestinians in harm’s way.
Attempts to sanitize or whitewash the savagery Israel faced earlier this month at the hands of Hamas are despicable. The facts are undeniable.
The U.S. MUST support Israel as they work to defend their own people and deliver justice where justice is due.

clean_body: | | | | Hamas alone is responsible for putting Palestinians in harm’s way Friend, Earlier this week, a massive protest broke out in one of the Congressional office buildings in Washington, D.C. with protesters calling for a ceasefire between Israel and the terror group, Hamas. There were no calls for a ceasefire in the days and weeks that followed 9/11 – and for good reason. Could you imagine protesters telling the American people not to bring Osama bin Laden to justice?? Israel is at war because they were attacked, and now they’re defending themselves. Hamas alone is responsible for putting Palestinians in harm’s way. Attempts to sanitize or whitewash the savagery Israel faced earlier this month at the hands of Hamas are despicable. The facts are undeniable. The U.S. MUST support Israel as they work to defend their own people and deliver justice where justice is due. | – Team Cassidy Team Cassidy PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898 == \-

Friend,
As I’ve said before, Biden’s Federal Gag Order against me is ultimately about silencing YOU.
Crooked Joe wants to stop the Silent Majority from having a voice in deciding our nation’s future.
That’s why it’s never been more important for Americans everywhere to speak up.

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Dr. Brian Williams
Date: Tuesday, Oct 17, 2023
Subject: Your voice is front and center in our campaign. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71958856/433810643/-1747465675?ms=em23_231022_Q4Kick_fnd_gq_act___DBW4T_ettx&refcode=em23_231022_Q4Kick_fnd_gq_act___DBW4T_ettx&source=em23_231022_Q4Kick_fnd_gq_act___DBW4T_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231022_Q4Kick_fnd_gq_act___DBW4T_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=3DxcH9IRYuMshnTQ03OEJTC1dnw+J1sC0kWi6/zlTp82bF/IF7wofRaGTuJcRtXN9Uv6s+d2ZG0iIRlQVXmhkisykMRhw4IvQR+v7hO8mNjBWVLwCE9xE67U1ngfn8j4unyoCcapGxzBUAl9uga5SQ==&refcode2=3edc81ee-2870-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2VkYzgxZWUtMjg3MC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0VYuQ7jazHwunw3HNNiGmLmQ6JiV86IqPkj-H5I0RVY=&emci=bc8ed9e0-546f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=3edc81ee-2870-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572)
Team, our communities face many issues we can solve with courageous action from bold representatives in Washington.

We deserve leaders who aren’t beholden to the gun lobby and will pass meaningful gun safety legislation to save lives. We deserve leaders who understand the healthcare barriers families face. And we deserve leaders who will always prioritize people over special interests. In short, we deserve leaders who will fight for the future we deserve.

In my earliest days as a cadet at the United States Air Force Academy, I internalized the value of service before self. **After years of serving my country in the military and serving my community in the trauma bay, I am answering the call to serve YOU in Congress.**

**[Your voice is front and center in our campaign, so tell me what’s on your mind. Let me know the issues you care about by filling out this brief fourth quarter priorities survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71958861/433810646/-1747465675?ms=em23_231022_Q4Kick_fnd_gq_act___DBW4T_ettx&refcode=em23_231022_Q4Kick_fnd_gq_act___DBW4T_ettx&source=em23_231022_Q4Kick_fnd_gq_act___DBW4T_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231022_Q4Kick_fnd_gq_act___DBW4T_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=3DxcH9IRYuMshnTQ03OEJTC1dnw+J1sC0kWi6/zlTp82bF/IF7wofRaGTuJcRtXN9Uv6s+d2ZG0iIRlQVXmhkisykMRhw4IvQR+v7hO8mNjBWVLwCE9xE67U1ngfn8j4unyoCcapGxzBUAl9uga5SQ==&refcode2=3edc81ee-2870-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2VkYzgxZWUtMjg3MC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0VYuQ7jazHwunw3HNNiGmLmQ6JiV86IqPkj-H5I0RVY=&emci=bc8ed9e0-546f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=3edc81ee-2870-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71958864/433810652/-1747465675?ms=em23_231022_Q4Kick_fnd_gq_act___DBW4T_ettx&refcode=em23_231022_Q4Kick_fnd_gq_act___DBW4T_ettx&source=em23_231022_Q4Kick_fnd_gq_act___DBW4T_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231022_Q4Kick_fnd_gq_act___DBW4T_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=3DxcH9IRYuMshnTQ03OEJTC1dnw+J1sC0kWi6/zlTp82bF/IF7wofRaGTuJcRtXN9Uv6s+d2ZG0iIRlQVXmhkisykMRhw4IvQR+v7hO8mNjBWVLwCE9xE67U1ngfn8j4unyoCcapGxzBUAl9uga5SQ==&refcode2=3edc81ee-2870-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2VkYzgxZWUtMjg3MC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0VYuQ7jazHwunw3HNNiGmLmQ6JiV86IqPkj-H5I0RVY=&emci=bc8ed9e0-546f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=3edc81ee-2870-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572)

I have seen firsthand what is at stake, Peter. I am ready to fight for you and your family – for affordable healthcare, for reproductive rights, and to protect our communities from the epidemic of gun violence.

These issues drove me to run for office, but I want to hear about the issues that matter most to you. I am running to ensure _**your**_ voice is heard in Congress, and I look forward to reading all of your responses. **[Please, take a few minutes to share your priorities for the fourth quarter of the year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71958865/433810657/-1747465675?ms=em23_231022_Q4Kick_fnd_gq_act___DBW4T_ettx&refcode=em23_231022_Q4Kick_fnd_gq_act___DBW4T_ettx&source=em23_231022_Q4Kick_fnd_gq_act___DBW4T_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231022_Q4Kick_fnd_gq_act___DBW4T_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=3DxcH9IRYuMshnTQ03OEJTC1dnw+J1sC0kWi6/zlTp82bF/IF7wofRaGTuJcRtXN9Uv6s+d2ZG0iIRlQVXmhkisykMRhw4IvQR+v7hO8mNjBWVLwCE9xE67U1ngfn8j4unyoCcapGxzBUAl9uga5SQ==&refcode2=3edc81ee-2870-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2VkYzgxZWUtMjg3MC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0VYuQ7jazHwunw3HNNiGmLmQ6JiV86IqPkj-H5I0RVY=&emci=bc8ed9e0-546f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=3edc81ee-2870-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572)**

Onward,

Brian Williams

Hi. It’s Roland Gutierrez, the Democratic TX State Senator running against Ted Cruz for U.S. Senate.
Ted Cruz is not a serious person. He has no idea what is really going on in Texas, and no desire to actually help the people who live here.
Cruz supports “Operation Lone Star”, a political stunt that wastes taxpayer dollars on hurting migrants, all so he can get airtime on Fox News.
He’s hurting women and children. He wants to look and act tough, but we see this for what it really is: It’s wasteful and inhumane.
Texas deserves leaders who will tell the truth and work hard to find real solutions to the problems Texas is facing. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate — but I need your help.
My opponent is backed by right-wing extremists who will do whatever it takes to keep their man in power. I’m backed by grassroots supporters who want to see real change. So if you’re with me, please make a contribution of any amount to my campaign today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Can I share a story?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| An extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1360%2E35263%2EdNuud2)
Peter, can I tell you a story? When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public service, but I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly. [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-oct23.ejjIam&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231021_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1360%2E35263%2EdNuud2) Seeing others in the LGBTQ+ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they love — I came to realize that I could do both. I could run for office and be honest about who I am. **So that’s exactly what I did.** When I became the first openly gay Senator in our nation's history, I knew that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives. And from lowering prescription drug prices to protecting same-sex marriage through the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , that’s exactly what I’ve worked hard to do day in, day out in the Senate. That's why I ran for office in the first place — **not to make history, but to make a difference.** And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too. But with Republicans eager to roll back our progress on LGBTQ+ rights and more, I'm asking you again: **[Will you help me continue to make a difference in the U.S. Senate by pitching into my reelection campaign today? I’m counting on your support to keep up this fight and defend the progress we’ve made.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-oct23.ejjIam&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231021_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1360%2E35263%2EdNuud2)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2591?c0=tbe-em-oct23.QjRC4v&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231021_PM1_V1_S1%3Bamount%3D5&t=6&akid=1360%2E35263%2EdNuud2)

Last year, we defeated election deniers vying to become the TOP election official in key swing states across the country – including Arizona, Michigan, and Nevada. **Despite our historic victories, I’m here with an urgent alert: Donald Trump’s Big Lie that the election was stolen hasn’t gone away. In fact, it’s only getting worse.** Across the nation, right-wing extremists are pulling every trick in the book to pave the way for Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans to claim victory of elections, even if they do not receive the most votes. That’s why I’m reaching out, friend. At DASS, we’re working night and day to stop right-wing conspiracy theorists from winning office, so they won’t dismantle our democracy from the inside. But our Democratic secretaries are only as strong as the grassroots support we have behind us. And there has never been a more important time to support these champions of democracy. name: Gundry MD
subject: Dangers of eating spinach
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Spinach is often promoted as a
healthy green, but contains FAR more downsides than good sides...

Spinach is one of the highest
oxalate foods that's commonly eaten by modern humans (in addition
to beet greens, beets, almonds, and other veggies and nuts).

The amount of oxalates in a
serving of spinach is extremely high, up to 600 mg in a normal
sized bowl. The "safe" amount of oxalates in a daily diet
according to world renowned oxalate expert Sally Norton should be
between 100-200 mg per day total to avoid a lot of the health
problems caused by high oxalate plants.

So you can see how concerning
spinach is with these extremely high oxalate levels.

The problem with eating too much
oxalates too frequently is that it can cause serious issues such
as kidney stones, thyroid problems, gut damage, skin issues, and
joint pain.

In fact, some people have even
gotten "oxalate poisoning" by drinking green smoothies too often
and had to go to the ER for kidney failure.

In addition, the nutrients in
spinach such as calcium and iron are very poorly absorbed by the
human body, with a dismal 3-4% bioavailability. Compare that to
the very high bioavailability (high absorption) of nutrients like
iron and calcium in meat and dairy at 30-40% bioavailability.

Overall, I believe that spinach
has more cons than pros, and I avoid it. Dozens of my clients
and friends have also reported dramatically improved digestion
and less joint pain when eliminating leafy greens such as
spinach.

More problems with a particular
common vegetable below that could be damaging your gut and
hormones...

Broccoli vs Kale vs Green
Beans... (the #1 WORST veggie for your gut & energy)
According to the best-selling
author and world-renowned heart surgeon, Dr. Steven Gundry,
there's one veggie people over 40 should never eat.

This veggie can damage your gut
and disrupt your hormones... It contains a toxin that damages the
lining of your intestines, causes bloating, embarrassing gas, and
a bulging belly.

Do you know the veggie I'm
talking about? Make sure you do by clicking the one below you
think it is, and get the answer from Dr. Gundry himself on the
next page:

>> Green Beans

>> Broccoli

>> Kale

>> Cauliflower

DCDailyJournal.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

Reserved.

name: Christina Reynolds, EMILYs List
subject: FWD: What happened in the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
House Republicans need to get their act together. |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71959941/433814164/741744284?code=20231021_HouseApprovalSurveyKick&refcode2=WTENE1040&sourceid=1052165&refcode=20231021_HouseApprovalSurveyKick&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGQ1ZjgwYi0yYjcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hhn6cpFu0ptsHTcnuk43topGkRmLZvaqKnb7WKedMQk=&emci=61e99a97-4d6f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=3dd5f80b-2b70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Well, Peter, it's been almost two weeks since we wrote to you about the state of the U.S. House, and we're _still_ without a speaker.

Earlier this month, Trump loyalists led by Rep. Matt Gaetz ousted Kevin McCarthy as speaker of the House. Now, Republicans are unable to agree on a new speaker, bringing legislative activity to a _standstill_. We're reliving the weeks-long deliberations and dozen-plus votes leading to McCarthy's election in January. And this time, the stakes are even _higher_ , as a government shutdown looms next month.

The lesson here is crystal clear, Peter: **Republicans are willing to make the American people pay for the chaos and division of their own party.** **Join the *millions* of Democratic pro-choice Americans speaking out against House Republicans by taking our short survey today >>** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71959942/433814165/741744284?code=20231021_HouseApprovalSurveyKick&refcode2=WTENE1040&sourceid=1052165&refcode=20231021_HouseApprovalSurveyKick&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGQ1ZjgwYi0yYjcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hhn6cpFu0ptsHTcnuk43topGkRmLZvaqKnb7WKedMQk=&emci=61e99a97-4d6f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=3dd5f80b-2b70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)
---
Thanks for taking a stand,

Christina Reynolds (she/her/hers)
Senior Vice President of Communications and Content, EMILYs List

_\----------Original Message---------
From: EMILYs List
Sent: Wed. Oct. 11, 2023_
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71959943/433814166/741744284?code=20231021_HouseApprovalSurveyKick&refcode2=WTENE1040&sourceid=1052165&refcode=20231021_HouseApprovalSurveyKick&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGQ1ZjgwYi0yYjcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hhn6cpFu0ptsHTcnuk43topGkRmLZvaqKnb7WKedMQk=&emci=61e99a97-4d6f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=3dd5f80b-2b70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)
After months of Republican infighting, House members voted to remove Kevin McCarthy as speaker last Tuesday, stalling most congressional activity and throwing the party into chaos. And the people responsible for bringing our democracy to a halt are _proud_ of their work!

**We need to know where this pro-choice community stands, Peter. Take our short survey on the House Republicans' agenda now >>**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71959944/433814167/741744284?code=20231021_HouseApprovalSurveyKick&refcode2=WTENE1040&sourceid=1052165&refcode=20231021_HouseApprovalSurveyKick&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGQ1ZjgwYi0yYjcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hhn6cpFu0ptsHTcnuk43topGkRmLZvaqKnb7WKedMQk=&emci=61e99a97-4d6f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=3dd5f80b-2b70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)
---
Peter, House Republicans are in complete chaos.

After months of Republican infighting and threats from Trump loyalists, former House Speaker Kevin McCarthy became the first speaker to be ousted _in American history_.

Americans have been paying the price for a dysfunctional House majority since early January. Republicans spent _weeks_ in disarray before eventually electing former Speaker McCarthy, and their scramble to find a new speaker means yet _another_ government shutdown is on the horizon.

This chaos is exactly what we can expect from today's Republican party, Peter: These are politicians who **simply cannot govern**. Americans need representatives in Congress who will fight for our fundamental rights and protect our democracy — _not destroy them_.
**We're asking pro-choice activists across the country to weigh in. Do you approve of the House under Republican leadership?**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71959945/433814168/741744284?code=20231021_HouseApprovalSurveyKick&refcode2=WTENE1040&sourceid=1052165&refcode=20231021_HouseApprovalSurveyKick&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGQ1ZjgwYi0yYjcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hhn6cpFu0ptsHTcnuk43topGkRmLZvaqKnb7WKedMQk=&emci=61e99a97-4d6f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=3dd5f80b-2b70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)
---
Thank you for making your voice heard,

the EMILYs List team

# EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office.

|

name: Allred HQ
subject: The odds are stacked against us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend – when Colin ran for Congress in 2018, the odds were stacked against him.

His opponent was a Republican Congressman who had held his seat for 11 terms. Colin and our team put everything we had into the campaign – but just 48 days from the election, **the polls gave Colin a 10% chance of winning, and the district was leaning Republican.**

In the last days of the campaign, Colin worked day and night to connect with Texans and earn their votes. He slowly chipped away at his opponent's lead as voters got to know him.

**By Election Day, he had a 37% chance of victory. And when the numbers finally came in, he won with 52% of the vote.** | [Split a donation between the Voter Protection Project and Colin Allred to defeat Ted Cruz →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55469?t=6&akid=11369%2E878179%2E74iT2I)
---
Folks, this time around we're facing an even bigger opponent: Ted Cruz. But we're starting this race with much better odds. Polls show Colin just 5 points down with 14% of voters undecided.

**What's more, Ted Cruz only won reelection by 2.6% last time.

We have a clear path to victory, and all it's going to take is connecting with enough undecided voters. That's why Colin is on the road traveling to every corner of Texas, shaking every hand he can and listening to what voters have to say.**

[But voter outreach on this massive scale is expensive. That's why Colin's counting on grassroots supporters like you to help him do it, so please: Can you split a donation of $10 between Colin and the Voter Protection Project before our midnight fundraising deadline to help us reach the undecided voters we need to fire Ted Cruz? →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55469?t=7&akid=11369%2E878179%2E74iT2I)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55470?t=8&akid=11369%2E878179%2E74iT2I)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55471?t=9&akid=11369%2E878179%2E74iT2I)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55472?t=10&akid=11369%2E878179%2E74iT2I)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55473?t=11&akid=11369%2E878179%2E74iT2I)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55469?t=12&akid=11369%2E878179%2E74iT2I)
\- Team Allred
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11369%2E878179%2E74iT2I). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11369%2E878179%2E74iT2I).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11369%2E878179%2E74iT2I) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=11369%2E878179%2E74iT2I). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11369%2E878179%2E74iT2I)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=11369%2E878179%2E74iT2I)

**[Do you approve of the proposed gag order against Donald Trump?](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/gag-order-poll?source=FFR_20231021_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20324%2E4449941%2ETDEf9H)** | **[YES »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/gag-order-poll?source=FFR_20231021_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20324%2E4449941%2ETDEf9H)**
