name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: An explanation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

You may have noticed we’ve been in touch more often this week asking you
to financially support Justice Democrats and our incumbents in Congress,
as the violence in Israel and Palestine worsens. This is a longer email,
but I want to take a moment to explain why.

We are collectively witnessing the state of Israel commit public ethnic
cleansing of Palestinians in Gaza after a long history of violent
occupation and nearly two decades of blockading. What we — our elected
officials, our media, and ourselves as individuals — do in this moment
will undoubtedly have life-changing impacts for generations to come.

While we and every Justice Democrats candidate condemn last week’s attacks
on Israeli citizens and mourn every innocent Israeli and Palestinian life
taken, we know that collective punishment against 2.2 million Palestinians
(half of whom are under the age of 18) is NOT the answer.

That’s why Justice Democrats-endorsed Representatives Cori Bush, Ilhan
Omar, Rashida Tlaib, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee,
Ayanna Pressley, Pramila Jayapal, and Greg Casar are calling for
de-escalation through a ceasefire and for urgent delivery of humanitarian
aid to Gaza.

You wouldn’t think standing up for human rights and pleading for peace
would generate condemnation and hate — but that is what we’ve received
from Republicans as well as many members of our own party.

The Democratic Party has historically protected incumbents at all costs —
we know this first-hand after being black-listed by the DCCC for
supporting progressive primary challengers and facing multi-million
dollars of AIPAC-fueled attack ads. But this week, they are attacking
their own incumbent members with vitriol for criticizing human rights
abuses and calling for an end to bloodshed.

Justice Democrats like Summer Lee were first elected by the people of
their districts in major primary upsets while running on a platform
opposing the violent occupation of Palestine and stopping unconditional
military aid to Israel and other forever wars.

AIPAC spent millions trying to stop them and failed. Now, AIPAC is already
recruiting candidates to challenge these progressive incumbents, while
AIPAC-funded officials like Rep. Josh Gottheimer verbally attack them and
Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries remains silent.

We know the truth: It was never about protecting incumbents — it was about
protecting anyone willing to maintain the status quo.

Now, we stand at a crossroads. The Democratic establishment can choose to
keep attacking their own colleagues, but Justice Democrats and our
collective of progressive Congressmembers will not stop fighting for what
is right, no matter what comes our way.

That’s why we’ve been asking for grassroots contributions from folks like
you in this critical moment: we are powered by people, and the only way
we’re going to re-elect our incumbents and usher in the next generation of
progressive leaders who will unapologetically stand up for Palestinian
human rights is with your help.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231021-1.wu3959&refcode=em20231021-31455&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=31455%2E1203867%2EIFDKqM ]If you can afford to, please make a donation of $3 or
more to fuel Justice Democrats and defend progressive leaders standing on
the right side of history as we face an onslaught of attacks before the
2024 elections.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231021-1.wu3959&refcode=em20231021-31455&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=31455%2E1203867%2EIFDKqM ]Contribute $3

Without you, there would likely not be a coalition of progressives in
Congress right now standing in solidarity with the people of Palestine
during this pivotal moment in history. The list of ceasefire resolution
cosponsors is growing as we keep pressure on the Party to stand up for the
human rights of ALL.

Your support truly matters now more than ever.

Thank you,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1021&akid=31455%2E1203867%2EIFDKqM ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1022&akid=31455%2E1203867%2EIFDKqM ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231021-31455-footer&t=1023&refcode2=31455_1203867_IFDKqM&akid=31455%2E1203867%2EIFDKqM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=31455%2E1203867%2EIFDKqM

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Andy Kim
subject: The US Senate must vote on expulsion.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
This has to stop.Recently, Senator Menendez was indicted for acting as an unregistered agent of a foreign government.

Before I came to Congress, I worked in national security. I swore an oath to defend our constitution at all costs. So when I read the new indictment against Senator Bob Menendez, I had no doubt what needed to happen.

Because of the severity of the charges against him, I think the US Senate should vote to expel Senator Menendez.

As I've said before, I believe that holding elected office is a sacred trust and that elected officials ought to be held to a higher standard. I am hopeful that the judicial system will work thoroughly and quickly to bring the truth to light. Until then, Senator Menendez should not continue to represent the people of New Jersey in the United States Senate.

This is my Senator. He represents me, my family, and our state.

New Jerseyans need a Senator in this seat that we can trust beyond a shadow of a doubt to put the interests of our people, our state, and our country first.

I'm running against Senator Menendez to restore integrity in our politics. Please join me today by making a contribution, and we can build our movement for change together. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim-ak4nj?refcode=2023-10-21-menendezexpulsion-r&recurring=&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=57aee140-2e70-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

More soon,

Andy

clean_body: This has to stop.Recently, Senator Menendez was indicted for acting as an unregistered agent of a foreign government. Before I came to Congress, I worked in national security. I swore an oath to defend our constitution at all costs. So when I read the new indictment against Senator Bob Menendez, I had no doubt what needed to happen. Because of the severity of the charges against him, I think the US Senate should vote to expel Senator Menendez. As I've said before, I believe that holding elected office is a sacred trust and that elected officials ought to be held to a higher standard. I am hopeful that the judicial system will work thoroughly and quickly to bring the truth to light. Until then, Senator Menendez should not continue to represent the people of New Jersey in the United States Senate. This is my Senator. He represents me, my family, and our state. New Jerseyans need a Senator in this seat that we can trust beyond a shadow of a doubt to put the interests of our people, our state, and our country first. I'm running against Senator Menendez to restore integrity in our politics. Please join me today by making a contribution, and we can build our movement for change together. [] More soon, Andy Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: $5 [] $15 [] $25 [] $50 [] Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey

name: Tina Smith
subject: Does the news out of Washington feel worse than usual?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Folks — If you’ve felt like the news out of Washington lately has been especially tiring and chaotic, **you’re not alone.** In the last few weeks, the House GOP has been utterly dysfunctional. And while Democrats and Republicans might not always agree on the issues, the partisanship of late has been especially fierce. First, House Republicans nearly sent our federal government into a shutdown. At the 11th hour, they came up with a resolution — but one that lasts only 45 days, meaning we’re facing _another_ potential shutdown next month. Then, a far-right contingent of representatives ousted Republican Speaker Kevin McCarthy. Why? Hard to say. Their preferred alternative? Also hard to say. The House of Representatives has been without a Speaker for weeks now, and congressional Republicans are fighting amongst themselves over who should lead their caucus. Each nominee brought forward is more extreme than the next! Team, the level of dysfunction of late is quite disheartening. Senate Democrats are confirming judges across the country, supporting the labor movement, and working across the aisle to tackle the mental health crisis. **Meanwhile, progress is at a standstill in the House of Representatives.** **We need a reset, folks. It’s time for House Republicans to put the chaos behind them and move on.** **[But above all else, we need to protect our Democratic Senate Majority — because if not for our caucus, who knows how much more stagnant our government would be. Please, pitch in $10 or anything you can spare to help me defend our majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71961264/433819031/1669815119?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC45_20231021_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmJhZTI2Ny0yZTcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sGGv-pei1GWmGNXv8Y-Cse1waUhZ1LhBpX_n1qli1hk=)** Thank you for hearing me out — and let’s hope the House GOP gets their act together! * * *
The American people are aware of the corporate greed blocking their access to the American Dream. When corporations make record profits, the workforce should be seeing record wages.
But they are not.
In response, we’re seeing an historic wave of workers withholding their labor for better wages and working conditions. Workers see unions as critical to fixing our nation’s broken workplace where most workers have no power or agency at work.
**Union-endorsed Derek Marshall is running for Congress as a champion of the right to unionize without fear of penalty.**
Unlike his MAGA Republican opponent, Derek unequivocally affirms that every individual deserves a wage that reflects their worth and working conditions that uphold their humanity.
[**Stand with Derek and level the playing field between employers and employees. Sign the petition telling Congress to pass the PRO Act!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mFurkY0kDiItM_JEd2LzZNbEFwiqfHrfmrGCWxM9NBeJTahi4crNWavfPpDZwUF0cp0BSDFXC1OEf4gExr0nQYD7BrBPcQeEC3v3B7cLVMe3iIgfiS6kJr5MQ_NLKMWH4DNVqkbRbd1xk3AFe4_BAzbiqGk2VwSlKJVhrnHIjZYGMdv1vUlzSSEch0Sb7AQ_RP1rXzA1npUNqPRydfg4jVUJV2j_89yyZyVN3DsdmOob76SAHmW93SIMGWQLw8aLgLtspZhSSr-PHqFr8s2-piCpfJ9Ci_TaMUsur7nJn1KZ5i2celnrrvBSOHBOMtxCz_mCP0445RoakVtQAnO7yZrXqvYpc7onvm9oN5uP_lqzZq1C1UDnNqht58YFdkbyUtNbbUC5CjlDDCxxH_j_0_05Fvreth02vygFlN1yIS3NzYKnNMFuOhaNTknMWmJRHKdmj3P-cDD7PS4KzriA2ARhMjmMU7qhJL21ZZyZUdZWJeM9bUaKuDVtjE6XDoaCOyHleuesorENOlHVqv0oHZQ/40m/fgJ04iJ9StqiMBG6ZzhNsQ/h3/X5an9YislIYAYWNBPKiOUH3PWrpqwI4Rj1C7LQPNOHQ) [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mFurkY0kDiItM_JEd2LzZNbEFwiqfHrfmrGCWxM9NBeJTahi4crNWavfPpDZwUF0cp0BSDFXC1OEf4gExr0nQYD7BrBPcQeEC3v3B7cLVMe3iIgfiS6kJr5MQ_NLKMWH4DNVqkbRbd1xk3AFe4_BAzbiqGk2VwSlKJVhrnHIjZYGMdv1vUlzSSEch0Sb7AQ_RP1rXzA1npUNqPRydfg4jVUJV2j_89yyZyVN3DsdmOob76SAHmW93SIMGWQLw8aLgLtspZhSSr-PHqFr8s2-piCpfJ9Ci_TaMUsur7nJn1KZ5i2celnrrvBSOHBOMtxCzi15CEKON76_Mz8uWUbM-3lDacbVzsOesRJof53WJRSZwzF8ZvyAeKrHoglLyC44WF699i7ptXBDq1sAeGSfhgrXtw63kDXP3Mspuldj300aMI4Q-gc9qY5u28SSAvckLAyV1t-rYPE6cMd3WC0MfcREvV3gqz7dHGmao8CJFzH2Jwbo95uC6qpYCVwsAbXe3rBr-_oYd4oRyEblm_voofg/40m/fgJ04iJ9StqiMBG6ZzhNsQ/h4/3TdEPlg4UAdxzLh_cvTlnyFlEsb0S6teOcC9z8GVtcY) Support for unions is resurging. Over 70% of Americans approve of labor unions, but weakened labor protections make it very difficult for workers to unionize, denying them a voice in their employment conditions.

**With approval for unions at the highest since 1965, there is a growing realization that unions can potentially make both work better for all.**
The PRO Act, a landmark bill to strengthen workers’ rights, would streamline the process to form a union, ensure that they are successful in negotiating a first agreement, and bar employers from union-busting activities.
**[Sign the petition and demand that Congress oppose union-busting and protect the right to organize. clean_body: | | | ** Derek Marshall is running for Congress to strengthen unions and raise wages. The American people are aware of the corporate greed blocking their access to the American Dream. When corporations make record profits, the workforce should be seeing record wages. But they are not. In response, we’re seeing an historic wave of workers withholding their labor for better wages and working conditions. Workers see unions as critical to fixing our nation’s broken workplace where most workers have no power or agency at work. Union-endorsed Derek Marshall is running for Congress as a champion of the right to unionize without fear of penalty. Unlike his MAGA Republican opponent, Derek unequivocally affirms that every individual deserves a wage that reflects their worth and working conditions that uphold their humanity. Support for unions is resurging. Over 70% of Americans approve of labor unions, but weakened labor protections make it very difficult for workers to unionize, denying them a voice in their employment conditions. With approval for unions at the highest since 1965, there is a growing realization that unions can potentially make both work better for all. The PRO Act, a landmark bill to strengthen workers’ rights, would streamline the process to form a union, ensure that they are successful in negotiating a first agreement, and bar employers from union-busting activities. Solidarity, Derek Marshall for Congress is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 | | Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Derek Marshall for Congress, please .

name: Angela (iPhone)
subject: a tough call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
I just got off the phone with my campaign team,
Peter, and I had to make a tough
call.

Here’s the problem: Our multi-millionaire opponent has committed to
spending tens of millions of dollars of his own money in this race, and
his massive spending advantage means he’s already running ads to voters.

Here’s the solution: To counter his ad spending, I told my team we’re
going to ramp up our digital program ahead of schedule — even though that
means burning through our budget faster than we’d initially planned.

It was a tough call,
Peter, but I’m confident that it’s
the right one. I honestly believe that this grassroots team is up to the
challenge, and it’s our not-so-secret weapon that can outmaneuver the tens
of millions he’s got to burn.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7427?t=1007&amount=25&akid=579%2E52803%2Ep37TAU ]Can I count on you to have my back by chipping in a grassroots donation
of whatever you can afford to help us boost our digital program so our
Maryland-first message can cut through all the noise?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

subject: It might sound crazy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
What if we told you that a single $5 donation was enough to help make a real difference in this campaign? Peter,

What if we told you that a single $5 donation was enough to help make a real difference in this campaign? It might sound crazy...but it's true! Let us explain:

Behind this campaign are thousands of grassroots supporters. People like you who want to make our Commonwealth the best place to live, work, and raise a family.

On the other hand, Andy's opponent, Daniel Cameron, has a Wall Street billionaire from Pennsylvania, Rand Paul, and other outside interest groups putting money into super PACs. Cameron wants to undo our progress, and his backers have the deep pockets to help him do it.

That's why we're asking for $5. You see, if you and a fraction of other supporters reading this email chip in just $5 – or whatever you can afford – we'll be able to keep pace with the super PACs spending big to defeat Andy, and that gets us one step closer to winning this tough race.

Let us explain: Behind this campaign are thousands of grassroots supporters. People like you who want to make our Commonwealth the best place to live, work, and raise a family. On the other hand, Andy's opponent, Daniel Cameron, has a Wall Street billionaire from Pennsylvania, Rand Paul, and other outside interest groups putting money into super PACs. Cameron wants to undo our progress, and his backers have the deep pockets to help him do it. That's why we're asking for $5. You see, if you and a fraction of other supporters reading this email chip in just $5 – or whatever you can afford – we'll be able to keep pace with the super PACs spending big to defeat Andy, and that gets us one step closer to winning this tough race. = = = Thanks, Team Beshear | | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

Peter, With Election Day just around the corner, I wanted to give you a quick update on our efforts. All across the state, our organizing team is working with candidates to recruit volunteers, and reach critical voters. They aren’t leaving any stone unturned, and are working to earn every vote. name: Laurel Imer
subject: We just made history! Join me in my campaign for Republican National Committeewoman of Colorado!
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Laurel Imer and is not approved by any candidate or candidates committee
body:
I am all in! Let's re-take the Republican National Committee, together.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qXQdg26e0nJB1Wcj7Q-BWQ6Kx8tEv16OmRqzJZtJCsooItWbjLcTI5vHmxaZ6UjJdoJkSKMIHR8D1PjoRK8BFR3F4EBWSeL06SYfTQVtYWnA68xeAqixqZWGb64-C3ZqAyYwx1FADtAbnDus7rgdLFHwsqaIQ1Ej&c=1wukgpBMJw8qS3O4jtMevSRBe-scImzGwIetF3nDZUhjjpfeEetvsQ==&ch=HUFF3iVYm7AjUXMlD5Qsc1eUzlf1Zyk28lO83zFknvPneUU-GwsN9w==)
---
---
| Dear Friend,
We just made history!
I just announced my candidacy to be the next Republican National Committeewoman of Colorado. I am challenging the incumbent in this office and we have a long road ahead of us.
It is far past time for the Republican National Committee to go in a different direction. The People of Colorado are tired of not having their voices heard by the leaders we have sent from Colorado to the Republican National Committee.
I am tired of it just like them, and when you run to be a delegate at the Caucus in March 2024 and Vote for Laurel Imer at the State Convention in April 2024, the status quo will be no longer.
I will always put my constituents first, and ensure that I am representing Colorado to the best of my ability. The time of the grassroots being ignored has come to an end and I am asking you to join me in this fight to Return the Republican National Committee to Patriotism.
If you are financially able, please consider supporting this campaign financially so we can ensure that our message reaches all four corners of Colorado before the Caucus in 2024.
You can donate by clicking below ⬇️
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qXQdg26e0nJB1Wcj7Q-BWQ6Kx8tEv16OmRqzJZtJCsooItWbjLcTI_hCyRN5bdRGwyP61uK3e-XjrE7ynF73zW7wr6DP0OJdaRotFDjyZLJvzgbgL76eJmKdx1-n1QFk78u0T3F2mR6rDTRAHPGFf3uGBpkg4QWcsjYi4tr8EadIMRqyd3rFVq0QI5bObLDEOkmoNfOhclAK024H9ouIpjHB39YttB8U&c=1wukgpBMJw8qS3O4jtMevSRBe-scImzGwIetF3nDZUhjjpfeEetvsQ==&ch=HUFF3iVYm7AjUXMlD5Qsc1eUzlf1Zyk28lO83zFknvPneUU-GwsN9w==)
---
| | [DONATE TODAY!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qXQdg26e0nJB1Wcj7Q-BWQ6Kx8tEv16OmRqzJZtJCsooItWbjLcTI_hCyRN5bdRGwyP61uK3e-XjrE7ynF73zW7wr6DP0OJdaRotFDjyZLJvzgbgL76eJmKdx1-n1QFk78u0T3F2mR6rDTRAHPGFf3uGBpkg4QWcsjYi4tr8EadIMRqyd3rFVq0QI5bObLDEOkmoNfOhclAK024H9ouIpjHB39YttB8U&c=1wukgpBMJw8qS3O4jtMevSRBe-scImzGwIetF3nDZUhjjpfeEetvsQ==&ch=HUFF3iVYm7AjUXMlD5Qsc1eUzlf1Zyk28lO83zFknvPneUU-GwsN9w==)
---
| Over the years I have demonstrated my commitment to the efforts to win across Colorado, and today I assure you nothing has changed.
I will not be backing down, I will not be retreating from the battle at hand, I will not be silenced by the haters and naysayers, I will always fight for each and every one of us.
It is time that we Return to Patriotism as a Republican Party, end globalism, ensure actual election integrity, hold our Party Leadership accountable, and not keep doing the same thing cycle after cycle and expecting a different result.
Before I even announced my candidacy publicly for the position of Republican National Committeewoman, I was honored to receive over 15 endorsements from some of the most respected leaders and activists from across the state.
They all are standing with me in this fight and I hope you will too.
I invite you to check out our newly launched website, my platform, and the list of growing endorsements by visiting [ImerForColorado.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qXQdg26e0nJB1Wcj7Q-BWQ6Kx8tEv16OmRqzJZtJCsooItWbjLcTI5epKDW8XaNWsLOQgQXqxCJLUGdWV1iBH73woq4eo1BRxz5_IiuD_PtjFM_Rj2CkhEZJXbeZ6VxQizjo655Dw2qy81mAUwLU3g==&c=1wukgpBMJw8qS3O4jtMevSRBe-scImzGwIetF3nDZUhjjpfeEetvsQ==&ch=HUFF3iVYm7AjUXMlD5Qsc1eUzlf1Zyk28lO83zFknvPneUU-GwsN9w==) today.
I am forever grateful for your support in this endeavor and I hope you will join me as we celebrate A Return To Patriotism!
Sincerely,
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qXQdg26e0nJB1Wcj7Q-BWQ6Kx8tEv16OmRqzJZtJCsooItWbjLcTI_hCyRN5bdRG7Fh2w-_ab9TK8qmlF5SfJ4AE-hBwFjYRDZWgZUGKfrS86TA0en2cIgjC8U-NRrOMkqY7n-Ml1NBSRT9fifir-X7XDakYqmhe&c=1wukgpBMJw8qS3O4jtMevSRBe-scImzGwIetF3nDZUhjjpfeEetvsQ==&ch=HUFF3iVYm7AjUXMlD5Qsc1eUzlf1Zyk28lO83zFknvPneUU-GwsN9w==)

name: Team Engel
subject: just keep running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Team Engel here. Forgive us for wanting to brag on Kirsten for a moment...
Not only is she running for Congress in one of the closest toss-up districts in the country. And not only is she endorsed by leaders like Senator Mark Kelly and organizations like EMILY's List. But she's ALSO running literal races in her spare time (see pictures below for proof!).
There are a hundred reasons why we think Kirsten is the best person to represent AZ-06 in Congress, but the long and short of it is that she'll fight for us – from our public lands to our education system, to our reproductive rights.
If you want to see Kirsten cross the finish line victorious next year, please chip in anything you can to fuel our efforts over the next 12 months >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_102123_PublicLands_FWD_act]
Thank you!
Team Engel
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Kirsten Engel <info@kirstenengel.com>
Date: Sat, Oct 14, 2023 at 11:01 AM
Subject: trail running
Peter,
Fall is one of the best times to get out in Arizona’s parks and enjoy all that our incredible state has to offer.
As a break from campaigning, I’ve been going for trail runs on the weekend with my husband. You can see pictures from a race in the beautiful Catalina State Park below!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_102123_PublicLands_FWD_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_102123_PublicLands_FWD_act] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_102123_PublicLands_FWD_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_102123_PublicLands_FWD_act]
When I was in Arizona’s legislature, I brought together folks from all backgrounds to work on water security and land issues.
In Congress, I’ll do the same. Arizona’s public lands are critical culturally, ecologically, and economically — and we must work together to preserve them for generations to come.
This race is one the best shots Democrats have at flipping a red seat blue. By donating now, you’ll be giving my campaign the resources we need to win next November. Can I count on you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_102123_PublicLands_FWD_act]

Thank you, Peter.
Have a great weekend!
Kirsten
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_102123_PublicLands_FWD_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_102123_PublicLands_FWD_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_102123_PublicLands_FWD_act]

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71968767/433830300/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWUyY2NkZTMtMzc3MC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=idzNF3Q_-TwdXJXE43BxwXluAQIXFJ11h_bQShLMOjU=) This is huge news, friend.

We have our first look at how Laura's race for Congress is shaping up: | **CA-30 Polling Update** Laura Friedman: **27%**
Mike Feuer: **14%**
Anthony Portantino: **13%**
Nick Melvoin: **6%**
Undecided: **40%** _* Conducted by Goodwin Simon Strategic Research, 10.17.23 *_

Maxwell Frost Shouts Onstage at Paramore Concert**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/i5tuTR4V6n4gm_RgTMRN1g~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnFpNMP0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTAyMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9wYXJhbW9yZV9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yWDJMVUJldVFOWklLOWN5REVYaVlFWTF4SXMmcmVmY29kZTI9MlgyTFVCZXVRTlpJSzljeURFWGlZRVkxeElzJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJYMkxVQmV1UU5aSUs5Y3lERVhpWUVZMXhJc1cDc3BjQgplMUwONGXIpfbXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/6G8MzdNL23tQxWfDMXLJ_A~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnFpNMP0TDaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTAyMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9wYXJhbW9yZV9lbi1ycyZjZG1jPTJYMkxVQmV1UU5aSUs5Y3lERVhpWUVZMXhJcyZyZWZjb2RlMj0yWDJMVUJldVFOWklLOWN5REVYaVlFWTF4SXMmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MlgyTFVCZXVRTlpJSzljeURFWGlZRVkxeElzVwNzcGNCCmUxTA40Zcil9tdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) Peter, I don’t regret what I said - _but I do need your help right now._

While DeSantis’ supporters remain unmoved by racism, authoritarianism, or the atrocities happening to our children in schools, they are outraged by my choice of words.

I’ve been relentless in calling out Ron DeSantis for what he is - a fascist. Yet, it is this other F-word that has whipped his supporters into a frenzy unlike I’ve seen before. [**_It is vital that we raise $25,000 to counter the avalanche of donations flowing DeSantis’ way and to have the resources to fend off every attack the GOP is launching my way. name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Friend, I have incredible news in my race to defeat Sen. Rick Scott here in Florida — and I wanted you to hear it from me:
A new poll already shows this race in a statistical tie!
I’ve always believed that we can reach our dreams if we work for them. That’s what’s so great about this country. I came to this country at 14 and worked for minimum wage at a doughnut shop, so I know the value of hard work. I know that with hard work, determination, and the grassroots support of people like you — we’ll elect someone who’s proof of the American dream as Florida’s next U.S. senator.
But I need to be frank about what’s ahead of us: Rick Scott has already sunk millions of dollars of his own money into his campaign. I simply will not be able to compete without grassroots resources. That's why my team and I have set a weekly $50,000 goal to ensure we can fight Scott’s wealth, build our campaign, and win.
With grassroots support of the utmost importance, I checked your donation record to see where things stand. Could you please chip in?
Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Progress to Goal: 74%
Suggested Gift: $25 to flip FL blue
The harsh reality is that my opponent is one of the richest senators in Washington — he spent $64 million of his own fortune to buy this seat last time. If we don’t keep up with key goals this early in the election cycle, we'll never be able to make up the gap and stay competitive.
This is our best chance to flip Florida blue. And with control of the Senate at stake, we cannot let ourselves be outspent. That's why I am personally asking: Please, will you split $25 or more between my campaign and Serve America to help us hit our weekly goal and stop Rick Scott from buying this seat? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]

Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8dc64ff06a269b4440452c4adcc94de951d6ec0bdeb59412acdd27fdd9cefac2a37491235d39903acde80a86778dcb0b1dedd961514559975b8c46c925e66da8

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8dc64ff06a269b4440452c4adcc94de951d6ec0bdeb59412acdd27fdd9cefac2a37491235d39903acde80a86778dcb0b1dedd961514559975b8c46c925e66da8

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Hi there,

Since launching our campaign back in May, I have put thousands of miles on my car, hundreds on my shoes, and met countless incredible voters across AZ-01.

Through my conversations with voters on all sides of the political spectrum, one thing remains clear: People agree Congress is broken.

Right now in Washington, House Republicans are making fools of themselves with their infighting. Meanwhile, the impending government shutdown threatens Arizona families, our economy, and our national security.

That’s why now we need to continue our fight to unseat far-right extremist David Schweikert. **And our campaign is gaining serious momentum -- just look at some stats from our recent fundraising report:**

Here’s the situation, Peter: If we’re going to take back the House from the dysfunctional Republican majority, _**we cannot afford to lose this seat.**_
Republicans know that too. That’s why conservative groups and allies are gearing up to spend millions to win the closest races in the country and expand their majority.
In fact, **GOP groups poured more than $13.5 million into MN-02** during the midterms to try to defeat Angie.
With this third opponent positioned to jump in the race, this race is about to get _even more expensive than we planned_.
Any one of these potential challengers has the potential to win a seat as evenly divided as MN-02, and we need the resources to gain a competitive edge.
**This grassroots team powered Angie to victory last year, and we can do it again. But that starts with meeting this critical $10,000 Challenger Response Fund goal.**
[_**Please, split a donation of any amount you can afford between our campaign and HER Time to help us defeat any Republican opponents and keep Angie in Congress >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71972277/433834889/31770608?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231021_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2ExYjhlMWItM2M3MC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kLgF9--J9_czyU8mEmPbcPGFCIbaA8TekktruWUf3iI=)

name: Team AOC
subject: We must end the cycle.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Call your Representative today.
#
The past weeks have been devastating for all those seeking a lasting peace and respect for human rights in Israel and Palestine.
**We must build on our common humanity and focus on protecting innocent, civilian lives at stake.**
**[Please call your Representative in Congress today and ask them to support the Ceasefire Now Resolution, and urge President Biden to facilitate an immediate de-escalation and ceasefire in Israel and Palestine.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/call/ceasefire-now/?source=em20231021-5192-P_ORG_RES_LEG&t=1&akid=5192%2E2526796%2EsaZ9jy)**
**[Call your Representative →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/call/ceasefire-now/?source=em20231021-5192-P_ORG_RES_LEG&t=2&akid=5192%2E2526796%2EsaZ9jy)**
A new poll conducted by Data for Progress this week has found that **80% of Democrats, and 66% of Americans overall, support a ceasefire and de-escalation to prevent further violence and civilian deaths.** 1
The Ceasefire NOW Resolution would also allow for the entry of humanitarian assistance into Gaza, where over two million Palestinians — half of which are children — have had no access to food, water, or humanitarian aid for over a week.
We cannot allow further atrocity. We must end this humanitarian crisis.
**[We urge you to ask your Member of Congress to stand with the movement to bring lasting peace and human rights to the people of Israel and Palestine. Call your Representative now →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/call/ceasefire-now/?source=em20231021-5192-P_ORG_RES_LEG&t=3&akid=5192%2E2526796%2EsaZ9jy)**
**[Call your Representative →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/call/ceasefire-now/?source=em20231021-5192-P_ORG_RES_LEG&t=4&akid=5192%2E2526796%2EsaZ9jy)**
Yours in service,
Team AOC

* * *

1: [dataforprogress.org/blog/2023/10/19/voters-agree-the-us-should-call-for-a-ceasefire-and-de-escalation-of-violence-in-gaza](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/21410?t=5&akid=5192%2E2526796%2EsaZ9jy)

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=5192%2E2526796%2EsaZ9jy) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=5192%2E2526796%2EsaZ9jy) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=5192%2E2526796%2EsaZ9jy)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=9&akid=5192%2E2526796%2EsaZ9jy)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=5192%2E2526796%2EsaZ9jy)

---
Peter, as we enter into the cold winter months, we cannot forget about the tens of thousands of New Yorkers who will spend their nights in the cold.

Last winter, as many as _68,000_ unhoused people spent their nights either in a crowded shelter, in subway stations, or on the frigid streets of New York City.

Last winter, countless families in lower-income neighborhoods shivered through the night without proper heating, entirely ignored and exploited by predatory landlords.

And last winter, rent and home prices reached “crisis levels,” worsening the housing shortage and leaving millions of New Yorkers uncertain of where they would rest their heads.
**Peter, e****very single person should have the right to housing that is both safe AND affordable – and I'm fighting for this right.** As the People's Lawyer, I’ve spent the last five years fighting to hold predatory landlords and manipulative private investors accountable and fighting to change discriminatory housing laws. Already, we've won some major fights – but I cannot do this alone.
**That’s why I’m counting on 5,000 fearless fighters to respond to my flash poll before midnight tonight so I can see how many people are in this fight with me, but I'm still missing your response. So please, Peter, tell me now:**
| | **Should everyone have access to affordable housing?**

Last winter, countless families in lower-income neighborhoods shivered through the night without proper heating, entirely ignored and exploited by predatory landlords. And last winter, rent and home prices reached “crisis levels,” worsening the housing shortage and leaving millions of New Yorkers uncertain of where they would rest their heads. Peter, every single person should have the right to housing that is both safe AND affordable – and I'm fighting for this right. As the People's Lawyer, I’ve spent the last five years fighting to hold predatory landlords and manipulative private investors accountable and fighting to change discriminatory housing laws. Already, we've won some major fights – but I cannot do this alone. That’s why I’m counting on 5,000 fearless fighters to respond to my flash poll before midnight tonight so I can see how many people are in this fight with me, but I'm still missing your response. So please, Peter, tell me now: | | Should everyone have access to affordable housing? | | | | – Letitia James | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

clean_body: They want to ban books about John Lewis. | We’re ENRAGED, Peter. Here's why: AXIOS: Book ban attempts hit beloved Scholastic fairs For 42 years, Scholastic Book Fairs have brought books to kids across the country and promoted the joy of reading. But due to pressure from politicians like Ron DeSantis and groups like Moms for Liberty, Scholastic is putting “diverse” titles – including biographies of Black leaders like Rep. John Lewis – into a separate, optional collection for schools. Banning books, muzzling teachers, blocking kids from reading about Black historical figures – how low can they go?! = = Michael is the great-great-grandson of Robert Smalls, who made a daring escape from slavery and became a Civil War hero. After the war, Smalls was elected to Congress from the Lowcountry of South Carolina – exactly where Michael is running today. Sending Michael to Congress would make a powerful statement that would reverberate nationwide: We are sick and tired of politicians who erase our history while attacking our freedoms. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you so much, – Team Michael B. subject: Biden’s speech was pathetic
body:
Brother West speaks the truth

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231021all_bidenresponse&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, President Biden’s Oval Office address on the crisis in Israel and Palestine was essentially a declaration of war — when the world needs peace more than ever. **Brother West has this response:**
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYc6fgQy2h-PcJU-AU_mEaY&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231021all_bidenresponse&n=2)
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231021all_bidenresponse&n=3 "SUPPORT WEST 2024") [SUPPORT WEST 2024](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231021all_bidenresponse&n=3)
---
We don’t need billions of dollars for the war machine. We need policies to lift up poor and working class people struggling to survive our oppressive system. We need healthcare, housing and education for all. We need climate justice. **We need peace here at home and around the world.** [**Support leadership that****prioritizes truth, justice and love across the globe.**](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231021all_bidenresponse&n=4)
---
Solidarity for all people, **Team Cornel West 2024**

|

This is big, Peter.

Last quarter’s fundraising numbers are now public, and we got word that our campaign reported having more cash on hand than Mike Garcia!
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71972900/433837248/-233825198?refcode=em-10.21.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmVhMDBlOC0zZDcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pS5cmYCoNW5319BjGL_gwcHpiHjbQu90bOOOyA0l_ow=) _“Perhaps the biggest surprise: Democrat**George Whitesides** has more cash on hand than incumbent GOP Rep. **Mike Garcia** in CA-27.”
-Politico_
---

First and foremost, we want to **thank you** for your incredible support. These numbers highlight how strong and widespread our grassroots support to flip this seat is.

**[But make no mistake, Mike Garcia has already alerted his biggest donors about these results, and they are sure to be sending some big checks his way. Please help us keep our momentum going with a $3 donation today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71972901/433837249/-233825198?refcode=em-10.21.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmVhMDBlOC0zZDcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pS5cmYCoNW5319BjGL_gwcHpiHjbQu90bOOOyA0l_ow=)**
****[Donate $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71972902/433837250/-233825198?refcode=em-10.21.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmVhMDBlOC0zZDcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pS5cmYCoNW5319BjGL_gwcHpiHjbQu90bOOOyA0l_ow=)****
---

So what does this mean for our campaign?

For starters, it’s clear the momentum is on our side. Ever since George jumped in, election analysts shifted the race rating here to a “toss-up” district. Last week, George became the ONLY Democrat in the race after his primary opponent concluded his campaign and endorsed George.

We’re in GREAT shape, but these numbers don’t paint the full picture. In the last election, Mike Garcia had nearly **$7 million** in super PAC support carrying him over the top. We expect more of the same this time:

**[Help us prepare for the onslaught of attacks from Mike Garcia and his super PAC allies. Please chip in $3 to help us keep our strong momentum at this critical moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71972903/433837251/-233825198?refcode=em-10.21.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmVhMDBlOC0zZDcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pS5cmYCoNW5319BjGL_gwcHpiHjbQu90bOOOyA0l_ow=)**

clean_body: After it was leaked in a secret meeting... | | | Patriot, We’re now in the final few days of the RINOs’ 60-day plot to try and destroy our movement and put the GOP back under “establishment” control. And just in time for their plot to end, a new poll came out showing that EVERY other Republican candidate is now in the SINGLE DIGITS. Trump primary challengers dwindle to the single digits in new poll” [SOURCE: Washington Examiner] I think we can all agree that their plot to destroy the MAGA movement has been an unmitigated disaster. BUT I will not claim victory until the 60 days have officially passed. I know these turncoat RINOs all too well. They may have terrible policies. They may be terrible at standing up to the Democrats. But they are extraordinary when it comes to stabbing me (and voters like YOU) in the back! That’s why I will continue to sleep with one eye open until the 60 days are over. These are people who cheered when I was wrongfully arrested, parroted talking points from Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff when I was illegally indicted, and attacked me so much that they even started to be featured in Biden ads! Who knows what they can concoct in a secret meeting in the final few days of their plot to try and bring us down... But time and time again, these special interest RINOs fail to remember who they’re up against. I’m not talking about me. I’m talking about YOU ... ...The 74 million (which is now much higher) Americans who are the heart and soul of the MAGA movement. While we may not be lined with special interest Super PAC money, we do have MILLIONS of grassroots donors giving even just $1 to SAVE AMERICA! And when you add it all up, we have even TRIPLED the amount raised by these RINO sell-outs. Now, with 3 days left in their timeline to defeat us, it’s time to GO BIG! Let’s give it all we’ve got during these final 72 hours to send a message loud and clear: THE GOP WILL NEVER GO BACK TO THE DAYS BEFORE “TRUMP” AND THE MAGA MOVEMENT. (But if you’re doing poorly right now due to all of the many villains destroying our country, please do not even think about donating. I mean it!) | | - Thank you, Donald J. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Where is the outrage over the humanitarian crisis in Gaza?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I am inspired by all those in the Jewish community raising their voices for peace and humanity in the face of violence.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=642%2E791427%2EdHorOL)

Friends -
I would like to take a moment to be very clear about what is happening in Palestine right now.
Since the war began earlier this month, Israel has dropped more bombs in Palestine than the U.S. dropped in Afghanistan in a whole year. Entire neighborhoods are being leveled and bodies are piling up at an alarming rate.
How is it that we as a nation are talking about releasing hostages and getting American citizens out of Israel, but cannot get the hundreds of Americans stuck in Gaza out? How long will we continue to say that humanitarian aid is on its way when it clearly is not?
Where is the humanity? Where is the outrage over the humanitarian crisis in Gaza?
In the face of this war, I am deeply inspired by the mass movement of peace-loving people — led by Jewish and Muslim Americans — joining in nonviolent protest to demand a ceasefire and an end to this horror.
It is a reminder that our condemnation of the attacks on Israelis cannot blind us from what is happening to Palestinian civilians. I am continuing to pray for the entire region, and I pray that love will overcome hate.
Because the truth is that only solidarity and love will stop this war and stop more civilians from losing their lives. And I was encouraged this past week by more than 400 Capitol Hill staffers, led by Muslim and Jewish staff, who sent a letter calling for a ceasefire, safe return of hostages, and humanitarian aid.
In Minnesota, my good friends Jaylani Hussein, Beth Gendler, and Malika Tahir wrote a moving op-ed against violence, harassment and intimidation of our fellow Muslim and BIPOC Minnesotans.
We will outwork the hate.
We can honor the humanity of the innocent Israeli civilians who have been killed while also honoring the humanity of the innocent Palestinian civilians who have been killed.
We can denounce the horrific acts against children, women, the elderly, and the unarmed people who were slaughtered and taken hostage in Israel while also stopping the horrific acts being committed as we speak against Palestinians.
As someone who has experienced firsthand the trauma of war, displacement, and living in a refugee camp, my heart is broken for the thousands of people killed and many more displaced in the ongoing violence.
We must learn from the mistakes of our own war on terror — that military action alone rarely addresses the root causes. That peace and justice will not come from the barrel of a gun, and that targeting an entire civilian population will only create more discord and perpetuate the cycle of violence.
The solution to this horror, as ever, is a negotiated peace — with Israelis and Palestinians enjoying equal rights and security guarantees. I continue to urge the United States to use its diplomatic might to establish peace in the region.
The common humanity of Palestinians and Israelis deserves nothing less.
Thank you for reading.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=642%2E791427%2EdHorOL)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=642%2E791427%2EdHorOL)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=642%2E791427%2EdHorOL)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=642_791427_dHorOL&akid=642%2E791427%2EdHorOL)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

That peace and justice will not come from the barrel of a gun, and that targeting an entire civilian population will only create more discord and perpetuate the cycle of violence. The solution to this horror, as ever, is a negotiated peace — with Israelis and Palestinians enjoying equal rights and security guarantees. I continue to urge the United States to use its diplomatic might to establish peace in the region. The common humanity of Palestinians and Israelis deserves nothing less. Thank you for reading. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

Hi team, it’s Maya - Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo’s Finance Director.

As Finance Director, it’s my job to make sure that we have all the resources we need to get Yadira reelected. Republicans see their path to keep the majority running straight through states like Colorado, _and they are gearing up to spend millions to flip this seat red._ _We’re falling immensely short of where we need to be_ to keep this battleground seat blue.

**Top pollsters are saying Yadira Caraveo is the second most vulnerable House Democrat in the entire country.** I need to tap into our grassroots movement, if we’re going to have a shot at fighting back against the far-right money being spent against us!

**[Can I count on you to donate $25 - or what you can spare, to help us reelect Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo, and win one of the most competitive races in the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71973149/433838247/537837852?amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2023.10.21_b1_mco08fd_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2IwZTA0MS00MTcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yk6x7RqZvrK8Z8YhXzJX5tB2JrCXo7IQHrVKIkph5AM=)**

name: TonyEvers.com
subject: the stakes are high
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek, did you see
Cassi’s message about how close Wisconsin will be next year? With extreme
Republicans continuing their hateful attacks on the most vulnerable
communities in Wisconsin, the stakes are very high.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2166?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231021_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TonyEvers.com_NA_NA_mmfr.1.6&t=1001&akid=6441%2E1827488%2E9jMKvn ]Tony and Democrats are fighting for you, and they need your help.
Please pitch in here ahead of tomorrow’s fundraising deadline to help us
close our $15,728 budget gap. Our mission is too important to come up even
one dollar short.

— Read Cassi’s Message Below —

Derek,

As Tony’s campaign manager, I can tell you
that elections in Wisconsin are always close. And with the 2024 election
nearly a year away, and extreme Republicans in the state legislature
coming for our personal freedoms, we can’t afford to slow down our
momentum for even a second.

Tony and Democrats are fighting to protect our rights and freedoms, and as
we gear up for the 2024 elections, we need to continue making critical
investments to keep Wisconsin blue and elect Democrats throughout the
state and across the country.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2166?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231021_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TonyEvers.com_NA_NA_mmfr.1.6&t=1002&akid=6441%2E1827488%2E9jMKvn ]Can Tony and I count on you to click here and chip in to help us close
our $21,590 budget gap before Sunday’s deadline? We can’t get there
without you.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately.

name: =?utf-8?q?Katie_Porter=E2=80=99s_Minivan?=
subject: I’m a mess
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=31826%2E3422442%2EJF7IFW)
Hey Derek, it’s me—Katie Porter’s minivan!
And, to be honest, _I’m a mess._
That’s because I’m the main mode of transportation for Katie and her three kids, so when you open me up, you’ll find after-school snacks, a spare whiteboard or two, and an emergency bottle of Diet Dr. Pepper (Katie’s favorite!).
But I wouldn’t have it any other way, Derek. I’m proud to be her minivan, because I know Katie is holding Big Pharma and Big Oil CEOs accountable and fighting for families like hers every day. That’s why my license plate is ‘OVRSITE’!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231021-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAM21_1_VAN_20231021_V1_F&refcode2=31826_3422442_JF7IFW&akid=31826%2E3422442%2EJF7IFW)
From Redding to San Diego and everywhere in between, our goal is to meet as many of California’s 21 million voters as we can. And we need your help to do so.
**[Can you chip in $5 today to help keep Katie and me on the road so we can spread our campaign's message to Californians everywhere?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231021-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAM21_1_VAN_20231021_V1_F&refcode2=31826_3422442_JF7IFW&akid=31826%2E3422442%2EJF7IFW)**
[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231021-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAM21_1_VAN_20231021_V1_F&refcode2=31826_3422442_JF7IFW&akid=31826%2E3422442%2EJF7IFW)
Thanks for your help!
—Katie Porter’s Minivan

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM21_1_VAN_20231021_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=31826_3422442_JF7IFW&akid=31826%2E3422442%2EJF7IFW)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=31826%2E3422442%2EJF7IFW)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=31826%2E3422442%2EJF7IFW)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

clean_body: Peter, we promise this email is important. We’re running a people-powered campaign to win Michiganders a Senator who serves the people, not lobbyists or wealthy donors. That’s why we need your help today. The grassroots team we’re building is one of our strongest assets. And keeping Michigan blue in 2024 will take all of us working together. Can you make a contribution at this personalized link today? Any amount will help us stay on track to our critical fundraising goals. [ ] Thanks so much for your support — today and every day. – Team Hill Harper

And Black Voters’ Support for Democrats Appears To Be Slipping Going Into 2024

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671700%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lw8R6R9rAWQj6fd%2bsJKOgw&sysid=1 Biden Admin Policy Would Fire Employees If They Don’t Honor Preferred Pronouns

Employees at the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) could be fired for not using a person’s preferred pronouns due to a new policy rolled out this month, according to Roger Severino, former director of HHS Office for Civil Rights.

Justice Samuel Alito said Friday that the Supreme Court majority’s decision to pause a lower court injunction blocking the Biden administration from coercing social media companies to censor speech may be perceived as giving a “green light” to the government’s use of “heavy handed tactics” to suppress speech.

Fellow American,

**I cannot thank you enough.**
I have a clear vision for how to win the White House in 2024: **a grassroots, bottom-up campaign made of people just like you.**

At the end of the last quarter, we reported more small-dollar donors than most of the other Presidential candidates. My campaign thanks the more than 78,000 unique, small-dollar donors who gave to our campaign last quarter - that especially goes for the nearly 40 percent of you who are first-time donors to the GOP!

The other candidates in this race rely on their mega-donor meetings and the Super PAC establishment dollars to lift their campaigns up.**My message remains true:** I just need good Americans in my corner who believe in the foundation of our country. Patriots who believe, like I do, that our best days are still ahead of us and that the American Dream is still alive for those who love our country.

Fellow American, will you continue to help me spread our message of an American revival in 2024? No one should be anointed with the Republican Party's nomination; _they have to earn it._

**[Will you show your support for our campaign today with a gift of any amount- even just $1 - before midnight tonight?](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=bc0b8c21d6f5412cbbf8e84904c15753&_e=vKs4hhyZmjVOfNo8akuZTSv_1-6yNql8qkmZeWYsIy7hcT-mxLJvK24c0LCQJTWqQOWGMhnZz6dl5h1Aj4fhW-WcGKeuSSInMm3t9DqslsxybNUPHc1Bfg97bqqaN9NhccuRaHO4ImBoMgY1PSo8G-fvSmyGC_9NL11yu8f42dqmDMxc2mNrllE0SbZu4Zrbvl5izWmwJABVZi117pyhmRjgasEhy-5BS5-QldJSFYRftawp9qZAThsWI7WTQ8wbyYdEj-pYIV9CrfzbiALneB4EBxAuSVtyHDsuRLk4ljFOIK1MuIf6913vPU41tNUOrYxR0RXC0zaCweW6phr9KFrZBUGacIVMunCSbCmgmLZWLLjb_C5RJPr7xcIs4CBL)**

Sincerely,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I need good Americans in my corner who believe in the foundation of our country. | | Fellow American, I cannot thank you enough. I have a clear vision for how to win the White House in 2024: a grassroots, bottom-up campaign made of people just like you. At the end of the last quarter, we reported more small-dollar donors than most of the other Presidential candidates. My campaign thanks the more than 78,000 unique, small-dollar donors who gave to our campaign last quarter - that especially goes for the nearly 40 percent of you who are first-time donors to the GOP! The other candidates in this race rely on their mega-donor meetings and the Super PAC establishment dollars to lift their campaigns up.My message remains true: I just need good Americans in my corner who believe in the foundation of our country. Patriots who believe, like I do, that our best days are still ahead of us and that the American Dream is still alive for those who love our country. Fellow American, will you continue to help me spread our message of an American revival in 2024? No one should be anointed with the Republican Party's nomination; they have to earn it. Sincerely, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

body:
|
#
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71974448/433842919/-823999966?amount=10&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20231021_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTgwMTAzZS00ODcwLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2XLnlD6YxJN0JrorTPFH3a1UsEA4lAdVAfjvOvq238c=) Friend, I need you to understand what’s happening right now in the halls of Congress. A Civil War is consuming the House Republican Conference. For the past two weeks, the People’s House has been at a standstill because extreme MAGA Republicans have failed to elect a Speaker of the House. On the other side of the aisle, House Democrats are unified and ready to get to work For The People. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariela=20Roca?=
subject: Why I'm Running
body:
| | | | | |
---
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=150e362b08&e=0a12281e0e)
|
---
Hey there its Mariela Roca, Republican Candidate running for Congress here in Maryland’s 6th Congressional District.
First, I want to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America’s future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to share something personal with you: Why I’m running for Congress.
[**Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution to help boost my campaign’s momentum and WIN BACK Maryland’s 6th Congressional District!**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=4653625f87&e=0a12281e0e)
I’m running for Congress because I was raised by a single mom in Puerto Rico who always showed me how hard work and determination is what makes us all live the American dream. I learned english when I was 5 years old, and from that young age always felt so proud to be an American.
I’m running for Congress as a military veteran. I began my journey of service to our nation in 2005 when I joined the U.S. Air Force at the age of 20. During my military service I had the honor of serving my county abroad in the Global War on Terror, serving within the Task Force Medical and the Bagram Theater Internment Facility (BTIF) in Bagram, Afghanistan, during Operation Enduring Freedom in 2007. I know what sacrifice looks like - and this is why I love my country so much.
I’m running for my kids, your kids, and your grandkids. Everything that I do in my life is to make the best possible future for my daughter and my son and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has offered me my entire life.
[**I’M RUNNING FOR CONGRESS BECAUSE WE HAVE A COUNTRY TO SAVE!**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=12a1bb0abf&e=0a12281e0e)
Even during our most challenging moments, we are fortunate to call America our home. But it's clear that under the Biden administration, we face significant challenges, our prospects are dwindling, we are weak on the world stage, our economy is failing, and American families are being left behind every single day.
[**I’m running for Congress because America can do better with leaders that will always fight for America first. No matter what.**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=707ac78fe3&e=0a12281e0e)
**As a military veteran** , I intimately understand the profound significance of service and the willingness to make the ultimate sacrifice for my country. My time in the military taught me the unwavering commitment to duty, honor, and the defense of freedom. It's a bond that transcends words; a deep-seated connection with the men and women I served alongside, many of whom paid the ultimate price. I've witnessed the selflessness, courage, and dedication that define the character of those who choose to protect their nation.
**As a medical logistician** , my mission was to ensure that our dedicated warfighters had the essential tools and supplies required to save lives on the frontlines. I understood the critical nature of my role in providing our troops with the medical resources and equipment they needed to deliver immediate care in challenging and high-stress situations. I am now prepared to take the knowledge, commitment, and understanding I gained in that role with me to Congress, where I will tirelessly advocate for policies that will support our country, military and American families first. Above anything.
**As a mother,** I understand firsthand the deep commitment and love that comes with the responsibility of providing for one's family. In the countless roles we take on as parents - caregiver, protector, educator, and provider - we become intimately acquainted with the challenges and triumphs of family life. We witness the struggles that many families face, whether it's making ends meet, securing access to quality education, or ensuring our children have the healthcare they need. It's in these moments that we are inspired to take action, to advocate for better opportunities, and to fight for a brighter future for our families.
I know how to make our community, district, and America strong and proud because i’ve done it before. [**And i’ll do it again as your next Congresswoman.**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=f7cc41d392&e=0a12281e0e)
As your next Congresswoman for Maryland’s 6th Congressional District I will always fight for policies that will revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s out of control spending, champion school choice & parental rights, and save America’s future.
**But, in order to do this, I need your support today so I can spread this message to everyone across our district and country.**
[**Will you chip in today to help me win this fight for our nation’s future?**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=a5cd36cfe6&e=0a12281e0e)
Together we **WILL** flip Maryland’s 6th Congressional District for Republicans and make America strong and proud again.
Sincerely,
Mariela Roca
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=c27fca661b&e=0a12281e0e)
|
---
| | | | [](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=670e448159&e=0a12281e0e)| [](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=dc3454e1b5&e=0a12281e0e)| [](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=0eec2baf9a&e=0a12281e0e)
---|---|---
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=04f423bec0&e=0a12281e0e)
| | | [](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=1ad33af58a&e=0a12281e0e)
---

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.
Our mailing address is:
Roca for Congress P.O. Box 1725 Frederick, MD 21702 USA
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=6dc2bd9aeb&e=0a12281e0e&c=0f5e2adc88) or [unsubscribe](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=6dc2bd9aeb&e=0a12281e0e&c=0f5e2adc88)
|

Friend,
It’s very simple: I only want to Make America Great Again!
That’s all I ever wanted...
...To save America and to keep the world at peace so that our country stays safe and prosperous.
_**And for that, the Left wants to put me in JAIL as an innocent man for the rest of my life.**_
But, as I publicly declared in a speech just the other day, I am **WILLING** to go to jail if that’s what it takes for our country to win and become a democracy again.
Has there ever been a candidate in American history who’s said that? I don’t think so!
And that’s exactly why the Democrats fear me.
They can’t buy me, bully me, bribe me, or break me into submission.
**_I will SAVE this country if it’s the last thing I do._**
Now – if you’re with me in the fight to save America, I ask that you make a contribution of any amount you can to win back the White House and Make America Great Again!
