name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Rightwing chaos, Barbara Lee vs Big Oil, frontline communities speak out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Rightwing Clown Show | World Beyond Fossil Fuels | Barbara Lee
& Ro Khanna vs Big Oil | Ban Backyard Oil Wells | Frontline Communities
Suffering, Speaking Out | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9838?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231021_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1011&akid=4819%2E5885482%2EAaQxLn ][IMG]

As Republican chaos paralyzes Congress, it’s crystal clear why
progressives must grow our ranks and take back power for the people.

Not only must we defeat rightwing extremists at the ballot box in just a
few weeks - and win victories for reproductive rights in states like Ohio
- we must also start working now to take back the House and more in 2024.

If you’re already a member of Our Revolution, please consider pitching in
an extra donation to our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9838?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231021_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1012&akid=4819%2E5885482%2EAaQxLn ]Progressive Power Fund to help us build out
our organizing in key districts and swing states now — not later.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9838?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231021_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1013&akid=4819%2E5885482%2EAaQxLn ]If you’re not yet a sustaining member, please consider a monthly
donation to ensure we have the resources needed to shift the balance of
power in Washington, D.C., and beyond.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11652?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231021_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1014&akid=4819%2E5885482%2EAaQxLn ][IMG]

Don’t miss Our Revolution’s [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11652?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231021_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1015&akid=4819%2E5885482%2EAaQxLn ]LIVE Healthcare for All Town Hall this
Tuesday with U.S. Reps. Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna, and Pramila Jayapal, along
with CA Assemblyman Ash Kalra.

We’ll talk about CalCare single-payer healthcare in California and the
path to national Medicare for All, as well as medical debt, drug prices,
and how we can chart a path to healthcare justice in America. The call
kicks off at 6 pm PT/9 pm ET on Tuesday (Oct. 24th).

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11652?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231021_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1016&akid=4819%2E5885482%2EAaQxLn ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6053?v=UG30jtKwouM%3Fsource%3DEM_NBI_OR_20231021_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1017&akid=4819%2E5885482%2EAaQxLn ][IMG]

Our Revolution is mobilizing our outside movement and elected allies to
stand with frontline communities across California who are being directly
harmed by oil and gas drilling.

Not only is carbon deadly for our planet, oil wells and refineries are
making people sick.

On Tuesday, our coalition of environmental activists was joined by U.S.
Reps. Barbara Lee and Ro Khanna on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6053?v=UG30jtKwouM%3Fsource%3DEM_NBI_OR_20231021_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1018&akid=4819%2E5885482%2EAaQxLn ]LIVE Town Hall to organize for a
world beyond fossil fuels, prevent backyard drilling in California, and
fight for environmental justice for all.

★ ★ ★

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11653?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231021_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1019&akid=4819%2E5885482%2EAaQxLn ][IMG]

Our Revolution is proud to join US Reps. Barbara Lee and Ro Khanna to
endorse the [ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11653?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231021_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1020&akid=4819%2E5885482%2EAaQxLn ]Campaign for a Safe and Healthy California, a grassroots
campaign to keep the law and keep drilling out of backyards.

We heard directly from Californians who’ve been harmed by oil and gas
drilling and are working to fend off Big Oil’s attempt to overturn SB1137,
a bill passed last year to ensure all oil wells are set back at least
3,200 feet from homes, schools, hospitals, nursing homes, and more.

Listen to CA State Senator Lena Gonzalez lay out the case in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11654?s=20%3Fsource%3DEM_NBI_OR_20231021_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1021&akid=4819%2E5885482%2EAaQxLn ]this
video clip from the town hall, asking political leaders in California who
they’re going to believe - the fossil fuel industry or folks on the
frontlines?

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11664?s=20%3Fsource%3DEM_NBI_OR_20231021_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1022&akid=4819%2E5885482%2EAaQxLn ][IMG]

“Fossil fuels are dirty and dangerous to drill out of the ground,
hazardous to store in underground wells, and poisonous to burn for fuel,”
Barbara told us Tuesday, calling on President Biden to [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11664?s=20%3Fsource%3DEM_NBI_OR_20231021_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1023&akid=4819%2E5885482%2EAaQxLn ]declare a
climate emergency.

“Oil and gas wells are a toxic presence in neighborhoods throughout
California and a simple law creating a safe buffer zone between these
dangerous sites and where people live, work and play is just common
sense,” she said.

Barbara Lee has been at the forefront of the fight for environmental
justice her entire life. She was an original cosponsor of the Green New
Deal and is a co-lead on the Environmental Justice for All Act. This week,
she released her Senate campaign’s environmental platform, calling for
President Biden to declare a climate emergency.

“We must rapidly transition away from dirty fuels NOW or face dire
consequences,” Barbara said. "Access to clean air, clean water, and a
healthy environment should not be a luxury.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11690?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231021_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1024&akid=4819%2E5885482%2EAaQxLn ]Our Revolution is proudly endorsing Barbara Lee for U.S. Senate in
California. Sign up at our new Progressives for Barbara Lee website to
help elect the most progressive candidate in this race!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11674?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231021_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1025&akid=4819%2E5885482%2EAaQxLn ][IMG]

In a recent survey, Our Revolution members in California identified
upholding SB1137 as their top policy priority, and we are mobilizing our
1.1 million members in the state to fight back against Big Oil’s effort to
repeal the law.

If you’re in California, sign up now to be part of our growing Climate
Corps, and fight alongside frontline communities to ban big oil from
backyards.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11674?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231021_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1026&akid=4819%2E5885482%2EAaQxLn ]JOIN OUR CALIFORNIA CLIMATE CORPS

★ ★ ★

“Enough is enough, I’m proud to stand with Our Revolution and Barbara Lee

than an abstraction.

At just 19, Nalleli led a coalition to shut down a toxic oil drilling site
in South LA. Now, she’s fighting alongside our coalition to make sure it’s
banned from backyards all across the state of California.

“I fight so my story ends with me, so I’m the last 9-year-old to become an
activist out of survival. I also fight so I’m the last 19-year-old to
choose between her reproductive system or her life,” she told us at the
town hall. “I was diagnosed with Stage 2 reproductive cancer at 19. These
toxic sites are affecting us at every stage of our lives from beginning to
end.”

together, when legislators who believe in this come together and fight
alongside us against industry.”

measure passes, and now we’re in the homestretch to preserve reproductive
rights in the Buckeye State.

We all know the drill — after the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, a
small but loud group of deep-pocketed extremists took to the states,
determined to gut abortion laws.

But the resistance has been real. Thanks to grassroots funding, armies of
volunteers, and organizations like Our Revolution, we have a real shot at
enshrining a woman’s right to abortion access in the Ohio constitution.

country’s biggest so-called “non-profit” hospital systems spent less than
1% of their total revenue on charity care.

The only reason these facilities have non-profit status is because they
are supposed to give free or discounted health care to those in need. It’s
another example of major corporations getting millions of dollars in tax
loopholes, while everyday Americans foot the bill.

Bernie is calling on Congress and the IRS to crack down on this abuse of
the system. Will you join him?

name: Jason Miyares
subject: 🟩 🟩 🟩 🟩 more green tape 🟩 🟩 🟩 🟩
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
Before reading how bad this is, know I am ALREADY fighting it.| | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=55092a7a3df14ff9bd218f8ac0106f44&_t=oWh9hSjgGtsOzlwIXW34ILkyexY4CYaaAYnmuZQbv_9g_hSM30b0uiofrPrxs_HbHmZzEcLSht7mIgMqGgo74h0-dK6cwhWB05HE7-ckq0U%3D)_.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=55092a7a3df14ff9bd218f8ac0106f44&_e=6czWsMWoqtAw5paDvVDlY-uOmfIPh4ZxAr-GNxC2XHM3QrJu6FQLHl6lHcFY0CZijADBgnJkjWdcqS5-O9qYLKnEn04HyjpOo-uw6G0UIumkkemC3p5LWnCdKQOuLuAwHltbl0dMO0eHeSIep-xOTz_of8UmU679HDALcsGa_BQLJrgp7W0b8WEvgmWmr-zBczgNBuRR45qeUAvOlN1dyFoyA62f2YmZNX2TGoiRnnV4_cWhxcjDg3uzBcz2RRPsG6-yo1myQdPAW8B4IUgItu9fMStNJCzZVY9nFiXYFJGCfiztrD5596fCSXk3PhlNn-bJ0y0Z3XI8kaPDQ9jmzDNkuM5j3W7cFHDX868fLasfDlBH9D7PjjvbpRSCFD5DIAIOGYVreP6E2HVwmAwHIA%3D%3D)
---
Peter, I’ll cut to the chase: **the Biden Administration just proposed a new rule that illegally mandates social, environmental, and race-based regulations for infrastructure projects.** President Biden knows that Congress would NEVER approve his radical climate agenda... which is why he goes around them and entrusts power to unelected bureaucrats who lack any real sense of accountability. Those bureaucrats make decisions based on arbitrary standards, directly harming Virginians' well-being. **Well,****Peter****, I won’t stand for that._[Will you?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=55092a7a3df14ff9bd218f8ac0106f44&_e=6czWsMWoqtAw5paDvVDlY-uOmfIPh4ZxAr-GNxC2XHM3QrJu6FQLHl6lHcFY0CZijADBgnJkjWdcqS5-O9qYLKnEn04HyjpOo-uw6G0UIumkkemC3p5LWnCdKQOuLuAwHltbl0dMO0eHeSIep-xOTz_of8UmU679HDALcsGa_BQLJrgp7W0b8WEvgmWmr-zBczgNBuRR45qeUAvOlN1dyFoyA62f2YmZNX2TGoiRnnVcbdJjA5I-OFnMIKgR2sUKdjYay3U41OzuVyvLMi9VqQNVkYjpixbZRBeQG2uC8BspZJm8RJR2SA1NLs3ht1bUvFbvxNrHP2g-veaQ2tsD0rkMLFLFBjWoPLfN8YiV-jRWmlhBOBR9o0I_sL1vSppz5PtgscAafFihT299zwX9AA%3D%3D)_**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=55092a7a3df14ff9bd218f8ac0106f44&_e=6czWsMWoqtAw5paDvVDlY-uOmfIPh4ZxAr-GNxC2XHM3QrJu6FQLHl6lHcFY0CZijADBgnJkjWdcqS5-O9qYLKnEn04HyjpOo-uw6G0UIumkkemC3p5LWnCdKQOuLuAwHltbl0dMO0eHeSIep-xOTz_of8UmU679HDALcsGa_BQLJrgp7W0b8WEvgmWmr-zBczgNBuRR45qeUAvOlN1dyFoyA62f2YmZNX2TGoiRnnVpUxMTzb1pUwnClLQk8XraONJ1p_p7u6otbM0vaagP3D5X9HKAz3qm1JlSRYKc5DTlYPGsp_Vq2Cwz7T9gtDTRlS4xqKKLkrrN2Is0249qpUXh3jQvGKNpoQ02nF_LxdIrkBxxKHemwOOSc_vOr8xTfsmoRGUDjPyI-YMNzRypRQ%3D%3D)
---
How bad are these latest regulations? Let me break down what they mean for you:
* **HIGHER PRICES** for your energy
* **MORE** delays for infrastructure projects like housing, roads, and bridges
* _And that’s if they are even built at all! _

In fact, the combination of rising prices and increased red tape will likely _CANCEL many critical infrastructure projects._ I don’t need to tell you what that will do to Virginia’s economy when our people are ALREADY struggling under crippling inflation. As an American, I’m angry. And as Attorney General, I’ve already joined with dozens of other state attorneys general to oppose this bureaucratic overreach. **I’m ready to fight this latest round of President Biden’s green tape — are you with me, Peter? If you are, _[donate](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=55092a7a3df14ff9bd218f8ac0106f44&_e=6czWsMWoqtAw5paDvVDlY-uOmfIPh4ZxAr-GNxC2XHM3QrJu6FQLHl6lHcFY0CZijADBgnJkjWdcqS5-O9qYLKnEn04HyjpOo-uw6G0UIumkkemC3p5LWnCdKQOuLuAwHltbl0dMO0eHeSIep-xOTz_of8UmU679HDALcsGa_BQLJrgp7W0b8WEvgmWmr-zBczgNBuRR45qeUAvOlN1dyFoyA62f2YmZNX2TGoiRnnUjSSl8xu0Yy9xpWGpzAKO8ELSroe5dDSLXm-AwLu-UW8KrT-KQ4RjDgc9PXwoyHiXKbs9fk2Ndp41fMuQ647JviipvnPNGQiUFEP4VjshDePStoDxhvAJDZd9YY7ILRre__toq0QBs5x5wZYTe4CskheEX93TiGg4PU-xCr7dZ7A%3D%3D)_**** now.**
---
| | [**COUNT ME IN**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=55092a7a3df14ff9bd218f8ac0106f44&_e=6czWsMWoqtAw5paDvVDlY-uOmfIPh4ZxAr-GNxC2XHM3QrJu6FQLHl6lHcFY0CZijADBgnJkjWdcqS5-O9qYLKnEn04HyjpOo-uw6G0UIumkkemC3p5LWnCdKQOuLuAwHltbl0dMO0eHeSIep-xOTz_of8UmU679HDALcsGa_BQLJrgp7W0b8WEvgmWmr-zBczgNBuRR45qeUAvOlN1dyFoyA62f2YmZNX2TGoiRnnWqMj_IgqzI9-vKmj-6Ns5792Hzhef3mywfUlyA4ij76OIUg0B6Ayy9EklQ5SMW9QfetdNWZj_nV-cgT7x54W3B3b3FH2O9CnYsx0PQBtr8W-bvVyDGOLmQXd7Q-vcUD4-ryq3z9vnIM4MLCnvkbWxh4yqUbjBrIwvGFDizeuhU2A%3D%3D)
---
| | Thank you,
---

If you are, ** now. | | | | Thank you, Jason Miyares Virginia Attorney General | . | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | P.O. Box 26352 Alexandria, Virginia 22313 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com |

body:

| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
| [WATCH POLICE STATE TRAILER](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=505692d4ba&e=a2af77507c)
---
The growth of the police state is a threat to our Constitutional rights.
Dinesh D’Souza’s new film Police State documents this growing threat to our freedom.
Knowing the threat is not enough. The Michigan Republican Party isn’t just committed to you understanding the threat but us stopping it.
The Good Neighbor Program is a critical component of the Michigan Republican Party’s strategy to win elections and save our nation.
We must recruit more Michiganders to Constitutionalism if we are going to save state and nation.
Join us this Monday, October 23rd, at the AMC theater in Auburn Hills at Great Lakes Crossing Mall!
* 6 pm Good Neighbor Program discussion inside Bar Louie (appetizers and cash bar)
* 7 pm Police State Movie Premier

Watch the trailer above and purchase tickets below.

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: I’m asking (for Bob Casey)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
**[Peter, can you chip in $5 right now to re-elect my friend Bob Casey to the U.S. Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231021-1?refcode=em20231021-1&refcode2=947_552475_tntcn-&akid=947%2E552475%2Etntcn-)**
Here’s why your support is so important:
**Now more than ever, we need people representing us in Washington who can actually get things done.** Who are willing to put their differences aside and do what’s right for Pennsylvanians.
That’s what Bob Casey’s done his entire career.
He gets to work every day for hardworking Pennsylvanians, and he never stops fighting to protect Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, women’s rights, LGBTQ+ equality, the right to vote, and all the values we hold dear here in Pennsylvania.
**[But he’s in for the fight of his life in 2024, and we all need to make sure he has what it takes to win. So Peter, will you donate $10 or more to help send Bob Casey back to the U.S. Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231021-1?refcode=em20231021-1&refcode2=947_552475_tntcn-&akid=947%2E552475%2Etntcn-)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231021-1?refcode=em20231021-1&refcode2=947_552475_tntcn-&akid=947%2E552475%2Etntcn-)**
Make no mistake: Pennsylvania is going to be a battleground state in 2024 once again.
The same national Republicans who’d rather sow dysfunction than get things done are going to spend millions of dollars in their attempt to defeat Bob and take back the majority in the U.S. Senate.
But Peter, we didn’t let them win in 2022, and we’re not going to let them win in 2024.
Together, we must fight as hard as we can to make sure Bob wins, and that starts by making sure his campaign has the resources it needs.
**So today, I’m asking you to have Bob Casey’s back like you’ve always had mine. Chip in today to help keep Bob in the Senate:**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231021-1](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231021-1?refcode=em20231021-1&refcode2=947_552475_tntcn-&akid=947%2E552475%2Etntcn-)**
Thanks,
Josh

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: 3️⃣updates you need to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
We’re forging ahead on my What’s Next agenda. |
#

**First: We’re taking _even more_ action on ending gun violence in Michigan.** Last week, the Michigan Senate moved one step closer to getting a bill to my desk that would stop domestic abusers from possessing firearms. Let’s get it done.
**Second: This week, I signed the _Affordable Care Act_ into Michigan law.** Every Michigander deserves affordable, high-quality health care, and we’re taking steps to ensure that happens. Starting now, no matter what extreme MAGA Republicans in D.C. do, Michiganders will have protections for pre-existing conditions and won’t be charged more for things like being pregnant.
**Third: I signed a bill protecting Michigan’s kids from abuse and strengthened criminal penalties on people who hurt children.** Our children are our future, and I will never stop fighting like hell to make sure that they have all the opportunities they need to thrive.
This is what progress looks like when you elect leaders who fight like hell for their constituents.

Friend,

Governor Glenn Youngkin here, asking for your help in Virginia. Early voting is underway here and Election Day is right around the corner on November 7.

**I truly believe this is the most important election happening in America.**

**_Democrats recognize the stakes in this election too._** Millions of dollars are coming into Virginia from those who want to take our Commonwealth backwards.

President Joe Biden directed the DNC to send $1.5 million to out-of-touch Virginia Democrats. Joe Biden came into Virginia, promising to "lead the charge" to stop the progress we are making.

_Extreme political groups have donated millions of dollars_ to candidates who will obstruct commonsense policies to lower the cost of living, grow jobs, empower parents, and keep our communities safe from crime and deadly drugs like fentanyl.

And now, an out-of-state, dark-money progressive organization is pouring $4.5 million into our General Assembly elections to stop our momentum.

**Combined, the left has poured more than $8 million into Virginia in the final stretch of this election.**

[That's why I need support from committed donors like you from across the country. ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=557333f4dbed42d986c6eb788da98ea8&_e=mA8I4xY2h9rN1xORrwxqoGAyDJ4YCSPlqJfa-gDRiSAfsktUk1cQi0oNiuB2dcjJfsqtrpChvweuHK96wlA0oGQ0DKWkFXmCUGCtsBTebxATz4_BTdBNjRGdSM9TYlm9PBJrJlVRwE8CMfLMrv-_lxZ28QWB3BjvGEg6wxt3JQGf_popmgRDlbIWhNUzMA3sV1FD4cqy_SPqkKGnpp0LfjXk0txTNYZ17NLv_n9ba1hxE4gSMCmZgZtOJilZKcGXZOhvVZM-SWZPsDOE7nSW3q9hHN0nHmh3RhdEPeoYTtGWwP3vwYE-ZEYck6oHkLbO7ZIpC_E_xTXP3ay7oNv-FVRlKfpTyn3LVRHksrufPZ2TeUibLEChQIbbRHzvGMKG7-01tSLJ62reKdGdKSAd4g%3D%3D)

clean_body: November Is Almost Here | Friend, Governor Glenn Youngkin here, asking for your help in Virginia. Early voting is underway here and Election Day is right around the corner on November 7. I truly believe this is the most important election happening in America. Democrats recognize the stakes in this election too. Millions of dollars are coming into Virginia from those who want to take our Commonwealth backwards. President Joe Biden directed the DNC to send $1.5 million to out-of-touch Virginia Democrats. Joe Biden came into Virginia, promising to "lead the charge" to stop the progress we are making. Extreme political groups have donated millions of dollars to candidates who will obstruct commonsense policies to lower the cost of living, grow jobs, empower parents, and keep our communities safe from crime and deadly drugs like fentanyl. And now, an out-of-state, dark-money progressive organization is pouring $4.5 million into our General Assembly elections to stop our momentum. Combined, the left has poured more than $8 million into Virginia in the final stretch of this election. | With your help, we will be able to compete against Joe Biden, the DNC, and extreme political groups. The resources you generously donate will be put to immediate use electing quality candidates to the House and Senate who will be allies for a commonsense agenda in Virginia's General Assembly. Please consider donating. Any amount is greatly appreciated as we work to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. Thank you for your continued support. Governor Glenn Youngkin Contributions to Spirit of Virginia are not deductible for tax purposes as charitable contributions. | Promises Made, Promises Kept. Text GLENN to 39626 to receive regular updates from Team Youngkin. | PAID FOR BY SPIRIT OF VIRGINIA Not authorized by any other candidate. Our mailing address is: Spirit of Virginia PO Box 3950, Merrifield, VA 22116

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Hunters are KILLING sleeping bear cubs in dens
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2065560?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT BEAR PETITION: Grizzly bear cubs need their mother to survive this winter. [Sign the petition to save them from CRUEL trophy hunters>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2065561?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** At this time of year, mama grizzly bears are preparing themselves and their hungry cubs for the cold winter. They must find plenty of food to feed their growing cubs, so that they’re full and fat for hibernation, _which can last as long as seven months!_ As the climate becomes frigid, the access to food becomes critical and can be difficult to find. Mama bears meticulously roam through the forest with their young to find foods like sweet berries, fish, and moose to feast on. But there is a predator lurking in the trees, Friend... **_VICIOUS_ trophy hunters.** While grizzlies are searching for food, they may unknowingly step outside of the invisible borders of Yellowstone where they are no longer protected, and risk being _**brutally MURDERED**_ for sport. Trophy hunters shoot and trap defenseless grizzlies. In fact, grizzly bears’ carcasses have been found severely mangled -- some with _**over 40 bullet wounds.**_ If a mother bear is killed, her weak babies could risk dying from _**starvation, hypothermia, or falling prey to other species.**_ Cubs rely on their mother for food for up to three years of age, so there is _little_ to no chance for them to survive during the harsh winter with not much to eat in brittle weather. **Friend, if we want to protect our beloved grizzly bears and cubs, we need to ACT NOW before it’s too late![Sign the petition now to tell the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service to SAVE grizzlies from being wiped out by cruel trophy hunters>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2065562?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2065563?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**With fewer than 2,000 grizzlies remaining in the lower 48 states****\--**** ** we could potentially witness the __**EXTINCTION**__ of our nation’s most treasured species. This is due to malicious massacres of grizzlies over the years by evil trophy hunters and Big Polluters profiting from destroying their precious habitats.
Grizzlies are more than iconic -- they play a critical role in the ecosystems they thrive in. **They help enhance biodiversity, enrich soils, regulate prey populations, and transport nutrients through different ecosystems.** Losing grizzlies could put a lot at stake for our public lands and the wildlife that call them home.
Please, Friend, trophy hunters are not waiting to hunt, attack and display dead grizzlies as souvenirs. Winter is approaching in a few weeks and vulnerable bear cubs need you more than ever before they become orphans. [**That means we need to act TWICE as fast and need everyone in this fight. We’re 3,928 signatures short of our goal. Will you help speak up for these innocent mammals?>>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2065564?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2065565?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for saving our grizzly bears,
Friends of the Earth **
|

After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Not a PEEP out of them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
They’re nothing but wolves in sheep’s clothing| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=8d5d4f50f6fc4d9bbf854d71fe940a71&_e=bEbyAYvh-2xC2s-PgI4AkNvSF4EOya1UdL_nNHBh63e7tBsgMFAJ30qR9IYGoQ13qIxL-M7tgKiTZNOHZR5M9_SK7SK0mxI9v30tiYuNyx2iD-q-N7nHJYFfk_OGDoQqwDRP6zQwe9LXqPysu3XwFQ9VwtsGLH7Rnhhd7Jzg_fK9VV-tUi849e-ZpRZgGjqBX_q94l6PobO1TXuFvzeYJsDPA8bjwkEYmEb9psV-pqAQ3S55IYe8asIq5D-A0XrsLxRxQ4DgdYrvmSiC8krNGbhpEI3Jyxkzu2L-Pb52CImfB2npfaqWBKGDNFXsT6WUc8i8uDXU345w_UXlbSbJj9jDapx9-N-25OwHsuBAuisCwU9ErMF8KdtqRjvcA8chXmSyxtr5ET8oWbPlek4_VNHkaIJDv8q85EhFm-IcreCxNY3sy-KwE20-17vWlETh5AmOE9EJMTjRebHrTm2eRz0bHC-VgsxIDxXbBwIZelxC9dd2pgaY4E0kke6vX9f3)
---
| | Patriot,

---
How many times have you heard the same (RINO) Republicans say they “love” the Constitution?
---
Some of them even like to put on a big show and carry around a copy of it in their pocket just to prove how “dedicated” they are to the Bill of Rights.

---
**_But ever since my First Amendment rights were ripped to shreds on Monday after Crooked Joe Biden requested a gag order against me, I haven’t heard a PEEP out of them about the vicious attack on my constitutional rights._**

---
**_Actions matter far more than words. And when the moment came to take a stand, the RINOs exposed themselves to be nothing more than wolves in sheep’s clothing._**

---
The truth is: these RINOs don’t care about the Constitution. They don’t care about any of the principles you and I hold dear.

---
They’re after power and money – and NOTHING else.
---
Meanwhile, I am running for President of the United States and willingly RISKING all of my _money_ through the “corporate death penalty” and all of my _freedom_ through 1,000 years in prison as an innocent man.
---
And I truly believe that’s why our movement is like nothing else in history.
---
Voters are used to politicians who are all talk, and no action. They’re used to candidates who talk tough, but drop to their knees in surrender when the battle heats up.
---
But our campaign is different.
---
When voters first saw me get wrongfully arrested in April of this year, they knew I meant it with every fiber of my being when I said I was willing to go to jail if that’s what it takes to save our country, drain the swamp, and dismantle the Deep State.
---
And that’s also why RINOs are so hellbent on stopping me.
---
They want a president they can control like a puppet – but **_NO_** **_ONE_** can buy me!
---
Since DAY ONE, I have REJECTED the special interest globalist RINO donors and instead turned to grassroots donors like YOU to sustain our movement.
---
Now, those same RINOs are working on a plot to try and defeat us and bring the GOP back to the days of open borders, globalist trade deals, and endless wars abroad and endless surrender to the Democrats at home.
---
While we may not be lined with special interest Super PAC money, we do have MILLIONS of grassroots donors giving even just $1 to SAVE AMERICA!
---
And when you add it all up, we have even TRIPLED the amount raised by these RINO sell-outs.
---
Now, let’s do it again!
---
_(But if you’re doing poorly right now due to all of the many villains destroying our country, please do not even think about donating. I mean it!)_
---

clean_body: They’re nothing but wolves in sheep’s clothing| | | | | Patriot, How many times have you heard the same (RINO) Republicans say they “love” the Constitution? Some of them even like to put on a big show and carry around a copy of it in their pocket just to prove how “dedicated” they are to the Bill of Rights. But ever since my First Amendment rights were ripped to shreds on Monday after Crooked Joe Biden requested a gag order against me, I haven’t heard a PEEP out of them about the vicious attack on my constitutional rights. Actions matter far more than words. And when the moment came to take a stand, the RINOs exposed themselves to be nothing more than wolves in sheep’s clothing. The truth is: these RINOs don’t care about the Constitution. They don’t care about any of the principles you and I hold dear. They’re after power and money – and NOTHING else. Meanwhile, I am running for President of the United States and willingly RISKING all of my money through the “corporate death penalty” and all of my freedom through 1,000 years in prison as an innocent man. And I truly believe that’s why our movement is like nothing else in history. Voters are used to politicians who are all talk, and no action. They’re used to candidates who talk tough, but drop to their knees in surrender when the battle heats up. But our campaign is different. When voters first saw me get wrongfully arrested in April of this year, they knew I meant it with every fiber of my being when I said I was willing to go to jail if that’s what it takes to save our country, drain the swamp, and dismantle the Deep State. And that’s also why RINOs are so hellbent on stopping me. They want a president they can control like a puppet – but NO ONE can buy me! Since DAY ONE, I have REJECTED the special interest globalist RINO donors and instead turned to grassroots donors like YOU to sustain our movement. Now, those same RINOs are working on a plot to try and defeat us and bring the GOP back to the days of open borders, globalist trade deals, and endless wars abroad and endless surrender to the Democrats at home. While we may not be lined with special interest Super PAC money, we do have MILLIONS of grassroots donors giving even just $1 to SAVE AMERICA! And when you add it all up, we have even TRIPLED the amount raised by these RINO sell-outs. Now, let’s do it again! (But if you’re doing poorly right now due to all of the many villains destroying our country, please do not even think about donating. I mean it!) | | Thank you, Donald J. Friend,

Joe Biden, the DNC, and extreme dark money political groups from across the country have made it clear: They will do everything in their power stop Glenn Youngkin's commonsense conservative agenda in Virginia.

They've poured more than $8 million into Virginia in the closing weeks of this election. Virginia Democrats are using this money on scare tactics and lies, because they have no vision or agenda to offer the Commonwealth.

**And if they continue to outraise and outspend us, they will take Virginia back to the failed policies of the past.**

[That's why Governor Youngkin needs your help.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=c9605bca2ac2437c8842382540808681&_e=bsyQd_464nG9C5H5Nc8EgxUUTImTw5cjQquQ6grvl-XEd7bsl6y0PLAhZt9SZ6dkcjlIwHAx1RgwrhQwTXDtn9adErK57j8md0Hn98cViydiE_qo9sE0Gtx9AusFcRXp3jUr_ADW4dPTm97ikfri_8oWE3uvs02kvn7zEpbfBB1YUHhjzawlPt4piCCAOsSxS2efBXp3ob6aH5Gjjsd-Kol-8c-exMFKjVs9cysrqj09EJp7LrP6PUR200Lmh5sDcOe5cgWqnD6799nmYPKlI_8CFka13-k7AmXlU7TT2j2cDbk9ckg5yi_f56ma6mXSvNUHilyXDOtgkjD4MHrHoXyDJwxXBy300Ijpnm8rsFh-pkgXTIe0DvT5AiS123p_)

**[It 's time to get in the game. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=c9605bca2ac2437c8842382540808681&_e=bsyQd_464nG9C5H5Nc8EgxUUTImTw5cjQquQ6grvl-XEd7bsl6y0PLAhZt9SZ6dkcjlIwHAx1RgwrhQwTXDtn9adErK57j8md0Hn98cViydiE_qo9sE0Gtx9AusFcRXp3jUr_ADW4dPTm97ikfri_8oWE3uvs02kvn7zEpbfBB1YUHhjzawlPt4piCCAOsSxS2efBXp3ob6aH5Gjjsd-Kol-8c-exMFKjVs9cysrqj1H1FHy0G_IeFtzVtj5qzOFLur4vku7L4sL7RTO1HfcszmiAK-aO7PzHIYuxqUk6ehXN0xt6_I7uvtpjw_E9hfINMUdveLk7JRc-rGPxNxqQIGtKr-rC0K_OH53IHzdW1RiaIHp6kn0er5UH1SJLdlL)**

We only need to win a few competitive seats to hold the House and flip the Senate and elect quality candidates who will be committed allies for Governor Youngkin in the General Assembly.

clean_body: Friend, we hope we can! | Friend, Joe Biden, the DNC, and extreme dark money political groups from across the country have made it clear: They will do everything in their power stop Glenn Youngkin's commonsense conservative agenda in Virginia. They've poured more than $8 million into Virginia in the closing weeks of this election. Virginia Democrats are using this money on scare tactics and lies, because they have no vision or agenda to offer the Commonwealth. And if they continue to outraise and outspend us, they will take Virginia back to the failed policies of the past. Early voting is underway in Virginia, and Election Day is right around the corner on November 7. | We only need to win a few competitive seats to hold the House and flip the Senate and elect quality candidates who will be committed allies for Governor Youngkin in the General Assembly. Everything we've accomplished so far - empowering parents, lowering the cost of living, supporting our law enforcement heroes, and jumpstarting Virginia's economy - is at stake. To move Virginia forward, Governor Youngkin needs your support. Thank you for your continued support. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Attacks from AIPAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

AIPAC is outrageously attacking our candidates for calling for a ceasefire
and standing up for the rights of Palestinians in Gaza:

Our bloc has shown tremendous political courage over the last week — at
the cost of being attacked by both establishment Democrats and
Republicans.

AIPAC has millions of dollars at their disposal to spend against us.
Remember, they tried to defeat Summer Lee last cycle, and are actively
recruiting against Jamaal, Ilhan and Summer right now.

→ So now, we need to be prepared for AIPAC to spend heavily against our
candidates who have been bravely calling for a ceasefire. We need their
voices in Congress now more than ever.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231021-2.hwxUTO&refcode=em20231021-31465&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=31465%2E1203867%2EVeWbbP ]Will you contribute $3 right now to help us prepare for
AIPAC to spend heavily against us and our candidates? We have to protect
the Squad, we can’t let them defeat a single member of our bloc.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231021-2.hwxUTO&refcode=em20231021-31465&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=31465%2E1203867%2EVeWbbP ]Contribute $3

Thank you for your support,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in

using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1022&akid=31465%2E1203867%2EVeWbbP ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

body:
| | | Hi team -- Christie here, Executive Director of the DSCC. When I looked through our past survey responses, I was very impressed with your level of enthusiasm. In fact, you were **more active than 90 percent of Democrats in our database!**

We defied history and _expanded_ our Senate majority last year because we partnered with folks like you. Now, we NEED your help to do it again.

We're launching a high-priority focus group that's ONLY open to Democrats who've proven their commitment to winning -- **and you’re in the top 10% of Democrats who made the cut. So please, accept your invitation by taking this survey right away:

[www.dscc.org/GrassrootsDemocraticStrategists/#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/15887?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231021-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup23RFv2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231021-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup23RFv2-Pros-sl1&akid=12333%2E9716520%2E__7HQV)**

I'm excited to have you on the team!

Christie

Hey Peter, it’s Isaac – Brandon Presley’s finance director. I’ll be honest; I’m scratching my head a little bit. **I just refreshed our fundraising numbers, and they’re massively slowing down:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71976776/433851127/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.60fcee41-6270-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.60fcee41-6270-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBmY2VlNDEtNjI3MC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=55FeB5DQw-KnLZT3q3rJPkAsBmWN4uStl1qbB3NtOO0=) **[We can’t afford a slowdown this close to Election Day. Can I count on you to rush $5, $10, or even $25 right now to turn this trend around? Polls have this race neck-and-neck, so every little bit makes a major difference toward our $130,000 online budget gap.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71976777/433851128/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.60fcee41-6270-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.60fcee41-6270-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBmY2VlNDEtNjI3MC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=55FeB5DQw-KnLZT3q3rJPkAsBmWN4uStl1qbB3NtOO0=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71976778/433851129/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.60fcee41-6270-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.60fcee41-6270-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBmY2VlNDEtNjI3MC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=55FeB5DQw-KnLZT3q3rJPkAsBmWN4uStl1qbB3NtOO0=)**

Look, Tate Reeves is running scared. He knows that the polls have us VIRTUALLY TIED, that’s why his team has started pouring _even more_ money into airing lies about Brandon on TV.
But we aren’t taking our foot off the gas for a second. Just this week, Brandon finished visiting all of Mississippi’s 82 counties – and just today, he started a bus tour across the state. While Tate Reeves hides in his mansion, we’re on the ground talking with Mississippians.
Everything that we’re doing is working. But it’s also expensive.
Airing ads, traveling the state, turning out voters – it all starts to add up. And with just 17 days until Election Day, we can’t afford to slow down now.
**[That’s why I hope you’ll be a part of the surge of donations we need to close this $130,000 online gap. Please, invest $25 into electing Brandon Presley right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71976779/433851130/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.60fcee41-6270-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.60fcee41-6270-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBmY2VlNDEtNjI3MC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=55FeB5DQw-KnLZT3q3rJPkAsBmWN4uStl1qbB3NtOO0=)**
Thanks for all you do,
Isaac Lampner
Finance Director, Brandon Presley for Mississippi

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

| To defeat Garvey at the ballot box next year, we need to step up in support of Adam right now:

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The JetBlue CEO went on TV and promised the moon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
This type of corporate consolidation has jacked up prices and cut down on quality, with worse deals and worse service for consumers.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=109%2E4032634%2E7iXlzR)
---
If you’ve had to book air travel recently, I don’t have to tell you this: consumers are up against outrageous fares and limited options. And it might get worse. One big airline, JetBlue, has proposed a deal to buy another, Spirit. From industry to industry, that type of corporate consolidation has jacked up prices and cut down on quality, with worse deals and worse service for consumers. [**I’m fighting to break up big corporate monopolies and prevent mergers that hurt working people. But I can’t do it alone. Will you add your name if you’re in this fight by my side?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-monopolies/?source=EMZ16V_COR_E_20231021_V1S1&t=8&akid=109%2E4032634%2E7iXlzR) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-monopolies/?source=EMZ16V_COR_E_20231021_V1S1&t=9&akid=109%2E4032634%2E7iXlzR)
---
Back to JetBlue for a moment. Last year, their CEO went on TV and promised the moon. He said that the deal would “absolutely” mean lower fares.
That was the public story in March. But according to some internal company documents that were reportedly revealed in August, JetBlue estimates the merger could increase prices by up to 40%. Surprise, surprise: one story in front of the cameras, another behind the scenes.
**No matter how some CEOs try to spin it, consolidation in the airline industry — and across our economy — leads to higher prices, fewer options, and worse service for consumers.**
I wrote a letter to the CEO of JetBlue calling for answers. If the reports we’ve heard are correct, then they misled the public, and the Department of Transportation and antitrust regulators must oppose the deal to protect consumers.
And I’ll keep fighting back against the corporate consolidation that’s putting Americans under the thumb of a few giants. I’ve been calling on the administration to use all of its tools to fight back against monopolies. And I’ve got a bill — the Prohibiting Anticompetitive Mergers Act — to ban the most damaging mergers, restore competition, and bring down prices for consumers.
I’ll stay in the fight — but it’s only possible because people like you are fighting alongside me.
[**Add your name if you agree: It’s time to take on big corporate monopolies and level the playing field.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-monopolies/?source=EMZ16V_COR_E_20231021_V1S1&t=10&akid=109%2E4032634%2E7iXlzR)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/824?t=14&akid=109%2E4032634%2E7iXlzR)
---

There's a growing concern that this is only the tip of the iceberg, and more states might follow suit, limiting direct democratic processes. **The Fairness Project won't stand by silently. clean_body: It’s time to start the groundwork now | | Team, The recent introduction of a new state law in Arizona has election officials waving a red flag — completely altering the way state officials have counted signatures for ballot measures. These changes might not directly affect the measures we're eyeing for 2024, but here at the Fairness Project, we are deeply concerned about their implications on the issues that matter the most to us—be it reproductive rights, fair wages, or others. = = Our track record in Arizona speaks for itself. We've backed winning ballot measures like the 2016 state minimum wage hike and a similar campaign in Tucson in 2021. We stood firm against referendums that sought to limit the power of ballot measures and ardently supported Proposition 209, which garnered over 70% voter approval to cap interest rates on medical debts. No matter what, we’ll always step up to fight in states like Arizona — even when the playing field is uneven. But the new legislation in Arizona implies that we must redouble our efforts to make sure voters have a say in shaping their futures. There's a growing concern that this is only the tip of the iceberg, and more states might follow suit, limiting direct democratic processes. The Fairness Project won't stand by silently. We are committed to countering any assaults on the ballot measure process. We've always been quick to respond to political shifts, and with your support, we can maintain this agility. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Our determination never wanes, FP Team Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Can I share something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
I’m used to being written off,
Derek.

When I first ran for Congress in Wisconsin in 1997, no one thought I could
win — especially when an extremely popular challenger jumped into the
race.

I remember huddling with one of my staffers at the time, and she said,
“Well Tammy, maybe you want to rethink what you’re doing because it’s
going to be tough.”

I looked her right in the eye and asked, “Do you think I should wait my
turn?”

The next thing I said was this: I believe that women have to run —
especially when it’s hard — and not wait our turn. We can’t wait until we
get a tap on our shoulder or we’ll never get anywhere.

I ended up winning that race and became the very first woman elected to
the House of Representatives from Wisconsin. And it wouldn’t be the last
time our team would make history.

When I ran for U.S. Senate in 2012, an incredible team of grassroots
supporters like you fought alongside me — even as some people wrote us
off. You helped me become the first woman elected to the chamber from our
state and the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history.

In 2018, despite being a top target for national Republicans and enduring
over a year of attacks, you stood with me again, and we won.

Time and again, grassroots supporters like you have defied the odds. The
battle to protect this seat in 2024 will be no different, and it will
require all of us working together to overcome the millions of dollars
right-wing mega-donors will spend to defeat us and hand the Senate
majority over to Mitch McConnell.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2172?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231021_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_mmfr.2.7&t=1001&akid=6442%2E1827488%2ESxYGze ]Together, I know we can defy the odds once again. So
Derek, I’m
humbly asking: Will you help us protect this seat and the Senate majority
with it by splitting a donation today between my campaign in Wisconsin and
Tony Evers' team?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately and be split between Tony Evers and Tammy Baldwin.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2173?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231021_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_mmfr.2.7&t=1002&akid=6442%2E1827488%2ESxYGze ]Donate $10 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2173?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231021_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_mmfr.2.7&t=1003&akid=6442%2E1827488%2ESxYGze ]Donate $25 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2173?amount=50&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231021_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_mmfr.2.7&t=1004&akid=6442%2E1827488%2ESxYGze ]Donate $50 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2173?amount=100&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231021_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_mmfr.2.7&t=1005&akid=6442%2E1827488%2ESxYGze ]Donate $100 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2173?amount=500&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231021_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_mmfr.2.7&t=1006&akid=6442%2E1827488%2ESxYGze ]Donate $500 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2172?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231021_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_mmfr.2.7&t=1007&akid=6442%2E1827488%2ESxYGze ]Another Amount

Your support has made all the difference time and time again, and I can’t
thank you enough for that.

I’m so glad to have you on this historic team.

— Tammy

Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin

Earlier this week, we sent you our urgent petition to abolish the Electoral College.

**But our records indicate that you didn’t sign.** Without your signature, we’re still [5] signatures short of our signature goal.

So we’re giving you a second chance to add your signature now. **[_Click HERE or use the button below to sign »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231021_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=20325%2E4449941%2ESHzZAs)** | [ADD MY NAME NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231021_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=20325%2E4449941%2ESHzZAs)

Sign on now to abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231021_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=20325%2E4449941%2ESHzZAs)

Look, Jamie Raskin is 100% right — the Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

_**Donald Trump would NEVER have been President if it wasn’t for the Electoral College.**_

Republicans have only won the popular vote ONCE since 1988.

_But they’ve won the Presidency three times during that period thanks to the Electoral College – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_

**[_So we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to stand with Jamie Raskin & demand Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! Add your name right away!_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231021_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=20325%2E4449941%2ESHzZAs)**
[Sign my name now: Abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231021_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=20325%2E4449941%2ESHzZAs)
---
Don’t forget to hit submit to record your signature. Thank you,
